title: Pool = gone!
body: Before this filter my kids bathroom smelled like a pool during bath time! It’s made to fit any bath spout. In large part, it’s super easy to use, but we’ve had some trouble opening the ball when needing to replace filters, but it could be the filter doesn’t need replacing often so it gets stuck after being closed for a while.
body_zh: 在有这个过滤器之前，我孩子们洗澡时浴室闻起来像游泳池的味道！它适合任何浴缸出水口。大部分来说，它非常容易使用，但我们需要更换滤网时打球时遇到了一些困难，不过可能是滤网不常更换，所以闭上一段时间后球会卡住。

title: Gentle on Kids’ Skin & Super Easy to Install
title_zh: 对儿童皮肤温和，安装非常简单
body: As a parent, water quality is something I pay close attention to, and this bath ball filter has been a great addition to our home. Installation was extremely simple there were no tools needed, just attach and go. Since using it, I’ve noticed a real improvement in my kids’ skin, especially less dryness and irritation after bath time. The water feels noticeably softer, and bath time has been more comfortable overall. It’s reassuring to have an extra layer of filtration, and this has absolutely met our expectations. Highly recommend for families with children or anyone dealing with dry, sensitive skin.
body_zh: 作为家长，我非常关注水质，这个浴球过滤器为我们家增添了极好的一笔。安装非常简单，不需要任何工具，只要安装即可。自从用了它后，我注意到孩子们的皮肤明显改善，尤其是洗澡后干燥和刺激感减少了。水感觉明显更软，洗澡时间也更舒适。多一层过滤让我很安心，这完全符合我们的预期。强烈推荐给有孩子的家庭或任何皮肤敏感、干性敏感的人。

title: Noticeable Difference in Skin
body: We’ve noticed such a big difference since using this bath water filter. My kids tend to have eczema flare-ups, and with how dry winter has been (plus our hard water), their skin was really struggling. This filter has helped so much—their skin feels noticeably softer and less irritated after baths. I love that it helps remove chlorine and other harsh stuff, and it was super easy to install. The fact that it’s portable is a huge bonus too. Such a simple change that’s made a big difference for our family.
body_zh: 自从使用这款沐浴水过滤器以来，我们注意到了如此大的差异。我的孩子们容易出现湿疹，而且由于冬季干燥（再加上我们的水质很硬），他们的皮肤真的很糟糕。这个过滤器帮了很大的忙——沐浴后他们的皮肤感觉明显更柔软，刺激也更少。我喜欢它有助于去除氯和其他刺激性物质，而且安装起来超级简单。事实上，它的便携性也是一个巨大的好处。如此简单的改变却给我们的家庭带来了巨大的改变。

title: Good for chlorine removal from water
body: We used this product to help filter chlorine out of the water for our kids baths since we didn't have any kind of water filtration system in the house yet. It hung nicely on the spigot of the bath tub and filtered the water as it filled the tub. The product seemed to work as I did not notice as much of a smell of chlorine in the bath water after the tub was filled. My kids were not as itchy either coming out of the water.
body_zh: 由于我们家里还没有任何类型的水过滤系统，因此我们使用该产品来帮助过滤儿童洗澡水中的氯。它很好地挂在浴缸的龙头上，并在浴缸注满水时过滤水。该产品似乎有效，因为在浴缸注满水后，我没有注意到洗澡水中有太多氯的气味。我的孩子从水里出来后也不那么痒了。

title: 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 Game-Changer for Sensitive Skin – Noticeably Softer Water After One Use!
title_zh: 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 敏感肌的游戏规则改变者——一次使用后水质明显变软！
body: I didn’t expect to love this bath filter as much as I do — but it made a noticeable difference after just one bath! Living in an area with hard, heavily chlorinated water, my skin always felt dry and itchy after bathing, no matter what products I used. This filter changed that instantly. 💧 Skin Feels Softer & Less Irritated After using this for one week, my skin feels smoother and less tight after every bath. I no longer need to slather on thick lotion right away. My daughter also has sensitive skin, and I’ve noticed fewer flare-ups since using this product. That alone made it worth every penny. 💡 Easy to Use & Attach The setup couldn’t be simpler — just hang it under your tub spout and let the water run through it. No complicated installation or tools. It even fits our slightly curved spout just fine. 🛁 Water Smells & Feels Cleaner There’s no more heavy chlorine smell, and the water feels silkier somehow. It’s hard to describe, but you can literally feel the difference — like hotel-quality bath water at home. ♻️ Eco-Friendly & BPA-Free I love that it’s BPA-free and built to filter out harmful contaminants without compromising water flow. The design is also sleek and modern — it doesn’t look bulky or awkward in our tub. ⸻ Final Thoughts: I didn’t realize how much my bath water was affecting my skin until I tried this. I highly recommend it to anyone with skin issues, kids, or simply looking to upgrade their self-care routine at home.
body_zh: 我没想到会这么喜欢这款浴缸过滤器——但洗了一次澡后效果明显明显！我住在水质硬且氯含量高的地方，洗完澡后无论用什么产品，皮肤总是感觉干燥和瘙痒。这个过滤器立刻改变了这种状况。 💧 皮肤感觉更柔软、刺激感更少 使用一周后，每次洗澡后皮肤感觉更光滑、不那么紧绷。我不再需要马上涂抹厚厚的乳液。我女儿皮肤也很敏感，自从用了这款产品后，我注意到发作的发作减少了。仅凭这一点就值得花每一分钱。 💡 使用和安装简便 安装方式非常简单——只需挂在浴缸出水口下方，让水流通过即可。没有复杂的安装或工具。它甚至能很好地适应我们微微弯曲的出水口。 🛁 水闻起来更干净，水感觉更干净 了，没有浓重的氯味，水质感也更丝滑。很难形容，但你真的能感受到差别——就像家里酒店级的洗澡水。 ♻️ 环保且无BPA： 我喜欢它不含BPA，设计用于过滤有害污染物而不影响水流。设计也时尚现代——在我们的浴缸里看起来既不笨重也不别扭。 ⸻总结： 直到我尝试了这个，我才意识到我的浴水对皮肤的影响有多大。我强烈推荐给有皮肤问题、孩子，或者只是想在家升级自我护理习惯的人。

title: Mold!
body: I was super happy with our Crystal Quest Bath Ball filter until I went to change the filter and found mold! This was our second filter change, so we've had it for about 12 months. We didn't notice any mold at the 6-month filter change. When I reached out to the company directly, I was told "The bath ball is removing the chlorine in the water so if left in an area that is a suitable environment (Humidity, temperature, etc.), bacteria can form since there is no chlorine to prevent it. You can use hydrogen peroxide or bleach to disinfect it, then I would recommend making sure the outside and inside of the housing is dried off after each use." The directive to make sure the outside and inside of the housing are dried off after each use was not in the original manual. When I asked the company to honor the limited warranty, they told me that any exchange/replacement would have to be from Amazon... well it has been almost a year so that's a no-go. We will not be purchasing from this company again, this product is too expensive to be missing care instructions and the company does not care to honor their warranty.
body_zh: 我对我们的Crystal Quest浴球过滤器非常满意，直到我去换过滤器时发现了霉菌！这是我们第二次更换过滤器，所以我们已经用了大约12个月了。更换滤网6个月后我们没发现霉菌。当我直接联系公司时，他们告诉我“浴球是去除水中的氯，如果放在合适的环境（湿度、温度等）中，细菌可能会形成，因为没有氯来防止。 你可以用过氧化氢或漂白剂消毒，然后我建议每次使用后确保外壳内外都干燥。” 原始说明书中没有规定每次使用后确保外壳内外都干燥。当我要求公司履行有限保修时，他们告诉我任何换货/更换都必须通过亚马逊......现在已经快一年了，所以这根本不行。 我们不会再从这家公司购买，这款产品太贵了，不能缺少保养说明，而且公司也不愿意履行保修。

title: Great product
body: Great product. My newborn son's skin broke out so badly after his first bath. My husband ordered this the next day and you can see the difference in the water - it's clearer and has a softer feel. No more breakouts! My one complaint would be that there should be another option for hanging/hooking it on the faucet while filling it. The hook only works if there's something to hold it up -our faucet is sloped so that didn't work. The rubber, grippy band thing that was included works until it gets wet and then slips off. We had to rig up a command hook type thing on the faucet to hold it up. However, it does function exactly as advertised and has been great.
body_zh: 很棒的产品。我刚出生的儿子第一次洗澡后皮肤就严重溃烂。我丈夫第二天点了这个，你可以看到水的不同——它更清澈，感觉更柔和。没有更多的突破！ 我的一个抱怨是，应该有另一种选择，可以在注水时将其悬挂/钩在水龙头上。挂钩只有在有东西支撑的情况下才起作用——我们的水龙头是倾斜的，所以不起作用。附带的橡胶抓力带可以一直工作，直到弄湿然后滑落。我们必须在水龙头上安装一个命令挂钩类型的东西来固定它。 然而，它的功能确实和宣传的一样，而且非常棒。

title: Love it, love it, love it!! Skin is smoother and I use less lotion-even in winter!!
title_zh: 爱了爱了爱了！！皮肤更光滑，我使用的乳液也更少——即使在冬天也是如此！
body: We live in the north and have city water. The water is hard (but not like in the country) and sometimes the smell of chlorine is so strong. The water dries the skin and sometimes makes you feel itchy. Since we put this in, the water feels so much more softer and the smell is not nearly as bad from the chlorine. My skin feels better and my children spend more time in the tub. Since we do not have really hard water or water full of lime I was not worried about the chrome finish coming off and even if it did I wouldn't care because I want the filtering to work on the quality of water I have. I don't care what it looks like. I got the white one for my neighbor and she said it made a huge difference on her child's skin. She always had bumps and her skin was dry and itchy. Once they started using the filter ball the dryness and bumps went away. They tested it to see if they stopped using the ball if her skin was better but it got worse again so they started using the ball again. It works for filtering the harmful stuff in our city water.
body_zh: 我们住在北方，有自来水。水很硬（但不像乡下那样），有时氯气的味道很浓。水会使皮肤干燥，有时会让你感到发痒。 自从我们添加了它之后，水感觉变得更加柔和，而且氯的气味也没有那么难闻了。我的皮肤感觉好多了，我的孩子们在浴缸里呆的时间也更多了。由于我们没有真正的硬水或充满石灰的水，所以我并不担心镀铬饰面脱落，即使确实脱落，我也不会在意，因为我希望过滤能够改善我所拥有的水的质量。我不在乎它看起来像什么。我给邻居买了白色的，她说这对她孩子的皮肤有很大的影响。她身上总是起疙瘩，皮肤又干又痒。一旦他们开始使用过滤球，干燥和肿块就消失了。他们进行了测试，看看他们是否停止使用球，她的皮肤是否有所改善，但情况又变得更糟，所以他们再次开始使用球。它可以过滤城市水中的有害物质。

title: Fantastic Product!
body: This product is wonderful for my 2yr old bath time. It fits well over the bath faucet. Love the fact that all the water that flows out of the faucet flows right into the bath ball without over spilling to the sides. No matter how slow or strong the current of water flowing, it never overflows on the side. It's a perfect product that does the trick with our heavy hardwater. The water comes out clearer and my baby's skin is softer. He thoroughly enjoys his bath time more. Before we installed this product, he wouldn't bathe for long. He would just do his business and hop out. Now, he stays in the tub for 30 to 45 minutes if not longer! If it wasn't for the fact that his hands and feet get pruney, he would stay longer, but he still hasn't figured out why his hands get pruney and doesn't like the feel of it. My mother-in-law used this product as a head shower. Granted that it's not meant for that, she wanted to give it a try. Half hardwater came raining down on her (as expected), but the water that actually filtered through the bath ball made a HUGE REMARKABLE difference to her hair and skin! She's a frequent froster with her hair. So her hair was very course, brittle, and extremely dry. After her experience with the bath ball, I was amazed on how soft and silky her hair was after one use! It was like baby's hair all over again. Her hair was flowing, soft to touch, and glowing with life! Really, after so many frosts to her hair, it had a dull look to it. This bath ball made her hair renew with life. I would recommend this product to any parent that cares about what their child's skin takes in. I'm definitely going to give the shower head a try! It's an inexpensive solution to have clean water. It beats the hard, heavy chlorine water running through our house! We can't afford to have our house wired for the filter yet, so for the cost of simple attachable products makes this product worth it!
body_zh: 这款产品非常适合我两岁孩子的洗澡时间。它正好能套在浴缸水龙头上。我很喜欢水龙头流出的所有水都会直接流入浴球，不会溢出到四侧。无论水流多么缓慢或湍急，水从一侧从未溢出。这是一款非常适合我们重硬水环境的产品。水变得更清澈，宝宝的皮肤也更柔软。他更享受洗澡的时间。在我们安装这个产品之前，他洗澡时间不长。他只是去解决自己的事，然后跳下去。现在，他在浴缸里待30到45分钟，甚至更久！如果不是因为手脚会皱起来，他会待得更久，但他还是没弄明白为什么手会皱起来，也不喜欢那种感觉。 我婆婆用这款产品当作淋浴。虽然这本来就不是用来做的，但她还是想试一试。半硬水如雨般倾泻而下（正如预料之中），但穿过浴球的水对她的头发和皮肤产生了巨大且显著的变化！她经常被头发弄得很糟糕。所以她的头发非常稀疏、脆弱且极度干燥。用完浴球后，我惊讶于她用一次头发后竟然柔软丝滑！就像婴儿的头发重现一样。她的头发飘逸，触感柔软，闪耀着生命的光芒！说真的，经历了那么多霜冻后，头发看起来暗淡无光。这个浴球让她的头发焕发了生机。 我会推荐这款产品给任何关心孩子皮肤吸收的家长。我肯定会试试花洒！拥有干净水是一种经济实惠的解决方案。这比我们家里流淌的那种硬而重的氯水强多了！我们家还负担不起安装过滤器的费用，所以以简单可安装产品的成本来看，这款产品非常值得！

title: Does the job, but a bit precariously
body: This WORKS wonderfully! It gets the chlorine out - I can tell, by the smell and the feel, the difference when I do or don't use this. So I'm very glad to have this! It withstands the water's fast flow - which is fantastic! As I read in previous reviews, sand/grit does come out of it when being used. I've used this around 10 times, and sand is still coming out of it. It doesn't bother me, though, as it sits at the bottom of the tub straight below the filter, and it rinses out of the tub without a problem. The main problem I have with this is the hanging contraption. It didn't hang where I needed it to, so I tried to pull out one end of the snapped-in plastic handle in order to reposition it, and it broke. It's VERY cheaply made (the handle). Once you pop it in, you're not going to move it, unless you break it. So, I attached some textured pony tail holders to hold it in place! (My tub spout is totally curved with nothing specific to be able to latch/hang from.) It hangs great now, and I'm SO glad I don't actually have to hold it myself now!
body_zh: 这方法非常有效！ 它能把氯排出去——我能通过气味和手感判断用不用的区别。 所以我很高兴有这个！ 它能承受水流湍急的冲击——这非常棒！ 正如我在之前的评测中看到的，使用时确实会有沙子和砂砾。 我用过大约10次，沙子还是会掉出来。 不过这倒不困扰我，因为它就在浴缸底部，正好在过滤器下方，冲洗干净也没问题。 我最大的问题是悬挂装置。 它没挂在我需要的位置，所以我试图拉出一端扣上的塑料手柄重新定位，结果断了。 它的把手做得非常便宜。 一旦你装进去，除非你弄坏它，否则你不会再移动它。 于是，我装上了一些有纹理的马尾夹来固定它！ （我的浴缸出水口完全弯曲，没有什么特别可以锁扣或悬挂的地方。） 现在挂起来很舒服，我真庆幸现在不用自己拿着了！

title: A month later and my toddler’s skin looks almost 90% better
title_zh: 一个月后，我家幼儿的皮肤几乎好转了90%
body: One day my toddler’s babysitter sent me a photo, and I noticed a small white patch on the upper part of his cheek. At first it looked tiny, but later I realized it had become more noticeable. That’s when I started thinking that maybe the bath water was too harsh for his sensitive skin. Since we don’t have a whole-house water filter, I began searching for a simple solution and found this Santevia bath faucet filter on Amazon. I loved the design right away — it’s simple, practical, and affordable. After reading the reviews and learning about the story behind why this filter was created, I felt even more confident about trying it. It’s very easy to use and made bath time feel much gentler for my toddler’s skin. As a mom, finding small solutions that support sensitive skin can make a big difference, and this has been a great addition to our bath routine.
body_zh: 有一天，我幼儿的保姆给我发了一张照片，我注意到他脸颊上方有一小块白色斑块。起初看起来很小，但后来我发现它变得更明显了。那时我开始怀疑洗澡水对他敏感的皮肤来说可能太刺激了。 因为我们没有全屋水过滤器，我开始寻找一个简单的解决方案，在亚马逊上找到了这款Santevia浴缸水龙头过滤器。我立刻喜欢上了这个设计——简单、实用且价格实惠。 在阅读了评测并了解了这款滤镜背后的故事后，我对尝试它更加有信心了。它非常容易使用，让我幼儿的洗澡感觉更温和。 作为妈妈，找到支持敏感肌肤的小解决方案能带来很大帮助，这对我们的洗澡程序来说是个很好的补充。

title: Grew mold
body: Really disappointed with this filter. Within just one week of use, it developed visible mold, which is the last thing you want anywhere near bath water especially for a baby. That was a huge red flag for cleanliness and safety. On top of that, after using it before the mold appeared, my baby’s skin became noticeably dry and developed a rash, which we hadn’t been dealing with before. I bought this hoping it would help with water quality and be gentler on sensitive skin, but it seemed to do the opposite. I stopped using it right away. Definitely not something I feel comfortable recommending.
body_zh: 对这个滤镜真的很失望。在使用短短一周内，它就出现了明显的霉菌，这是您最不想在洗澡水附近发生的事情，尤其是对于婴儿来说。这对于清洁和安全来说是一个巨大的危险信号。 最重要的是，在霉菌出现之前使用它后，我宝宝的皮肤明显变得干燥并出现皮疹，这是我们以前没有处理过的。我买了这个，希望它能改善水质并对敏感皮肤更温和，但它似乎起到了相反的作用。我立即停止使用它。绝对不是我觉得推荐的东西。

title: Product works but not as expected
title_zh: 产品有效，但未达到预期效果
body: Got really excited to try this bath filter, but it turned out disappointing. When I unpacked the replacement filter, it had visible grime underneath the plastic wrapping. Even after a thorough wash with soap and water, sticky dark spots remained. I tried rinsing it in my bathroom sink and ended up with greasy stains there, which was frustrating. Using it during my evening baths at home, I expected cleaner water, but a simple test showed no noticeable difference in water quality after filtering. It feels like this product doesn't do what it promises. I hoped it would be helpful for improving my bath water, but sadly it missed the mark.
body_zh: 很高兴尝试这款浴缸过滤器，但结果令人失望。当我打开更换过滤器的包装时，塑料包装下面有明显的污垢。即使用肥皂和水彻底清洗后，粘性黑斑仍然存在。我尝试在浴室水槽中冲洗它，结果发现那里有油腻的污渍，这令人沮丧。晚上在家洗澡时使用它，我希望得到更干净的水，但简单的测试显示过滤后的水质没有明显差异。感觉这个产品并没有达到它的承诺。我希望这对改善我的洗澡水有帮助，但遗憾的是它没有达到目标。

title: Filter works but not for family use
title_zh: 过滤器有效，但不适合家庭使用
body: Ever since I started using this water filter at home, I've noticed my skin breaking out a lot, which is super frustrating. I usually have pretty sensitive skin, but this made it worse, not better. Tried to get a refund, but missed the deadline, so now I’m stuck with it. Also, the water doesn’t taste much different, and I can’t tell if it’s filtering anything helpful at all. I bought it hoping it would be handy for daily use, especially with my kids around, but honestly, it feels like a waste of money. Definitely not what I expected for something marketed as a quality filter.

title: Not very good for bath use
body: When I bought this faucet for my bathroom, I was hoping it would handle the water pressure well enough to fill the bathtub quickly, especially when I’m bathing my kids. Unfortunately, it can’t keep up with the flow rate required for warm water in the tub. The water started to overflow, which was frustrating and completely missed the point of what I needed it for. I’ve been thinking about moving it to the sink instead, where the pressure demands are lower. It does seem like it would be okay for washing hands, but for filling a bathtub, it’s a bit of a letdown. At least it works fine for lighter tasks, but I ended up quite disappointed given my initial expectations. If you’re looking for something for higher pressure use, this might not be the best fit.
body_zh: 当我为浴室购买这个水龙头时，我希望它能够很好地处理水压，以便快速注满浴缸，尤其是当我给孩子洗澡时。不幸的是，它无法跟上浴缸中温水所需的流速。水开始溢出，这令人沮丧，完全没有达到我需要它的目的。我一直在考虑将其移至水槽，那里的压力要求较低。看起来确实可以用来洗手，但是用来给浴缸注水，就有点让人失望了。至少它对于较轻的任务来说效果很好，但考虑到我最初的期望，我最终感到非常失望。如果您正在寻找用于更高压力的产品，这可能不是最合适的。

title: Stopped working and got moldy quickly 😕
body: The idea of this water filter sounded good for my home kitchen, especially trying to have better-tasting water during cooking. At first, I was happy with how it fit in my fridge. But soon, it started leaking water which was really annoying. Also, after just a week, I noticed mold building up around the filter – not something you want in your drinking water. I tried cleaning it, but that didn’t seem to help much. It doesn’t dry properly either, which I think is why the mold appears so fast. For now, it feels like more trouble than convenience. 😕
body_zh: 这种滤水器的想法听起来很适合我的家庭厨房，尤其是在烹饪过程中想要获得味道更好的水。起初，我对它能放在冰箱里感到很满意。但很快，它就开始漏水，这真是令人烦恼。另外，仅仅一周后，我注意到过滤器周围长出了霉菌——这不是您想要的饮用水中的东西。我尝试清洁它，但这似乎没有多大帮助。它也不能正常干燥，我认为这就是霉菌出现得如此之快的原因。就目前而言，感觉麻烦多于方便。 😕

title: Don't do it
body: Can I give it 0 stars? Haha! This water filter is basically completely useless. Because it's all fabric, the water comes out from everywhere and runs down the outside of the bag. I have very low water pressure, especially coming out of the tub faucet, and there is still way too much for for the water to go through the loofah and beads only. Maybe a small percentage is actually going down through the filter, but for the most part it's just running all over the outside. So you're pretty much just "filtering" the water through one layer of cotton. Anyways, don't buy this, go buy one of the real faucet filters that can handle the flow of water and actually filter out the nasty stuff.
body_zh: 我能给它0星吗？哈哈！这个水过滤器基本上完全没用。因为全是布料，水会从各处流出，顺着包外流。我的水压非常低，尤其是从浴缸水龙头出来时，水量仍然太多，水只能通过丝瓜络和珠子。也许有一小部分水确实通过过滤器流下去，但大多数水流到外面。所以你基本上就是通过一层棉花“过滤”水。总之，别买这个，去买那种能处理水流、能过滤脏东西的真正水龙头过滤器吧。

title: *FILTER CONTAINS PLASTIC*
body: *This is not a TERRIBLE product* I accidentally purchased the SANTEVIA Bath filter recently. I was going to return it but its not worth the cost in shipping. I am not a doctor nor is this medical advice, I just know a lot of things, but I looked into the product further and it states that the first filter it uses is: - Loofah to evenly disperse water flow: It is not a natural loofah. It's synthetic made of polyethylene( a thermoplastic polymer). - It uses chemistry to turn chlorine into a harmless salt called chloride using calcium sulfite. I love the idea but if you are trying to avoid harm from chemicals in plastic, this will take the chlorine out and alkalize/remineralize the water, but essentially you are swapping chlorine for plastic exposure. Microplastics are associated with endocrine disruption. * I made my own bath filter from a coffee can I drilled drainage holes in, lined it with an old cotton T-shirt, and then I filled it with activated carbon. (Can be purchased online or at an aquatic or hydroponic shop) * Note that hot water doesn't allow activated carbon to "settle" into its porous surface. * Run hot water first, let it off gas the chlorine * Hang the can on the bath spout run cold water through the coffee can to absorb chlorine. As for remineralizing, you can Google the rest. Stay safe, Shop smart guys 🤓
body_zh: *这不是一个糟糕的产品* 我最近无意中购买了 SANTEVIA 沐浴过滤器。我本来打算退货，但不值得付出运费。 我不是医生，这也不是医疗建议，我只是知道很多事情，但我进一步研究了该产品，它指出它使用的第一个过滤器是： - 丝瓜络均匀分散水流：它不是天然丝瓜络。它是由聚乙烯（一种热塑性聚合物）合成制成的。 - 它使用化学方法，使用亚硫酸钙将氯转化为一种无害的盐，称为氯化物。 我喜欢这个想法，但如果你想避免塑料中化学物质的伤害，这会去除氯并使水碱化/再矿化，但本质上你是用氯来代替塑料暴露。微塑料与内分泌干扰有关。 * 我用咖啡罐制作了自己的浴缸过滤器，在上面钻了排水孔，用旧棉质 T 恤衬里，然后填充了活性炭。 （可以在网上或在水产或水培商店购买） * 请注意，热水不允许活性炭“沉淀”到其多孔表面。 * 先放热水，让它排出氯气 * 将咖啡罐挂在浴缸出水口上，用冷水流过咖啡罐以吸收氯。 至于再矿化，你可以谷歌其余的。保持安全，聪明人购物🤓

I also love that it uses organic cotton instead of anything synthetic. Easy setup, no hassle, and genuinely better water - definitely worth it.

body: After 1 use I am disappointed with this product. I was excited because of the minerals that are supposed to be added back into the water but the filtered water smells wrong. When it filtered the water came out foggy and bubbly. I'm glad I didn't use this for my baby's bath before trying it. title: You will notice a big difference in bath time
title_zh: 你会发现洗澡时间差别很大
body: I bought this for bath-time with my son. I wanted a product that would make the water softer and not as harsh. Where we live, the water leaves your skin dry and itchy. All that changed as soon as we got this. Your skin and hair will feel softer after using it. Im not sure how or if you are supposed to clean it, but i would suggest changing it every 3-6 months. Im sure the cleansing aspect of it lasts even longer than that, but over time the cloth starts to look a bit worn which is expected. We wanted something that could go on and off our bath faucet. We didnt want to deal with the hassle of installing external faucet filters and this one proved to be easy. All you do is wrap the straps around your faucet with the velcro. One strap has a rubbr grip on the underside to help keep it in place. Unfortunately our bath faucet doesnt have that little stick on top because our bathrub has no drain stopper. I saw other reviews that mention the filter wont stay on their faucet because they dont have a drain stopper. Nothing in this world is perfect. For the price and what it does, its perfect. I found that fastening it to the faucet when it is completely dry works best. Worst case scenario, use a hair tie or maybe a shoe lace to tie it in place for bath time.
body_zh: 我买这个是为了和儿子洗澡。我想要一款能让水更软、不会那么刺激的产品。我们住的地方，水会让你的皮肤干燥且瘙痒。这一切都在我们拿到这个后改变了。 使用后你的皮肤和头发会感觉更柔软。 我不确定是否应该清洗，但我建议每3-6个月更换一次。我相信它的清洁效果比这更持久，但随着时间推移，布料会显得有些磨损，这也是意料之中的。 我们想要一个能开关浴缸水龙头的设备。我们不想麻烦安装外部水龙头过滤器，这个过滤器证明很简单。你只需要用魔术贴把带子缠绕在水龙头上。其中一条背带底部有防擦夹，帮助固定。 不幸的是，我们的浴缸水龙头顶部没有那个小棒子，因为我们的浴膏没有排水塞。 我看到其他评论说过滤器不能固定在他们的水龙头上，因为他们没有排水塞。这个世界上没有什么是完美的。以价格和功能来说，它非常合适。 我发现在水龙头完全干的时候把它固定在水龙头上效果最好。最坏的情况是用发圈或者鞋带绑好，方便洗澡。

title: To the one star reviews
body: I wish you could mark reviews are not helpful because sooo many people in these comments are unaware of how water filtration works, the actual design of the bag, and to remove the plastic zip tie to optimally fit the faucet head. The bag is not ripped, it is irrelevant that the fabric is open to view the sponge. Yes it might look like you all got a sponge and rocks because you did. Look at what you order before you buy and understand it. Rocks create an area for the microbes to bind, and these microbes break down organic matter including chlorine. Rocks (certain kinds not mentioned in the claims of this product) have abilities to collect heavy metals as well. Rocks traps sediment and activated carbon also functions as a remover of chlorine. You might be best to create your own filter using various stones as well. And you are joking if you think a plastic sponge is going to get you totally compromised when most likely your laundry water travels through lead and micro plastic filled pipes, all day long. And half your clothes, rags, blankets, pillows, mattresses, come covered in these things as well. Plastic being the actual fibers used. If your complaining about plastics then you should be so strict as to never buy from Amazon all together, tagged along with its carbon footprint by shipping to your house alone. It’s about the big picture, and if you want to complain, you don’t know enough to make your own simply out of rocks alone, which would work. So either make it, research what you buy, or love the product for what it does do. Test your water levels. Find proof for yourself. As for the filter, it works when you use it correctly. Let it dry out completely to avoid mold. Hope I covered it for those that left one star reviews from their own ignorance. Making your own filter would be best because yes, I don’t know what kind of rocks are guaranteed inside but it functions as it states.
body_zh: 我希望你能标记评论没什么帮助，因为评论里很多人不了解水过滤原理、袋子的实际设计，以及如何拆除塑料扎带以最佳安装水龙头头。袋子没有撕破，布料是否打开看海绵也无关紧要。是的，看起来你们都拿了海绵和石头，因为你们确实拿到了。买之前先看看你点什么，了解它。岩石为微生物创造了一个结合空间，这些微生物分解有机物，包括氯。岩石（某些未在本产品声明中提及的类型）也具有收集重金属的能力。岩石、沉积物和活性碳也起到氯的去除作用。你最好用各种石头自己做过滤器。如果你以为塑料海绵会让你彻底被污染，那你是在开玩笑，因为你的洗衣水很可能整天都通过铅和微塑料管道流动。你一半的衣服、破布、毯子、枕头、床垫，也都被这些东西覆盖。塑料是指实际使用的纤维。如果你抱怨塑料，那你应该严格到绝对不要从亚马逊购买，尤其是亚马逊的碳足迹，只靠寄货到你家。这关乎大局，如果你想抱怨，你还不够了解，不能仅仅用石头自己做一个，而这本来是可行的。所以，要么自己动手，要么研究你买的东西，或者喜欢它本身的优点。检测水位。自己找证据。至于过滤器，只要用得对，它就能正常工作。让它完全干燥以避免发霉。希望我能帮那些因为无知而给一星评价的人说清楚。自己做过滤器最好，因为我不知道里面保证能装什么样的石头，但它的功能就是它说的那样。

title: Silky “feel” water
body: I wasn’t sure if this will fit the faucet in my kid’s bath because the we have the wider faucet and not those normal ones. It only fit when I cut the zip tie that was holding the lip together. I’m not super sure if it is really making the water quality good but I can certainly “feel” the silkiness of the bath water if that makes sense. It is made in Canada so I trust it so much more than if it is made somewhere else. Inside has a black pouf and the bottom has some sort of minerals that make the water softer. Makes me wonder if I can just buy the mix and DIY it. Maybe. I’ll have to do more research. I like that it is not made of plastic.

title: Disappointed 😔
body: My son has very sensitive skin and eczema. We live in an area with very hard water known to have excess zinc and PFAs In it. I was so excited to buy this hoping it would help with bath time and decrease the ointment and lotions we have to use for his flare ups. First use, my son developed a huge rash and hives. discontinued use and his skin rash disappeared. I thought maybe I was imagining it or it was a coincidence so I used it again and he developed the same rash. By all means, my daughter who doesn’t have skin issues loves it and says her water feels better with it. BUT my son who has derm issues did not benefit from this and actually had worsening symptoms using this product.
body_zh: 我儿子皮肤非常敏感，有湿疹。我们生活的地区水质非常硬，其中含有过量的锌和 PFA。我很高兴买了这个，希望它能帮助缩短洗澡时间，并减少我们为他的发作而必须使用的药膏和乳液。第一次使用时，我儿子出现了巨大的皮疹和荨麻疹。停止使用后，他的皮疹消失了。我想也许是我的想象或者这是一个巧合，所以我再次使用它，他出现了同样的皮疹。无论如何，我没有皮肤问题的女儿很喜欢它，并说她用它喝水感觉更好。但我有皮肤问题的儿子并没有从中受益，而且实际上使用该产品后症状恶化了。

title: Works amazing!
body: I love this bath filter. My entire family has extremely sensitive skin and we have very hard, harsh water where we live so I have been searching for a bath filter for a while. As soon as I used it the water felt softer, my skin felt better, and all of my family finally didn't break out from our water. Our skin issues include eczema and hives and the hard water would make it so much worse but with the use of the filter we have had no issues pop up. It also has a Velcro strap that goes around the faucet and allows all the water to be filtered unlike some of these ball filters where only half the water would get filtered. I would highly recommend buying this.
body_zh: 我喜欢这个浴缸过滤器。我全家的皮肤都非常敏感，而且我们住的地方的水非常坚硬、粗糙，所以我一直在寻找浴缸过滤器。我一用就感觉水更柔和了，我的皮肤感觉更好了，我的家人终于没有从我们的水里出来了。我们的皮肤问题包括湿疹和荨麻疹，硬水会使情况变得更糟，但使用过滤器后，我们没有出现任何问题。它还有一个尼龙搭扣带，围绕在水龙头周围，可以过滤所有的水，不像一些球过滤器，只有一半的水会被过滤。 我强烈推荐购买这个。

body: I could not for the life of me get this to stay on my bath faucet while the water was running. It has one measly little velcro strap and slid right off every time the water was running. I even tried to run the water at half speed and it still slid right off. I looked at the reviews of people who said it worked and they all had a little button/drain screw on the top of their faucet they were able to put the strap behind. If you have a completely flush faucet with no screw or anything to latch it behind this will NOT work. 2 stars bc I could see this maybe working if you have an additional piece of metal on your faucet like mentioned above.
body_zh: 当水流着的时候，我一辈子都无法把它留在我的浴缸水龙头上。它有一个微不足道的小尼龙搭扣带，每次水流时就会滑落。我什至尝试以半速运行水，但它仍然立即滑落。 我查看了人们的评论，他们说它有效，他们的水龙头顶部都有一个小按钮/排水螺丝，他们可以将带子放在后面。如果您有一个完全齐平的水龙头，没有螺丝或任何东西可以将其锁在后面，那么这将不起作用。 2 星 BC 我可以看到，如果你的水龙头上有一块额外的金属，就像上面提到的那样，这可能会起作用。

title: Not organic, Misleading product
body: This was advertised as using organic cotton and there’s no indication that the outer bag is actually organic at all. Furthermore it’s stuffed with a cheap plastic loofah (like the kind you can buy at Walmart for $2) and what I later found out is around a dollars worth of crushed particles at the bottom of the bag that supposedly add the minerals to the water and neutralize the chlorine. Totally overpriced for what it is bc you can buy that crushed material by the pound for way less. They tell you to toss it after a month; complete waste of resources and you’re adding plastic to your bath water. Boo. While the water “felt” softer my skin was suuuper itchy after using it so whatever cheap crushed “mineral” material they’re using is certainly low quality. I’m disappointed in myself for wasting my money and all this plastic before researching this product. Don’t make the same mistake…
body_zh: 广告上说它使用有机棉，但没有迹象表明外袋实际上是有机的。此外，它还塞满了便宜的塑料丝瓜络（就像你可以在沃尔玛花 2 美元买到的那种），后来我发现袋子底部有价值大约一美元的碎颗粒，据说可以将矿物质添加到水中并中和氯。就其本身而言，价格完全过高，因为您可以以更少的价格按磅购买粉碎的材料。他们告诉你一个月后就扔掉它；完全浪费资源，而且你还在洗澡水中添加塑料。嘘。 虽然水“感觉”更柔软，但使用后我的皮肤非常痒，所以他们使用的任何廉价的碎“矿物质”材料肯定是低质量的。 我对自己在研究这个产品之前浪费了我的钱和所有这些塑料感到失望。不要犯同样的错误...

title: Easy, effective, and not made of plastic!
title_zh: 简单、有效，而且不是塑料做的！
body: This fits in my Moen bathtub faucet, which curves and is only barely flared towards the nozzle, so that's quite an accomplishment. It does a very good job of filtering out my bath water, which is also saying something. We have extremely hard water where I live, and it seems to affect people's health, if you get me. But this filter, it actually leaves the water soft and light. I can feel the difference, I use way less soap and shampoo, and my skin doesn't break out!* The only two things keeping this from being a five star review are the flow and the smell (when it's new). The flow is a minor annoyance - water seeps out of the bag everywhere, like you'd expect, and just sort of dribbles down the tub wall and over the emergency drain before filling the tub. The smell when this thing is new is particularly bad - it has a certain "burning hair" quality, but that goes away completely after two tub fills, and it doesn't seem to bother anyone but me. For the money and the convenience, this is an excellent filter that really does its job. What's more, it's just a cotton bag with some velcro and some wire. I don't feel bad about replacing it, because I'm not throwing out a big wad of plastic every couple of months. * Just adding this for other people who are like me. I have MCAS, so my skin breaks out at the drop of a hat, or a couple drops of heavy minerals. I can't really take showers thanks to some other health issues, so if you have MCAS or mastocytosis and you're looking for a way to make your bathwater gentler without a softener system, this might work for you!
body_zh: 这能装进我的Moen浴缸水龙头，水龙头弯曲且仅微微向喷嘴张开，这算是个了不起的成就。 它过滤浴缸水效果非常好，这也说明了问题。我住的地方水质极硬，似乎影响了人们的健康，你懂我的意思吧。但这个过滤器实际上会让水变得柔软轻盈。我能感觉到差别，我用的肥皂和洗发水少了很多，皮肤也不会长痘！*唯一 让它没能成为五星好评的两个原因是流动性和气味（尤其是新发时）。水流有点小烦人——水会从袋子里到处渗出来，就像你预料的那样，然后顺着浴缸壁滴下来，越过紧急排水口，最后才注满浴缸。这台新车时的味道特别难闻——有种“烧毛”的感觉，但装了两桶后完全消失了，除了我自己，没人会介意。 以性价比和便利性来说，这是一个非常出色的滤网，真正发挥了作用。更何况，它只是一个棉袋，里面有魔术贴和铁丝。我不觉得换掉它不好意思，因为我不会每隔几个月扔一大团塑料。* 补充一下，给和我一样的人。我有MCAS，皮肤一滴重矿物质就会长痘。由于其他健康问题，我其实没法洗澡，所以如果你有MCAS或肥大细胞增多症，想在没有软水器的情况下让洗澡水更顺畅，这个方法可能适合你！

title: Should have better instructions!
body: I used this because my son has eczema and our water has a high smell of chlorine. I never took it off the faucet with in a month of using it there was mold build up! I didn’t know this and kept using it for my sons baths. Until I noticed black stains took it off turned it around and the whole thing was moldy. Ugh I was bathing my son with moldy water for weeks. So my advice use it, take off and let it air dry I guess. Was very disappointed after that!
body_zh: 我用这个是因为我儿子有湿疹，而且我们的水有很强的氯味。我从来没有把它从水龙头上取下来，使用一个月后就长出了霉菌！我不知道这一点，一直用它给我儿子洗澡。直到我发现黑色污渍把它取下来，把它翻过来，整个东西都发霉了。呃，我用发霉的水给儿子洗澡好几个星期了。所以我的建议是使用它，取下并让它风干。看完之后非常失望！

title: Does it work? Who knows
body: I found this product hard to make the most of. It was hard to keep it on my bathtub faucet, so I don’t know if it was even working and doing what it should. I honestly do not trust the filtration method either, I don’t see how the beads filter out chlorine from water. Wouldn’t all of the water need to flow through the product evenly to give it any chance of working at all? This product does not do that, at least it didn’t for me. I purchased it summer 2023, and the materials inside look nothing like the photos shown in this listing. Maybe that has changed in the past year? It grew mold due to the fabric nature. I will not be repurchasing.
body_zh: 我发现这个产品很难充分利用。很难把它放在我的浴缸水龙头上，所以我不知道它是否能正常工作并发挥应有的作用。老实说，我也不相信过滤方法，我不明白珠子如何过滤掉水中的氯。难道不是所有的水都需要均匀地流过产品才能发挥作用吗？这个产品没有做到这一点，至少对我来说没有。我在 2023 年夏天购买了它，里面的材料与此列表中显示的照片完全不同。也许这种情况在过去一年发生了变化？由于织物的性质，它会发霉。我不会回购。

I’ve noticed my skin feels a bit softer after bathing. However, I wish it had better longevity; I find myself needing to replace it more often than expected. Overall, it’s a decent product for sensitive skin, but it could use some improvements.

title: Easy to use and affordable way to have healthy bath water
title_zh: 易于使用且经济实惠的健康沐浴水方式
body: I’m not one of those people who can tell the difference between filtered and not filtered bath water, but I trust the materials in this product filter water as long as the water flows through it . This is easy to use, you just Velcro onto your bath water dispenser or whatever it’s called and make sure the opening is all the way around the opening so all water goes through the filter. You may have to turn the valve down a little so there I slightly less pressure of water. As you can tell I’m not a plumber and not familiar with the bathtub lingo, but I do know that a bath with chlorine chemical water is not that great for your body compared to a bath with clean filtered water. I love this thing for that and it’s easy to use, easy to hang to dry and makes my baths better!
body_zh: 我不是那些能区分过滤和未过滤洗澡水的人之一，但我相信该产品中的材料只要水流过它就可以过滤水。这很容易使用，您只需将尼龙搭扣固定在浴缸饮水机或其他名称上，并确保开口一直围绕开口，以便所有水都通过过滤器。您可能需要将阀门调小一点，这样水压就会稍微小一些。正如您所知，我不是水管工，也不熟悉浴缸行话，但我确实知道，与使用干净的过滤水洗澡相比，使用含氯化学水洗澡对您的身体没有那么好。我喜欢这个东西，因为它易于使用，易于悬挂晾干，让我的沐浴效果更好！

title: A wonderful result.
body: I was not expecting much from this product tbh, but I was a bit desperate . I bought it because one of my daughter's twin kitties is obsessed with bathtubs and would only drink water from the tub faucet more and more as she got older . After years of her doing this she really started looking scraggly and seemed a little off in comparison to her vibrant, very active, healthy brother. The only difference between him and her is the water they drink. Suspecting an issue, I decided to find a viable tub faucet filter that would help clean up her source of water. It's been a few weeks and the improvements in her overall health is remarkable. She's now very active, her coat looks and feels totally amazing, her eyes are clear and bright. She now looks much better than her brother. I'm convinced that it's the minerals in the bag that is making this change. I'm definitely ordering another one and may try the water myself. I was just hoping the filter would remove chlorine and contaminants. I have filtration that does that on my kitchen faucet and her sibling doesn't look as great as she does. So unexpected! It's remarkable!
body_zh: 老实说，我对这个产品并没有抱太大期望，但我有点绝望。我买它是因为我女儿的一只双胞胎小猫非常喜欢浴缸，随着年龄的增长，她只会越来越多地喝浴缸水龙头的水。经过多年的这样做，她真的开始看起来很凌乱，与她充满活力、非常活跃、健康的哥哥相比，她似乎有点不正常。他和她之间唯一的区别就是他们喝的水。怀疑有问题，我决定找到一个可行的浴缸水龙头过滤器，以帮助清理她的水源。几周过去了，她的整体健康状况有了显着的改善。她现在非常活跃，她的外套看起来和感觉都很棒，她的眼睛清澈明亮。她现在看起来比她哥哥好看多了。我确信是袋子里的矿物质造成了这种变化。我肯定会再订购一份，并且可能会亲自尝试一下水。我只是希望过滤器能够去除氯和污染物。我的厨房水龙头上有过滤装置，但她的兄弟姐妹看起来没有她那么好。太出乎意料了！太了不起了！

title: Great concept, frustrating application
title_zh: 伟大的概念，令人沮丧的应用
body: So, this is a great idea but it doesn't really work as described. I have a very basic tub faucet. When hung snuggly under the faucet, the water goes everywhere but through the filter unless you turn the pressure to a tiny stream as the hole in the top of the bag is very small. If hung loosely, the water stream doesn't meet up with the hole in the top of the bag. The only way I could make this work was to cut the top cinched part so it was opened all the way, hang it loosely and turn the pressure down. Even then, the pressure of the water pulls the bag off the faucet. 🙄 I have resorted to just swirling the bag around in the water before bathing. Not sure I get the best results that way though. Won't but again.
body_zh: 所以，这是一个好主意，但它并不像描述的那样有效。我有一个非常基本的浴缸水龙头。当紧贴地挂在水龙头下时，水会流到任何地方，但不会通过过滤器，除非你将压力变成微小的水流，因为袋子顶部的孔非常小。如果松散地悬挂，水流不会与袋子顶部的孔相遇。我能完成这项工作的唯一方法是剪掉顶部收紧的部分，使其完全打开，松散地悬挂并调低压力。即使这样，水压也会将袋子从水龙头上拉下来。 🙄 我在洗澡前只是将袋子在水中旋转。但不确定这样能得到最好的结果。不会再有一次。

title: Filters bath tub water
body: I bought two for the bath tubs in the house. Installation was very easy as the Velcro is strong and you simply adjust the length to match your faucet. I did find soaking the bag before use helps especially if your spout has a heavy flow otherwise the water will go around the bag and not through. The water quality seems better, softer even if that makes sense. Highly recommend for kids bathtubs in areas with city water.
body_zh: 我买了两个用于家里的浴缸。安装非常简单，因为魔术贴很坚固，您只需调整长度以匹配您的水龙头即可。我确实发现在使用前浸泡袋子会有所帮助，特别是如果你的喷嘴流量很大，否则水会绕过袋子而不是穿过。水质似乎更好、更软，即使这是有道理的。 强烈推荐在有城市供水的地区使用儿童浴缸。

title: Great for value!
body: Love this filter. Cost effective and efficient! Only downsides are it will slide off of your faucet if you don’t have a shower pull on it (like photo). Our other tub is a free standing tub with no shower pull and it slides off too easy so I have to hold it while the water runs and it fills up. With that you also can’t run your water on full blast because it will fill the filter too full and won’t work. So you’ll run your water around 75% speed for it to work. Neither of these things bother me too much but are worth noting. A little tape or harmless hot glue knob would help it stay on the faucet to solve that problem.
body_zh: 喜欢这个过滤器。成本效益高、效率高！唯一的缺点是，如果您没有淋浴拉头，它会从水龙头上滑落（如图所示）。我们的另一个浴缸是一个独立式浴缸，没有淋浴拉手，它很容易滑落，所以我必须在水流和水注满时握住它。这样你也不能全速运行水，因为它会使过滤器装得太满而无法工作。因此，您需要以 75% 左右的速度运行水才能发挥作用。 这两件事都不太困扰我，但值得注意。一条小胶带或无害的热熔胶旋钮可以帮助它留在水龙头上以解决这个问题。

title: Renewed my love of baths again
title_zh: 再次重新燃起我对沐浴的热爱
body: Our water is the absolute worst polluted with debris from extremely old piping. Taking baths was no longer enjoyable as I felt I was just washing in filth. After the water would drain, our tub would be black. WELL NO LONGER! We "installed" the Santevia filter and the water came out clear! I was so overjoyed, especially when noticing no more debris left in the tub. Thank you so much for making bath time enjoyable again! **One should note, if you do not have a faucet with a shower diverter attached, the bag will struggle to stay on. There's an easy adaption! Just loop the velcro through a hair tye and hang it like the picture. Works better than trying to hold it on with your hands or feet!**
body_zh: 我们的水绝对是最严重的，被极其陈旧的管道产生的碎片污染。洗澡不再令人愉快，因为我觉得我只是在污秽中洗澡。水排干后，我们的浴缸就会变黑。好吧，不再了！我们“安装”了桑特维亚过滤器，水是清澈的！我非常高兴，尤其是当注意到浴缸里没有更多的杂物时。非常感谢您让沐浴时光再次变得愉快！ **应该注意的是，如果您没有连接淋浴分流器的水龙头，袋子将很难保持打开。有一个简单的适应！只需将魔术贴穿过发带并像图片一样挂起来即可。比试图用手或脚握住它效果更好！

title: Platinum bleach blonde brittle hair coming back to life
title_zh: 铂金漂白金发脆皮头发重生
body: I bleach my hair platinum blonde ......so it is very brittle. Then I moved to an apartment complex that has very hard water which is really hard on my hair and skin. I bought this filter for the tub and I can tell a difference. I have used it for close to 2 months now and my hair has come back to life. This works!!!!!!!. I know it works because I also fill my humidifier with this filter through the tap water and the white chalky stuff on the outside of the humidifier isn't there when this filters it. It works! It's a good product
body_zh: 我将头发铂金金色漂白......所以很脆。然后，我搬到了一个非常坚硬的公寓大楼，这对我的头发和皮肤确实很难。我为浴缸买了这个过滤器，我可以分辨出差异。我已经使用了近两个月了，我的头发已经重生。这有效！！！！！我知道它的作用是因为我还通过自来水和加湿器外部的白色粉笔材料填充了加湿器，当它过滤时不存在。有用！这是一个好产品

title: Works As Needed
body: Purchased Oct 2022 Video 1, and photo now, January 2023. It’s held up fine. Water here irritates my skin. I use a shower filtration system with the hose. I wanted something to easily filter the tub faucet water into a plastic container which I place in the sink for face washes. This works! It’s definitely not a hardware style water filter. It would work for camping. It fits around faucets up to 5-6” in diameter. $15-20 would be more reasonable but it’s sturdy and the filter crystals are still working. The ‘neck’ needs to be larger so it’s more adaptable. It could easily be reconfigured with craft accessories. It’s still working good at 3+ months!
body_zh: 2022 年 10 月购买了视频 1，现在购买了照片，2023 年 1 月。效果很好。这里的水会刺激我的皮肤。我使用带有软管的淋浴过滤系统。我想要一些东西可以轻松地将浴缸水龙头的水过滤到塑料容器中，然后将其放在水槽中用于洗脸。这有效！它绝对不是硬件式滤水器。它适用于露营。它适合直径达 5-6 英寸的水龙头。15-20 美元会更合理，但它很坚固，而且过滤器晶体仍然可以工作。“颈部”需要更大，这样它的适应性更强。它可以很容易地用工艺配件重新配置。它在 3 个多月后仍然工作良好！

body: So. This works as it should. I've been using these type of things for over 7 years because of nasty water... it hangs as good as it needs to on the faucet. Don't care about the over fill as it needs to be manually dragged around once tub is full anyways for a few minutes. It seems like an extra run through getting faucet water as it comes out too.. so... works and thankful for anything to help this water we all get inundated needlessly with toxcicity. *Only update* I've used it about 5 times and the velcro is shedding little plastic bits in water.
body_zh: 所以。这应尽其所能。由于讨厌的水，我一直在使用这些类型的东西已有7年以上...悬挂在水龙头上所需的好。不要关心过度填充物，因为无论如何浴缸都饱满了几分钟，就需要手动拖动。似乎也通过水龙头出来时，这似乎是一次额外的奔跑。.因此，...努力并感谢任何帮助这种水，我们所有人都不必要地淹没了。 *仅更新*我已经使用了大约5次，而魔术贴则在水中脱落了很小的塑料钻头。

title: Builds pink serratia and doesn't last 6 months

body: This product has a great idea going for it, but the simplicity is hard to look past. A loofa with some filtration beads in a separate compartment (much like humidifier filter beads). I always cut the zip tie and use the Velcro to attach to our larger spout but water pours over and I had to use a hair elastic as well. I hang it to dry daily but the pink scum continues to dry onto the linen and create worse sensitivity in my babies skin. Wanted to like and purchased several but in the end, trashed and hopeful to find a better design.
body_zh: 这个产品有一个很好的想法，但其简单性却令人难以忽视。丝瓜络的单独隔间中装有一些过滤珠（很像加湿器过滤珠）。我总是剪断拉链并使用尼龙搭扣将其固定在我们较大的喷嘴上，但水会倒过来，我还必须使用发带。我每天都把它挂起来晾干，但粉红色的浮渣继续在亚麻布上干燥，使我宝宝的皮肤变得更敏感。想要喜欢并购买了几个，但最终被丢弃并希望找到更好的设计。

title: Does the job
body: After reading some of these reviews from the unhappy customers i started to laugh. Its funny how people make negative comments about things that they dont really understand. The filter isnt the luffa inside the bag, its the mineral stones inside that filter the water and ad minerals to it. Its worked for me my son has bad exzema and bathing in this water doesnt make his skin red like regular tap water. People need to actually read what they are buying befor talking sh!t about it.
body_zh: 在阅读了不满意客户的一些评论后，我开始大笑。 人们如何对他们并不真正理解的事情发表负面评论，这很有趣。 过滤器不是袋子里的丝瓜，而是里面的矿物石过滤水并向其中添加矿物质。 它对我有用，我儿子的湿疹很严重，在这种水中洗澡不会像普通自来水那样使他的皮肤变红。 人们在谈论它之前需要真正阅读他们正在购买的东西。

title: For what it is, IT WORKS.
body: Listen. This isn’t life changing but for 25 bucks it’s WELL worth it. Yes there is a shower puff in the bag, I’m assuming for the water to flow more evenly into the bag of mineral balls beneath it, but there is a bag of mineral balls. I can’t say for sure it’s making a difference in my skin, however I put haft the amount of usual bath soak in the tub and got TWICE the amount of bubbles. So, yeah. For 25 bucks, you really can’t go wrong. If you want totally purified water it’s going to be an easy $400 for the system and in house instal.

title: Good filter.
body: Works quite well. The loofah is most likely there to either give the bag some more body/space or to help the water disperse. Our town really does a number on chlorination and this helps immensely. There was a plastic zip tie running through the mouth of the bag, you can cut this off to make it fit (and most likely are supposed to). The "bag of beads" is the filter. My hair is much more manageable and I don't have issues with my autoimmune disease with this filter from exposure to chlorine. I recommend this product. If the water runs out the top try moving it up or down more depending on your faucet shape and also pull the cloth flap out. P.s. if some of the reviews are any indication of the intelligence of people, y'all are in trouble. Goodness.
body_zh: 效果很好。丝瓜络很可能是为了给袋子更多的身体/空间或帮助水散去。我们镇确实在氯化方面做了很多工作，这有很大帮助。包口有一条塑料扎带，你可以把它剪下来以使其适合（而且很可能应该是这样）。“珠袋”就是过滤器。我的头发更容易打理，而且我没有因为接触氯而患上这种过滤器的自身免疫性疾病。我推荐这个产品。如果水流出顶部，请尝试根据您的水龙头形状将其向上或向下移动，并将布瓣拉出。 P.s. 如果一些评论表明人们的智力，那么你们都遇到了麻烦。善良。

body: This came with another product in huge box, with not much packing. Such a waste. The item's box was damaged, but that was understandable with everything that must've been moving around in there. I used it for the first time today, and as I hung it on the tub, I noticed a thumb-sized hole in the bag. My thumb is broken, so I can't stitch it. I'm sure it's usable - I think my skin actually is softer but I didn't test the water - but I can't see it lasting long if I drag it through the water as suggested. I came back to edit this a couple weeks later. I purchase the same item from a different company, and I know what this is supposed to look like. The one I received from Amazon was torn on the outside, but also ripped apart on the inside. Both filters brought my water from 127ppm to 107ppm. The old one does nothing for my skin or hair anymore, so I'm guessing I may be out of luck with the new one. Its' too bad. I would've been nice to have a Canadian-made product regularly in the house. Both dramatically reduce the smell of chlorine though.

title: Seems to work!
body: My 2.5yrs son had a small rash under both his arms. Nothing itchy or red, just small raised/rough patches. We applied various eczema creams but didn't go too overboard because it was very mild, we just noticed after bath time. It tended to come and go. I myself felt very dry after showers, and my wife's hair was brittle. My son takes baths but we rinse all soap suds off with a shower after too. We switched to a chlorine filter shower head for my wife and I, and this bath sack thing for my son. So after all this dechlorination, the rough patches are actually gone, and my wife's hair improved and my skin doesn't get dry like it used to. Overall I'd say the concept of filtering bath and shower water is definitely possible and products such as this do produce a noticeable effect. I would rate this product highly because although my son gets a quick spritz with the shower, he spends a majority of his time submerged in the bath water. The fact that all the creams failed and his skin improved with no dietary changes seems to say using this product alone does dechlorinate bath water and does produce positive effects for sensitive skin. I give it 4 stars and not 5 because I feel it could be a more accurate and user friendly system (like a Brita filter) so you know when it's used up and when it's time to change it. It's a bit primitive but so far it's the only product available.
body_zh: 我 2.5 岁的儿子双臂下长了一个小皮疹。 没有发痒或发红，只是小的凸起/粗糙的斑块。 我们使用了各种湿疹霜，但并没有太过分，因为它非常温和，我们只是在洗澡后才注意到。 它往往来来去去。 淋浴后我自己感觉很干，而且我妻子的头发很脆。 我儿子洗澡，但我们也用淋浴冲洗掉所有肥皂泡沫。 我们为我和我的妻子换了一个氯过滤淋浴头，为我儿子换了这个浴袋。 所以在所有这些脱氯之后，粗糙的斑块实际上已经消失了，我妻子的头发得到了改善，我的皮肤也不再像以前那样干燥了。 总的来说，我会说过滤浴缸和淋浴水的概念绝对是可能的，这样的产品确实会产生明显的效果。 我会高度评价这款产品，因为虽然我儿子在淋浴时会快速喷水，但他大部分时间都泡在洗澡水里。 事实上，所有的面霜都失败了，而且他的皮肤在没有改变饮食的情况下得到了改善，这似乎表明单独使用这种产品确实可以使沐浴水脱氯，并对敏感皮肤产生积极影响。 我给它 4 星而不是 5 星，因为我觉得它可能是一个更准确和用户友好的系统（如 Brita 过滤器），所以你知道它什么时候用完，什么时候该更换它。 它有点原始，但到目前为止它是唯一可用的产品。

title: Soft, Crystal Clear Water That Smells Wonderful!!
title_zh: 柔软、晶莹剔透的水，闻起来很香！！
body: I used Santevia Organic Faucet Filter primarily for bathing. It makes the water silky soft & crystal clear ... AND it smells wonderful!! At first I used it for myself but it turned out to be great for my parrot's bath water. Parrots are very sensitive to many things in both the air & the water. Santevia is the perfect filter for his bath. Afterward he is so soft & smells so sweet. Plus, it seems to really help soften & condition his feathers when he's molting. I ordered more so I could use it too. Works great!!
body_zh: 我主要使用 Santevia 有机水龙头过滤器来洗澡。 它使水变得丝般柔软、晶莹剔透……而且闻起来很香！！ 起初我自己用它，但结果证明它非常适合我的鹦鹉洗澡水。 鹦鹉对空气和水中的许多东西都非常敏感。 Santevia 是他浴缸的完美过滤器。 之后他变得如此柔软，闻起来如此甜美。 另外，它似乎确实有助于在他换毛时软化和调理他的羽毛。 我订购了更多，这样我也可以使用它。 效果很好！

title: Love it!
body: We orignally purchased the Santevia shower head filter, due to where we live the water is fairly hard. We seen this product and had to try it out. It works amazing, I noticed the difference right away when using. Especially for our new born, its great knowing we are using filtered water for their baths. There was one fault, that was the part that is supposed to fit around the head of the faucet was slightly to small. Was an easy fix, as it is a zip tie that holds the shape of where it gose over the faucet. I cut the zip tie, added a new one to make the whole a little bigger and now it works great. Would of been nice (more user fiendly) if the whole size was adjustable via a slip not rope or came with a larger opening or velcro or somthing of that sort to adjust the size if you were to swithc faucets. Other than that... great product!
body_zh: 我们最初购买了 Santevia 淋浴喷头过滤器，因为我们住的地方水很硬。 我们看到了这个产品，不得不尝试一下。 它的效果很棒，我在使用时立即注意到了不同之处。 特别是对于我们的新生儿，很高兴知道我们正在使用过滤水为他们洗澡。 有一个错误，那就是应该安装在水龙头头部周围的部分有点小。 很容易解决，因为它是一条拉链，可以保持它在水龙头上方的形状。 我剪断了拉链，添加了一条新的以使整体更大一点，现在效果很好。 如果整个尺寸可以通过滑动而不是绳索调节，或者带有更大的开口或魔术贴或类似的东西来调整尺寸，如果你要切换水龙头，那会很好（更多用户友好）。 除此之外......很棒的产品！

title: Disappointing
body: I wanted a chlorine filter for my bath water but was disappointed in this one. It doesn’t really effectively filter water because the opening is sewn too tightly and too small to fit around the water spout so it does not stay open wide enough to catch and fill with water and filter. Disappointing. I am considering trying to cut it open. I would not buy this product again. Update... I cut what was basically a plastic tie making the opening and it is able to be used now.

Tried it for myself as well and noticed a big difference in my hair (being shinier and easier to comb). I also just read an article about how chlorine is easily absorbed into the skin and can adversely affect thyroid function. I’m now considering a shower filter too! Innovative product.

title: Excellent - For A Specific Buyer
title_zh: 优秀 - 对于特定买家
body: This filter is ideal for people who have a specific style tub faucet. In order for the filter to stay in place hanging on your tub's faucet, the faucet needs the little knob on it that you pull up to turn on the shower. That prevents the filter from sliding off the faucet under full water pressure. I love this filter compared to the Rainshower water ball I've been using the past several years because I can add bubble bath to the water with the Santevia, or use bath oil, epsom salts - any bath products I want. With the Rainshower, I couldn't use anything because the floating filter would get clogged up. But since this filter doesn't touch the water in the tub, it doesn't clog. I've seriously missed bubble baths. The only negative I've found is that the top opening is a little small for full force water. You have to really snug the velcro tight around the faucet to keep the filter in place. A significant positive is that it's ten dollars cheaper than the Rainshower replacement filter, and it's supposed to last just as long. I'm really happy with this filter.
body_zh: 该过滤器非常适合拥有特定款式浴缸水龙头的人。为了使过滤器保持悬挂在浴缸水龙头上，水龙头上需要有一个小旋钮，拉起即可打开淋浴。这可以防止过滤器在全水压下从水龙头上滑落。 与过去几年我一直使用的 Rainshower 水球相比，我更喜欢这款过滤器，因为我可以使用 Santevia 将泡泡浴添加到水中，或使用沐浴油、泻盐 - 任何我想要的沐浴产品。使用瑞雨淋浴时，我无法使用任何东西，因为浮动过滤器会被堵塞。但由于该过滤器不接触浴缸中的水，因此不会堵塞。我非常怀念泡泡浴。 我发现的唯一缺点是顶部开口对于全压力水来说有点小。您必须将尼龙搭扣牢牢固定在水龙头周围，以将过滤器固定到位。 一个显着的优点是它比 Rainshower 替换过滤器便宜十美元，而且使用寿命应该一样长。我对这个过滤器非常满意。

title: Great for sensitive skin!
body: I have already used this filter 5 to 6 times and I am quite pleased with the results! It does seem to filter chlorine and impurities because my very sensitive eczema prone skin has not been at all irritated and has been much less itchy since attaching this to my bath tub faucet. I love my warm baths this time of year as it has been rather chilly and having this filter is making it more manageable for me. If you have sensitive skin and are prone to atopic dermatitis this may be a good product for you.
body_zh: 我已经使用了这个过滤器 5 到 6 次，我对结果非常满意！ 它似乎确实过滤了氯和杂质，因为我非常敏感的易患湿疹的皮肤根本没有受到刺激，并且自从将它连接到我的浴缸水龙头后，它的瘙痒程度也降低了很多。 我喜欢每年的这个时候洗个热水澡，因为天气很冷，而且有这个过滤器让我更容易管理它。 如果您的皮肤敏感并且容易患特应性皮炎，这对您来说可能是一个很好的产品。

title: My skin is happy!
body: The water is so soft and my skin is less itchy even after 1 use. My hair is soft and curlier than usual. It is easy to use - hang from the faucet and then swirl around the water to make sure it is filtered. The only thing I don't like is, as others have commented, it is harder to filter water from the faucet when you can't control the flow rate of water from the faucet... It overwlems the little pouch and flows around it. I just swirled it in the tub to account for any water that overflowed without being filtered. I would like to test the water with a chlorine test kit to see how effective it really is UPDATE JUN 2019: I purchased this item again and the new design is SO. MUCH. BETTER. the velcro secures it to the faucet and the Faucet sits directly inside the pouch so all the water filters through. They also made the pouch out of very tight woven material, so the water flows through slow enough that I'm more confident it is all going through the filter. Love it!

title: Proven ineffective — does NOT remove chlorine (verified against RO system) — do NOT use for babies
title_zh: 已被证明无效——无法去除氯（反渗透系统已验证）——不适合婴儿使用
body: Proven ineffective — does NOT remove chlorine (verified against RO system) — do NOT use for babies I am writing this because people, especially parents, deserve accurate information. This product claims to remove “harsh chemicals” like chlorine. I tested that claim directly using multi-parameter water test strips. I tested: • Unfiltered tap water • Filtered water at normal flow • Filtered water after proper activation (2–3 minutes hot water as instructed) • Filtered water at very slow flow to increase contact time Most importantly, I also tested water from a reverse osmosis (RO) system as a control. The RO water showed zero chlorine, confirming that the test strips and method are working correctly. Across every test condition, the results were the same: • Tap water chlorine: approximately 0.5–1 ppm • Filtered water chlorine: approximately 0.5–1 ppm There was no meaningful reduction in chlorine. At the same time, total dissolved solids (PPM) increased after filtration, meaning the water contained more dissolved material after passing through the unit. Based on direct testing, this product does not remove chlorine and does not meaningfully improve the water quality in that regard. The comparison with the RO system makes this clear, as the RO water showed zero chlorine while this product showed no change. Final verdict: • Does not perform as advertised • Does not remove chlorine • Increases dissolved solids • Fails under controlled testing If you are buying this to make bath water safer for your baby, do not rely on this product. It does not do what it claims.
body_zh: 已被证明无效——无法去除氯（通过反渗透系统验证）——也不要给婴儿使用。 我写这些是因为人们，尤其是父母，应该获得准确的信息。 该产品声称能去除“刺激性化学物质”，如氯。我直接用多参数水试纸测试了这个说法。 我测试了： • 未过滤自来水 • 正常流量的过滤水 • 正确激活后的过滤水（按照指示用2-3分钟热水） • 过滤水以极慢流量延长接触时间 最重要的是，我还测试了反渗透（RO）系统的水作为对照。反渗透水显示零氯，确认试纸和方法正常工作。 在所有测试条件下，结果均为： • 自来水氯：约0.5–1 ppm • 过滤水氯：约0.5–1 ppm 氯未显著减少。 同时，过滤后总溶解固体（PPM）增加，意味着通过装置后水中含有更多溶解物质。 根据直接检测，该产品无法去除氯，也没有显著改善水质。与反渗透系统的对比表明这一点，反渗透水显示零氯，而该产品则没有变化。 最终结论： • 效果不符宣传 • 无法去除氯 • 增加溶解固体 • 在受控检测下失效 如果你购买这款产品是为了让宝宝的洗澡水更安全，请不要依赖此产品。它并没有做到它所声称的那样。

title: Easy-to-Install Bath Filter That Really Improves Water Quality
title_zh: 易于安装的浴缸过滤器，真正改善水质
body: The Beati Faucet Bath Filter for Tub has been great for improving the quality of our bath water. Installation was simple, and it fits standard faucets without any issues. The filter noticeably reduces chlorine and other impurities, making baths feel gentler on the skin and hair. It’s compact and doesn’t get in the way while filling the tub. Replacing the filter is straightforward, and it feels well built overall. For anyone who wants cleaner, softer water for baths, this filter is a solid choice. Pros: • Easy to install • Reduces chlorine and impurities • Compact design that doesn’t interfere with use • Easy to replace filters • Improves skin and hair feel after baths Cons: • Filters need regular replacement • Slightly reduces water flow, but not drastically Overall, this bath filter works exactly as advertised and makes a noticeable difference in water quality. Simple, effective, and worth it for anyone concerned about bath water purity.
body_zh: Beati浴缸用水龙头浴缸过滤器对提升浴缸水质非常有帮助。安装很简单，能顺利安装标准水龙头。过滤器明显减少氯和其他杂质，使洗澡对皮肤和头发更为温和。 它很紧凑，装水时不会妨碍。更换滤网很简单，整体感觉做工也不错。对于想要更清洁、更柔软的洗澡水的人来说，这款过滤器是一个稳妥的选择。 优点： • 安装简便 • 减少氯和杂质 • 紧凑设计，不干扰使用 • 易于更换滤网 • 改善洗澡后的皮肤和头发手感 缺点： • 滤网需定期更换 • 水流略有减少，但不算大幅减少 总体来说，这款浴滤器工作如宣传般有效，水质有明显改善。简单、有效，对于关心浴缸水纯净度的人来说非常值得。

title: Not worth
body: Unfortunately, I was quite disappointed with its performance. I didn’t notice any significant difference in the water quality or in the way it affected my skin, hair, and nails. The filter seemed to barely remove chlorine or other contaminants as advertised. Additionally, I found the installation process to be confusing and not as straightforward as promised. Overall, I expected better results for the price I paid. I wouldn’t recommend this product to others looking for a reliable bath water filter.
body_zh: 不幸的是，我对它的性能感到非常失望。我没有注意到水质或它影响我的皮肤、头发和指甲的方式有任何显着差异。过滤器似乎几乎无法去除广告宣传的氯或其他污染物。此外，我发现安装过程令人困惑，并且不像承诺的那么简单。总的来说，我期望我支付的价格会有更好的结果。我不会向其他寻找可靠沐浴水过滤器的人推荐这款产品。

title: Don’t buy it!
body: This is only getting one star because I can’t figure out how to give zero stars. We tested the tap water out of the tub faucet and then the filtered water after install. We took the samples to our local pool shop to get tested. The print out shows that there was absolutely NO difference between any of the chemicals from either sample. This does not work. Do not buy!
body_zh: 这只得到一颗星，因为我不知道如何给零颗星。 我们测试了浴缸水龙头中的自来水，然后在安装后测试了过滤后的水。 我们将样本带到当地的泳池商店进行检测。 打印出来的显示，两个样品中的任何化学物质之间绝对没有差异。 这不起作用。 不要买！

title: I'm beyond impressed with this water filter!

body: It's like having a spa experience in my own home. The water feels incredibly soft and luxurious, and I've noticed a remarkable difference in how my skin and hair look and feel. Installing it was a breeze, and the results have been nothing short of amazing.

title: I cannot recommend this bathtub water filter enough!

body: It has transformed my bathing routine completely. The water feels so much gentler on my skin, and I've noticed a significant improvement in its condition. No more dryness or irritation after baths! Plus, the fact that it removes contaminants like chlorine and fluoride is a huge bonus.
body_zh: 它彻底改变了我的洗澡习惯。水对我的皮肤感觉温和多了，我注意到它的状况有了显着改善。沐浴后不再干燥或刺激！此外，它可以去除氯和氟化物等污染物，这是一个巨大的好处。

title: Clean water with ease.
body: Just as described and more. This is a must have and more. It works great. Makes a big difference. Light and durable. Easy to assemble and install. title: Great bath filter works
body: I really appreciate how this bath filter has made the water feel noticeably softer during my evening baths at home. After installing it, my skin feels calmer and less dry, which makes a relaxing bath even better. The filter is simple to set up and fits perfectly in our existing system. I also noticed my daughter’s skin doesn’t get as irritated after bathing, which is a big relief for us. It's been handy for improving the water quality without any fuss, especially since we have hard water that usually leaves a rough feeling. Using this bath filter has definitely made my routine more enjoyable and gentle on the skin.
body_zh: 我非常感激这款浴缸过滤器让我在家晚上泡澡时水质明显变软。装上后，我的皮肤感觉更平静、不那么干燥，这让放松的沐浴更加舒适。过滤器设置简单，非常适合我们现有的系统。我还注意到女儿洗澡后皮肤不再那么刺激，这对我们来说是很大的安慰。这对改善水质非常方便，尤其是我们这里的水质硬，通常会让人感觉粗糙。使用这款浴洁滤确实让我的护肤程序更加愉快且温和。

title: Bath filter helps skin
body: I started using this bath filter about a month ago and have noticed that the water feels much softer, which has been great for my skin. After long days at work, taking a bath with filtered water helps me relax without the usual dryness and tight feeling. The filter does a good job removing chlorine, and my skin no longer feels itchy afterwards. I also tried washing my hair with the filtered water, and it feels smoother and easier to manage. Setting it up was simple, and it fits well in my bathtub without any leaks. It’s been handy to have something that improves the bathwater quality, especially since I live in an area with hard water. I’m glad I gave this a try because it definitely makes a difference during my nighttime routine. So far, I’m pleased with how gentle the water is on my skin and hair.
body_zh: 我大约一个月前开始用这个浴滤，发现水质感觉更柔软，这对我的皮肤非常好。工作一天后，用过滤水泡澡能让我放松，避免了平时的干燥和紧绷感。过滤器很好地去除了氯，之后我的皮肤也不再痒了。我也试过用过滤水洗头，感觉更顺滑、更好打理。安装很简单，而且能很好地放进我的浴缸里，没有漏水。有个能改善洗澡水质的东西真的很方便，尤其是我住的地方水质硬。我很高兴尝试了这个，因为它确实对我的夜间护肤程序有很大帮助。到目前为止，我对水对皮肤和头发的温和感到满意。

title: Slow but effective.
body: I can not complain about this device due to the things it claims to filter from the water and the low price. Just be aware that it is a slow process to fill a standard tub 3/4. This will require 30+ minutes. Still, you will get a clean bath. I also fill my plant watering vessel under it to give my plants clean water since chlorine kills needed microbes in their soil.

title: Love the bath filter
body: Finding this bath filter has really improved my bathing experience. The water in our area is quite hard, and I always noticed it drying out my skin and sometimes causing itching. Since installing the filter, the water feels noticeably softer, and the strong chlorine smell has reduced a lot. I especially like how my skin feels much better afterward, and even my kids seem to enjoy bath time more now. It’s handy to have something like this that tackles the water quality directly without any complicated setup. I use it every day and can already tell the difference at home. If you have hard water issues, this filter could be a helpful addition to your bathroom. It’s working well for us and makes normal showers a bit nicer.
body_zh: 找到这个浴缸过滤器真的改善了我的洗澡体验。我们这边的水比较硬，我总觉得它会让皮肤变干，有时还会发痒。自从安装了过滤器后，水质明显变软了，浓重的氯味也大大减少了。我尤其喜欢洗完澡后皮肤感觉好多了，甚至我的孩子们现在似乎也更喜欢洗澡了。有这样一个直接解决水质问题、无需复杂设置的设备非常方便。我每天都用，回家后就能分辨出来。如果你有硬水问题，这个过滤器可以作为浴室的有用补充。这对我们来说效果不错，也让普通淋浴更舒服一些。

title: Great bath filter
body: I have been using this bath filter during my evening routine, and I’m really satisfied with the difference it makes. The water definitely feels softer and gentler, which has been great for relieving dryness and irritation on my skin after showers. I noticed my hair feels smoother and healthier too, which is a nice bonus. Installation was quick and easy, taking only a few minutes with no tools required, so I could start using it right away. The filter seems durable, sturdy and well-built, and I appreciate that it’s designed for high water flow and long service life before needing a replacement. Using it at home has made my baths more relaxing, with water that smells fresher and less harsh. It’s a practical and effective addition to help improve everyday water quality, especially if your skin tends to get dry easily.

title: Love this bath filter
body: Starting to use this bath filter has made a noticeable difference in how soft the water feels during my showers at home. The installation was straightforward, and I appreciate how quickly it started working without any fuss. Living in an area with hard water, I often experienced dryness and irritation after bathing, but now my skin feels calmer and less itchy. title: Works great for softer bath water
title_zh: 用在较软的浴水里效果很好
body: Mainly bought this bath filter because our water is pretty hard and my skin often feels tight after a bath, which really affected my daily **skin care** routine. I've been using it for a couple of weeks now, and honestly, my skin feels a lot smoother and less dry. Installation was super easy—just snapped onto the faucet without any tools, which was perfect since I’m not super handy. The water flow hasn’t slowed down at all, so soaking in the tub is still relaxing without waiting forever. I also noticed that my hair feels cleaner and not weighed down like before, which is nice. Plus, the filter looks neat and doesn’t take up much space on the tub faucet. I’ve used it mostly during evening baths after work to wind down, and it’s been a nice little upgrade to my self-care and skin care routine. Kind of cool how it removes the chlorine and other stuff that can be harsh on your skin and scalp, making every bath a gentle treat for your skin care needs. Glad I gave it a shot. It’s been helpful for making bath time more pleasant and supporting healthier, softer skin.
body_zh: 我主要买这个浴滤是因为我们的水比较硬，洗完澡后皮肤经常感觉紧绷，这严重影响了我每天的**护肤*习惯。我已经用了几个星期了，说实话，我的皮肤感觉更光滑，也不那么干燥。安装非常简单——直接卡在水龙头上，不用任何工具，这很合适，因为我手艺不算特别好。水流一点都没减缓，泡澡依然很放松，不用等太久。我还注意到头发感觉更干净，不像以前那样沉重，这感觉很好。而且过滤器看起来很整洁，而且不占浴缸水龙头太多空间。我大多在下班后的晚上泡澡时用它放松，这对我的自我护理和护肤程序来说是个不错的小升级。它能去除氯和其他对皮肤和头皮有害物质，让每次洗澡都像是对护肤需求的温和享受。很高兴我试了一下。它有助于让洗澡时间更愉快，并支持更健康、更柔软的皮肤。

title: Great addition to my bath routine
title_zh: 对我的日常沐浴来说是一个很好的补充
body: This bathtub water filter has made a noticeable difference in my baths. I appreciate how quickly I noticed the water felt softer after just one use, and it’s comforting knowing it doesn’t contain BPA. The installation was straightforward, which is a big plus for someone like me who isn’t super handy. What makes it even more effective is that the filter ball is packed with KDF55, a powerful material that effectively absorbs and reduces harmful impurities in the water. I’ve also found that my skin feels less dry and irritated after bathing, which is a huge improvement. It’s reassuring to have cleaner water just from a simple change.
body_zh: 这款浴缸滤水器给我的浴缸带来了显着的变化。我很感激我很快就发现水在使用一次后就感觉更柔软了，而且知道它不含 BPA 也很令人欣慰。安装很简单，这对于像我这样不太方便的人来说是一个很大的优势。 更有效的是，滤球填充有KDF55，这是一种强大的材料，可以有效吸收和减少水中的有害杂质。我还发现沐浴后我的皮肤不再那么干燥和刺激，这是一个巨大的改善。只需进行简单的改变即可获得更清洁的水，这令人放心。

title: Good water softer filter
body: I recently installed this water softener bath filter at home to help with the hard water from our well. The change is clear, especially in the way my skin feels—no more dryness or itchiness, which is a big relief. With its KDF55 filtration, it removes many impurities while effectively softening the water and has even helped soothe my infant's eczema—making bath time much gentler and safer. I use it mostly in the bathroom, and it’s been easy to attach with the fittings it came with, even on a slightly odd faucet we have. The water feels smoother when showering, and I’ve noticed less buildup in the tub which makes cleaning easier too. It’s a practical solution that works well without needing complicated setup or constant maintenance. I’m glad I gave it a try and can tell the difference every day.
body_zh: 我最近在家里安装了这款软水器浴缸过滤器，以帮助处理井中的硬水。这种变化是显而易见的，尤其是我的皮肤感觉——不再干燥或发痒，这是一个很大的缓解。凭借 KDF55 过滤功能，它可以去除许多杂质，同时有效软化水，甚至有助于舒缓婴儿的湿疹，让沐浴时间更加温和、安全。我主要在浴室中使用它，即使在我们拥有的稍微奇怪的水龙头上，也很容易用它附带的配件连接。淋浴时水感觉更顺畅，而且我注意到浴缸中的积垢更少，这也使清洁变得更容易。这是一种实用的解决方案，无需复杂的设置或持续的维护即可运行良好。我很高兴我尝试过，并且每天都能分辨出不同之处。

title: Good bath filter
body: Definitely glad I grabbed this bath filter. I’ve been using it at home, and it really helps keep the water clean and soft. Installation was easy too, which is always a plus. Works well for daily use. Also, the cartridge should be replaced every 180 days for optimal performance, or whenever you notice the water flow slowing down. It filters up to 3,000 gallons before needing a replacement.
body_zh: 我非常高兴我抓住了这个浴缸过滤器。我一直在家里使用它，它确实有助于保持水的清洁和柔软。安装也很容易，这总是一个优点。适合日常使用。此外，应每 180 天更换一次滤芯，以获得最佳性能，或者在您发现水流变慢时更换一次。在需要更换之前，它可以过滤多达 3,000 加仑的水。

title: Gentle Water for Kids’ Bath Time
title_zh: 适合儿童洗澡的温和水
body: We added this bath filter mainly for our children’s bath time, and it’s been a good decision. The water feels noticeably milder, which helps a lot since their skin is sensitive. I can tell it does a good job catching small particles in the water, and the flow stays consistent without slowing things down. Bath time has been smoother overall, and I feel more comfortable knowing the water is being filtered. So far, it’s been reliable and easy to use. A quick note for maintenance: the filter is designed to be replaced every 120 days (or after filtering about 3,000 gallons) to keep it working at its best. When it’s time, replacement cartridges are easy to find—just search for ASIN B0DC43Z568 in the manufacturer’s store.
body_zh: 我们添加这个浴缸过滤器主要是为了孩子们洗澡的时候，这是一个很好的决定。水感觉明显温和，这对他们的皮肤敏感很有帮助。我可以说它在捕捉水中的小颗粒方面做得很好，并且水流保持一致而不会减慢速度。总体而言，洗澡时间更加顺畅，而且知道水经过过滤后我感觉更舒服。到目前为止，它是可靠且易于使用的。维护快速说明：过滤器设计为每 120 天（或过滤约 3,000 加仑后）更换一次，以保持其最佳工作状态。当需要时，可以轻松找到替换墨盒 - 只需在制造商商店中搜索 ASIN B0DC43Z568 即可。

After just a few uses, I can tell the water feels softer and gentler on my skin. It’s really handy for making my bath time more relaxing without worrying about harsh chemicals. I’m glad I decided to try it out. It’s simple to install and works well at removing chlorine and other impurities. If you’re looking for a way to improve your bath experience and protect your skin, this filter might be just what you need.

title: Works great for bath filter
title_zh: 用来过滤浴缸时效果很好
body: One of the things I appreciate most about this bath filter for the tub is how simple it was to install. I used it at home to improve the water quality in my shower, and the difference is noticeable right away. The filter fits perfectly on the tub, and it doesn’t interfere with water flow at all. It’s handy to have something that can help reduce chlorine and impurities without needing complicated setup. The price was reasonable, especially considering the quick shipping. Using it during my daily routine has been really convenient and helps my skin feel less dry after showers. What's even better is how easy it is to replace the cartridge—just unscrew the cap, swap the old one out, and put the new one in. The whole thing takes about a minute, no tools needed. Customers say it’s totally intuitive. Glad I found a dependable option for this purpose.

title: Works great for eczema bath filter

body: I decided to try this bath filter for my kid’s eczema, and it’s been super helpful. before, her skin would get all red and irritated after bath time, but now she comes out with no redness at all. it’s a nice change because baths are so much more relaxing for her and less stressful for me. the water also looks clearer than before, which is a good sign. i just leave the filter in the tub and don’t have to worry about chemicals irritating her skin. really glad i found this little addition to our routine. it’s been handy at making bath time easier and more comfortable for both of us.

title: Love how this bath filter works
title_zh: 喜欢这个浴缸过滤器的工作原理
body: When I started using this hard water filter for bathtub at home, I noticed a clear difference immediately. My skin, which felt dry and itchy for months due to hard water, started to feel softer and less irritated after just a few days. Installation was pretty straightforward with no leaks after a quick adjustment. Even my hair feels softer and shinier without needing extra conditioner. It’s nice to finally enjoy long, comfortable showers without worrying about my skin acting up. Changing the filter regularly seems important to keep it working well, so I made a note to swap it out every few months. This has become a helpful addition to my routine.

title: Joyful bath upgrade
body: Using this bath filter during my evening routines has been a nice change. The water feels noticeably softer, turning into gentle, conditioned soft water that makes giving my daughter her bath much easier and less irritating to her skin—I’ve also noticed it helps gently soothe and calm her occasional eczema, which is a real relief. I especially appreciate how simple it was to install — I didn’t need any tools, and it stayed securely attached. Plus, I don’t have to think about replacing it often, which is convenient. It’s a small addition that makes a big difference, especially when dealing with hard water in the house. I’m glad I decided to try it out; it really has added a touch of comfort and care to our daily bathing.
body_zh: 在我晚上的日常生活中使用这个沐浴过滤器是一个很好的改变。水感觉明显更柔软，变成温和的、经过调节的软水，这让我女儿洗澡更容易，对皮肤的刺激也更少——我还注意到它有助于温和地舒缓和镇静她偶尔出现的湿疹，这真是一种缓解。我特别欣赏它的安装如此简单——我不需要任何工具，而且它保持牢固连接。另外，我不用考虑经常更换它，这很方便。这是一个很小的添加，但会带来很大的不同，尤其是在处理房子里的硬水时。我很高兴我决定尝试一下；它确实为我们的日常沐浴增添了一丝舒适和呵护。

title: Water softer works well
body: Every time I use it at home, I love the clear, sweet-smelling water it produces, especially in the shower. Although the sedimentation pad needs to be replaced more frequently than the main filter, it's easy to replace and maintains stable water pressure. I found the included silicone faucet ring to make installation quick and easy, which is very practical for a less tech-savvy user like myself. It's perfect for everyday use, and I can clearly feel the improvement in water quality. I'm so glad I chose this water softening system; it has made the water quality in my home much better.

body: I've been using this bath filter for a few weeks now and I really like how gentle it feels on my skin. The water feels softer and cleaner, which makes my baths more relaxing after busy workdays. I noticed my skin has become less dry and rough, especially on my arms and legs, which used to get irritated easily. I've also learned that it can help alleviate eczema in infants and young children, making bath time safer and gentler for little ones. It’s been a small change that makes a big difference when I need to unwind at the end of the day. I appreciate how easy it is to install and how nice the water smells afterward. I can tell it’s helping improve my skin’s overall health without any complicated routines. For anyone wanting a simple upgrade to their bathing experience, this bathtub filter is quite handy.

title: Love this bath filter
body: Coming home from a long day at work, I’ve really enjoyed using this bathtub water filter in my nightly routine. It’s straightforward to install and fits my standard shower setup without any hassle — a perfect bath filter for the tub. The water feels softer and cleaner, which makes my skin less dry and more comfortable, almost like a pre-Valentine's treat to get ready for the season. I noticed a nice reduction in chlorine smell too, which was a pleasant surprise. The filter cartridge lasts for weeks, so I don’t have to worry about frequent replacements. It’s handy during my evening wind-down, and I feel more relaxed stepping out of the shower. Definitely glad I gave this a try. It’s a simple addition but makes a useful difference in my daily self-care. Great for anyone who spends a lot of time in the bath or shower — and honestly, it feels like a little gift to myself this Valentine's.

title: Softer Water, Better Nightly Baths
title_zh: 更软的水，更好的夜间沐浴
body: I recently installed this 10-stage bath filter, and I’m really glad I did. Using it during my nightly baths at home has made a noticeable difference in water quality. It feels like the water is softer and more refreshing on my skin. Setting it up was straightforward, with clear instructions and a secure fit that stayed in place without any leaks. I noticed the filter does a good job of reducing chlorine and impurities — it seems to be enriched with KDF55 to effectively adsorb harmful substances, which is especially nice for someone like me with sensitive skin. It has definitely added a little extra comfort to my routine. Plus, it feels sturdy and well-made. If you spend time soaking in the tub to unwind after work, this filter could be a helpful addition. It’s a small change that’s brought some real comfort.
body_zh: 我最近安装了这个 10 级浴缸过滤器，我真的很高兴我这么做了。我每晚在家洗澡时使用它对水质产生了明显的影响。感觉水更柔软，皮肤更清爽。设置非常简单，有明确的说明，并且牢固地固定在适当的位置，没有任何泄漏。我注意到这个过滤器在减少氯和杂质方面做得很好——它似乎富含KDF55，可以有效吸附有害物质，这对于像我这样皮肤敏感的人来说尤其好。它确实为我的日常生活增添了一点额外的舒适感。另外，它感觉坚固且做工精良。如果您下班后花时间泡在浴缸里放松一下，这个过滤器可能是一个有用的补充。这是一个小小的改变，却带来了一些真正的安慰。

title: Works great as water softer
body: The water softener bath filter I installed in my bathroom has made a noticeable difference. Using it daily at home, I've found that my skin feels much smoother after showers, and my hair no longer feels dry or frizzy. Thanks to the KDF55 media inside, it effectively softens water while helping to relieve skin irritation—I’ve even noticed it gentle enough to soothe and help prevent eczema in infants, which brings real peace of mind. The water definitely feels softer, which makes bathing more comfortable overall. It was easy to set up, with straightforward instructions, and maintenance is simple because the cartridge replacement doesn’t take much time. It’s great to have water that’s gentler on my skin, especially since city water here tends to have a higher chlorine content. I'm glad I made the switch.
body_zh: 我在浴室安装的软水器浴缸过滤器产生了显着的变化。每天在家使用它，我发现淋浴后我的皮肤感觉更加光滑，我的头发也不再感觉干燥或卷曲。得益于内部的 KDF55 介质，它可以有效软化水，同时有助于缓解皮肤刺激 - 我什至注意到它足够温和，可以舒缓并帮助预防婴儿湿疹，这带来真正的安心。水确实感觉更柔和，这使得整体沐浴更舒适。它的设置很容易，说明简单明了，而且维护也很简单，因为更换墨盒不需要太多时间。拥有对皮肤更温和的水真是太好了，特别是因为这里的城市水往往含有较高的氯含量。我很高兴我做出了转变。

title: Finally, a filter that actually works well at home
title_zh: 终于找到了一个在家里真正有效的过滤器
body: I've been using this bath filter for a few weeks now, mainly during my evening showers after long workdays. It’s been nice knowing the water I’m rinsing off with is a little cleaner. The fit on the spout is snug and secure, which is a relief because I’ve experienced other products that drip or slip off easily. While I haven't tested the filters with water testing kits, I can say there’s no odd smell coming from the water, and I haven't noticed any skin irritation. It filters water a bit slower than I initially expected, but it still keeps pace enough not to cause any inconvenience. For someone like me who cares about small details — comfort, skin health, and water quality — this is a handy little product. It’s straightforward to install and fits nicely over my kitchen faucet when I rinse produce or do quick cleaning. If you're contemplating trying it out, I’d say give it a shot. It works just fine for what I need.
body_zh: 我已经用这个浴缸过滤器几周了，主要是在长时间工作后的晚上淋浴时使用。知道冲洗的水更干净，感觉很不错。嘴口贴合又牢固，这让我松了口气，因为我之前遇到过其他产品容易滴落或滑落的情况。虽然我没用水质检测套件测试过过滤器，但我可以说水里没有奇怪的气味，也没注意到皮肤刺激。它的过滤速度比我最初预期的慢一些，但仍然足够保持速度，不会带来任何不便。对于像我这样注重细节——舒适、皮肤健康和水质——的人来说，这是一个非常实用的小产品。安装起来很简单，冲洗蔬果或快速清洁时，它能很好地放在厨房水龙头上。如果你考虑试试，我建议你试试看。它对我的需求来说完全没问题。
