The texture is softer, smoother, and no longer frizzy or porous, even after coloring. My hair feels stronger, more elastic, and my skin is less irritated, soaking up lotion like never before. This filter truly transforms bath water into a spa-like experience. Highly recommend for anyone wanting healthier hair and skin!

title: The Best Filter, But Limited Water Improvement

body: This filter is definitely better than our previous one, and it’s made a noticeable difference for our toddler with sensitive skin, which is a huge plus. However, I was hoping for softer water and a reduction in chlorine smell, but unfortunately, I haven’t noticed much difference in those areas. Bathing still leaves our skin feeling itchy, and the water quality isn’t significantly improved. title: Soft & Refreshing Bath Filter
title_zh: 柔软且令人耳目一新的浴室过滤器
body: The bath ball filter has truly transformed my bathing routine into a more luxurious experience. From the very first use, I noticed how much cleaner and fresher the water felt, and it’s made a noticeable difference in the softness of my skin. It’s especially wonderful for my little ones—after using it, their skin feels less dry and irritated, and their hair washes more smoothly. The filter is easy to install and doesn’t take up much space, making it convenient to use regularly. I appreciate knowing it effectively reduces impurities and harshness in the water, resulting in a more enjoyable bath for the whole family. The overall experience is fantastic, and I highly recommend it to anyone wanting softer skin and a more refreshing bath.

title: My Hair Has Never Been Softer
title_zh: 我的头发从来没有柔软
body: Living in an area with notoriously hard water, my showerhead was constantly clogging with scale, and my hair felt like straw. Enter this filter! The water pressure remains strong, which I was worried about, but it feels silkier. The biggest shock? My hair! After a month, the difference is incredible. It's softer, shinier, and tangles way less. I also notice less soap scum building up on my shower walls. Filtering out those harsh minerals makes a world of difference. Highly recommend for hard water woes!

The most immediate thing I noticed was the smell – that faint chlorine odor is completely gone, replaced with just clean, fresh water. The feel is dramatically better too; it's softer and just more pleasant on the skin. My wife says her skin feels less tight after showering. An easy recommendation for anyone wanting better water quality without breaking the bank.

Tested with reagents: residual chlorine decreased from 1.5ppm to 0.2ppm, and the TDS value of the water quality actually decreased by 30%. The monthly cost is only $3, which is much more realistic than buying bottled water to take a shower.

title: Life-Changing – Cleared My Son’s Eczema!
title_zh: 改变生活 - 清除了我儿子的湿疹！
body: I rarely write reviews, but I feel compelled to share my experience with this water filter. My 7 month old son was struggling with eczema —itchy, red rough patches on his arms, tummy and face. I tried everything: prescription creams, diet changes, and even allergy tests, but nothing worked. After reading that hard water and chlorine can aggravate eczema, I decided to try this water filter. I installed it (super easy process, took less than 1 minute), and I noticed a difference within a week. His skin was less itchy and red after showers, and within a month, his eczema flare-ups had significantly reduced. For the price, functionality and durability, his skin is smooth and almost completely clear and no flare-ups now 2 months in!
body_zh: 我很少写评论，但我不得不与这种滤水器分享我的经验。我7个月大的儿子在湿疹中挣扎 - 牢牢地扎在他的手臂上，肚子和脸上。我尝试了所有事情：处方面霜，饮食变化甚至过敏测试，但没有任何效果。 在阅读了硬水和氯会加剧湿疹之后，我决定尝试使用这种滤液过滤器。我安装了它（超级简单的过程，花了不到1分钟），并且我注意到一周之内有所不同。淋浴后，他的皮肤不太发痒和红色，在一个月内，他的湿疹爆发大大降低了。对于价格，功能和耐用性，他的皮肤光滑且几乎完全透明，现在没有2个月的爆发！

title: My Hair Has Never Been Softer
title_zh: 我的头发从来没有柔软
body: Living in an area with notoriously hard water, my showerhead was constantly clogging with scale, and my hair felt like straw. Enter this filter! The water pressure remains strong, which I was worried about, but it feels silkier. The biggest shock? My hair! After a month, the difference is incredible. It's softer, shinier, and tangles way less. I also notice less soap scum building up on my shower walls. Filtering out those harsh minerals makes a world of difference. Highly recommend for hard water woes!
body_zh: 我的淋浴头居住在一个有臭名昭著的硬水的地区，不断地缩放着鳞片，我的头发感觉像稻草。输入此过滤器！我担心的水压仍然很大，但感觉更柔软。最大的震惊？我的头发！一个月后，差异令人难以置信。柔软，亮，缠结的方式更少。我还注意到在淋浴墙上积聚了少量的肥皂浮渣。滤除那些苛刻的矿物质会有不同的世界。强烈推荐硬性水灾！

The rotating buckle design is compatible with my old-fashioned faucet and can be installed in 3 seconds. Tested with reagents: residual chlorine decreased from 1.5ppm to 0.2ppm, and the TDS value of the water quality actually decreased by 30%. The monthly cost is only $3, which is much more realistic than buying bottled water to take a shower.

title: Transform Your Bathing Experience with Bath Ball Filter
title_zh: 用浴球过滤器改变沐浴体验
body: Indulge in a luxurious bathing experience with the Bath Ball Filter that has revolutionized my daily routine. Dealing with harsh water conditions in my area, I struggled with irritated and dry skin until I discovered this game-changing product. Now, thanks to the sleek and modern design of this bath filter, I enjoy water that is soft, gentle, and devoid of any unpleasant odors. The quick and tool-free installation process was a breeze, seamlessly blending into my bathroom's aesthetic with its neutral and stylish appearance. Not only does my skin feel noticeably healthier and more balanced, but every bath I take with the filtered water feels like a rejuvenating spa-like treat. I absolutely love how this simple addition has elevated my bathing ritual to new heights. If you're looking to enhance your bathing experience with a healthier touch, I highly recommend incorporating the Bath Ball Filter into your routine. Say goodbye to skin irritations and hello to refreshing baths every time!
body_zh: 通过浴缸过滤器沉迷于豪华的沐浴体验，这彻底改变了我的日常工作。在处理我所在地区严酷的水状况时，我一直在刺激性干燥的皮肤上挣扎，直到发现这种改变游戏规则的产品。现在，由于这个浴缸过滤器的时尚而现代的设计，我喜欢柔软，温和且没有任何令人不愉快的气味的水。快速且无工具的安装过程轻而易举，无缝地融入我的浴室的美感中，外观中性，时尚。我的皮肤不仅感觉更健康，更平衡，而且我用过滤水的每个浴缸都感觉像是一种恢复活力的水疗中心。我绝对喜欢这种简单的补充如何将我的沐浴仪式提升到新的高度。如果您希望通过更健康的触摸来增强沐浴体验，我强烈建议将浴球过滤器纳入常规。告别皮肤刺激性，并打招呼，每次都在洗澡！

title: Almost gave up on it, glad I didn’t.
title_zh: 差点就放弃了，庆幸没有。
body: When I first hooked this up, I was this close to chucking it in the trash. Every time I turned on the water, it would overflow like a tiny geyser—clearly the filter couldn’t keep up with the water pressure. Not ideal when you’re trying to prep a bath for a baby who already has opinions. But I decided to give it a few more chances (okay, like 10+), and surprise—over time the filter adjusted, and now it works like a charm. No more mini waterfalls out the sides, just clean, filtered water for my little one’s bath. If you need something that works perfectly out of the box, this might not be it. But if you’ve already bought it and you’re frustrated—don’t give up just yet. A little patience goes a long way, and it might just end up doing exactly what you need.
body_zh: 当我第一次把它连接起来时，我差点把它扔进垃圾桶。每次我打开水时，它都会像一个小间歇泉一样溢出——显然过滤器无法跟上水压。当你试图为已经有意见的婴儿准备洗澡时，这并不理想。 但我决定再给它几次机会（好吧，比如 10+），令人惊讶的是——随着时间的推移，过滤器进行了调整，现在它就像一个魅力。两侧不再有迷你瀑布，只有干净的过滤水供我的孩子洗澡。 如果您需要开箱即用的完美产品，那么这可能不是您的选择。但如果您已经购买了它并且感到沮丧，请不要放弃。一点点耐心会有很大帮助，它最终可能会完全满足您的需要。

title: Effective and easy tub filter
body: This bath ball filter is easy to install and hangs conveniently over the tub faucet. After a couple of months using it in our hard water home, we’ve noticed a positive difference in water quality. It’s important not to run the faucet at full speed to ensure proper filtration. While it hasn’t completely resolved skin issues, the product’s good quality and effectiveness make it a smart choice for anyone concerned about contaminated water. We bought extra replacement filters to maintain performance and highly recommend giving this a try for healthier bath water.
body_zh: 该浴球过滤器易于安装，并方便地悬挂在浴缸水龙头上。在我们的硬水家中使用了几个月后，我们注意到水质的积极差异。重要的是不要全速运行水龙头以确保适当的过滤。虽然还没有完全解决皮肤问题，但该产品的质量和有效性使其成为任何关注受污染水的人的明智选择。我们购买了额外的替换过滤器来保持性能，并强烈建议您尝试更健康的浴水。

title: Simple, chlorine-free bathing
body: We have one installed on every bath in our home, and the difference it makes is truly amazing. The water is noticeably filterd and free from chlorine, which gives it a fresh, clean scent. After using it, my skin feels incredibly soft, clean, and refreshed every time. It’s perfect for anyone dealing with hard water, as it transforms the water into something much gentler and more soothing. It’s genuinely a must-have for every household!
body_zh: 我们家里的每个浴缸都安装了一个，它带来的不同确实令人惊叹。水经过明显过滤且不含氯，这赋予其清新、干净的香味。使用后，我的皮肤每次都感觉非常柔软、干净和清爽。它非常适合任何处理硬水的人，因为它可以将水变成更温和、更舒缓的东西。这确实是每个家庭的必备品！

title: Love it, works perfectly

title: Game changer for my bath girlies
title_zh: 我的沐浴女孩的游戏规则改变者
body: I’ve lived in a city my whole life- specifically in older houses and apartment complexes. I’m used to never seeing much at the bottom of the tub from how cloudy the water is. Unfortunately, I love baths more than anything and usually have one a day- which creates skin issues and leaves me itchy within an hour of taking one. So far I’ve taken 3 baths with this filter- each one looked crystal clear and left me with no itch- in fact my skin felt hydrated from my products- which is a first- usually they just combat a problem- not actually fix it. My only concerns is with how often I bathe- I’m interested to see how this filter holds up. Also, I have two cats who love to lay in the tub once it’s a little dry- and I can’t keep them out of it- they’ll break down the bathroom door to get in. They like to drink the drops from the tap water in the tub as well- which is concerning considering they have no tests with animals (which is good don’t get me wrong- just want to make sure my animals are okay.) So I will give updates on that. I can’t imagine the water coming from the filter is worse for them than the city water.
body_zh: 我一生都住在一个城市——特别是在老房子和公寓大楼里。我习惯于从来没有看到浴缸底部的水有多浑浊。不幸的是，我最喜欢洗澡，通常每天洗一次——这会产生皮肤问题，让我在洗澡后一小时内发痒。 到目前为止，我已经用这个过滤器洗了 3 次澡——每一次看起来都清澈见底，让我没有瘙痒——事实上，我的皮肤感觉从我的产品中得到了水分——这是第一次——通常他们只是解决一个问题——而不是真正解决它。 我唯一担心的是我洗澡的频率——我有兴趣看看这个过滤器的表现如何。另外，我有两只猫，它们喜欢在浴缸有点干的时候躺在浴缸里——我不能让它们远离浴缸——它们会打破浴室的门进去。他们也喜欢喝浴缸里自来水中的水滴——考虑到他们没有对动物进行测试，这令人担忧（这很好，不要误会我的意思——只是想确保我的动物没事。所以我会提供这方面的最新情况。我无法想象来自过滤器的水对他们来说比城市水更糟糕。

title: Lazy Cancer Star People Speed Party
body: I used to be afraid of water leakage when installing filters, but this rotating buckle can handle it in 3 seconds! The key is not to dismantle the showerhead, it can be directly installed on the existing faucet. My best friend said I have chosen a treasure - she has to regularly screw and clean it with competing products, while this filter can be cleaned by flushing. Now the whole family is rushing to take a shower, even my husband says his skin is not as tight as before (two people think it's useful).
body_zh: 以前安装过滤器时怕漏水，但这款旋转扣3秒就能搞定！关键是不是拆掉花洒，它可以直接安装在现有的水龙头上。我最好的朋友说我选了一个宝贝——她必须定期用竞争产品拧紧和清洁它，而这个过滤器可以通过冲洗来清洁。现在全家人都争着洗澡，连老公都说皮肤没有以前那么紧绷了（两个人觉得有用）。

title: Amazing bath filter – a good choice for softer skin & hair
title_zh: 惊人的浴缸过滤器 - 皮肤和头发柔软的好选择
body: This bathtub water filter is amazing! Installation was super easy and it fit perfectly in just minutes. After a few uses, the difference in our skin and hair was noticeable—no more dryness or irritation, and hair feels softer and shinier. The 8-stage filtration really makes the water cleaner and gentler, creating a spa-like experience at home. Plus, it’s BPA-free and filters up to 2,500 gallons. We’re so happy with this purchase and would definitely choose it again. Highly recommend for anyone with sensitive skin or hard water!

title: Gentle & effective for sensitive skin
body: I love how easy the Bath Ball Filter is to install—just hang it from the spout, and it’s BPA-free, which is a huge plus for safety. For my baby’s sensitive skin, it made a noticeable difference, reducing redness and irritation thanks to its 8-stage filtration. However, I didn’t see much change in water clarity or feel much difference for my own skin, which still feels dry. Overall, it’s perfect for parents seeking gentler bathwater for kids, and I highly recommend it for that purpose.
body_zh: 我喜欢安装浴球过滤器多么容易 - 只是将其从喷口上挂起来，并且不含BPA，这是一个巨大的安全性。对于我的宝宝敏感的皮肤，由于其8阶段的过滤而导致了显着的差异，从而减少了发红和刺激。但是，我的皮肤清晰度并没有太大变化，或者对自己的皮肤有太大的差异，这仍然感到干燥。总体而言，它非常适合为孩子寻求更温和的沐浴水，我强烈建议您为此目的。

Since using it, I’ve noticed a remarkable difference in my skin and hair—my skin feels softer, and my hair is less dried out. The water quality improves dramatically, no more murky water or strange smells. It’s a perfect, low-cost solution for a relaxing, healthier bath experience. Durable and highly recommended for anyone seeking cleaner, more refreshing baths.

title: Effective tub water filter
title_zh: 有效的浴缸滤液过滤器
body: I love this tub filter! It fits perfectly on our jacuzzi tub faucet and was incredibly easy to install. Since using it, my daughter and I no longer suffer from dry, itchy skin after baths, and the water smells so much cleaner—no more chlorine! We do slow the faucet fill slightly to prevent overflow, but it’s a minor adjustment. Overall, it works exactly as promised and looks attractive too. Highly recommend for anyone wanting a simple, effective solution to improve bath water quality!
body_zh: 我喜欢这个浴缸过滤器！它非常适合我们的按摩浴缸水龙头，并且非常容易安装。自从使用以来，我和我的女儿不再患有干燥，沐浴后发痒的皮肤，水闻起来很干净，没有更多的氯！我们确实会稍微放慢水龙头填充以防止溢出，但这是一个较小的调整。总体而言，它的工作原理完全按照承诺，看起来也很有吸引力。强烈建议任何想要提高浴室水质的简单有效解决方案的人！

Perfect for families!

title: Perfect baby filter, must-have repeat purchase
title_zh: 完美的婴儿过滤器，必须重复购买
body: I love this bath filter! It’s super easy to install with two adaptable options for any faucet shape or size. The water flows perfectly with no leaks and great pressure. body: Honestly, I didn’t think I’d notice much difference, but wow, I was so wrong! Living near the ocean means my water’s super hard and smells kinda funky, but since I started using this filter, no more weird odors at all. Water flows super smooth, no splashing or mess—just hang it on the faucet and you’re good. Plus, I’ve been using way less soap and bubble bath, so it’s gotta be softening the water. Easy to install without tools, this sturdy ABS plastic filter offers 8-stage filtration that removes chlorine, heavy metals, and mineral deposits, ensuring softer, cleaner water. Ideal for homes with hard water, sensitive skin, or pets with allergies, it maintains strong water flow and fills the tub quickly. With a lifespan of up to 2,500 gallons, it’s a great value and portable for travel. While it lacks an indicator light, after a year of use, it continues to perform wonderfully—making every bath a refreshing experience!

title: Highly recommended for anyone seeking cleaner, better water!
title_zh: 强烈建议任何寻求清洁，更好的水的人！
body: I recently upgraded my bathroom with the Bath Ball Filter and couldn’t be happier! Perfect for our iron-rich water, it keeps our skin and my little ones’ skin happy while preventing the tub from turning orange. Right from the first use, I noticed softer water, no unpleasant odors, and a spa-like feel. The sleek, modern design blends beautifully with my bathroom decor, and it’s incredibly easy to install—just a few minutes, no tools needed. This water filter has truly enhanced our bathing experience, making it healthier and more refreshing. Highly recommended for anyone seeking cleaner, better water!

We even subscribed to ensure we never run out. As a crunchy mom aiming for less toxic options, I found this product through a TikTok video and couldn’t be happier. While I haven’t seen big changes in our skin yet, I’m confident the improved filtration makes our water safer and healthier for everyone.

title: Super strong filtration, turning hard water into soft water in an instant!
title_zh: 超强的过滤，将硬水瞬间转化为软水！
body: I was shocked when I released water for the first time after installation! The tap water, which originally had the smell of bleach, turned out to have a faint, refreshing taste after filtration. The visible impurities vanished, and fine foam was floating on the surface (previously, hard water couldn't even wash out the foam!) . The official claim is that 2,500 gallons can power a family of three for eight months. After actual testing, taking a bath and a shower every day for four months, the filter element still hasn't given an alarm, and the filtration capacity has not decreased at all. Now, every time I fill up the bath water, it feels like I'm getting "natural mineral water", and my sense of happiness is directly at its peak!
body_zh: 安装后第一次释放水时，我感到震惊！自来水最初充满了漂白剂的气味，过滤后有一种微弱的清爽味道。可见的杂质消失了，细泡沫漂浮在表面上（以前，硬水甚至无法洗掉泡沫！）。官方声称，有2500加仑可以为八个月的三口之家提供动力。经过实际测试，每天洗澡和淋浴四个月，过滤器元件仍然没有发出警报，并且过滤能力根本没有降低。现在，每当我填充浴水时，感觉就像我得到了“天然矿泉水”，而我的幸福感直接达到顶峰！

title: Water Filter Review: Easy Installation and Promising Performance
title_zh: 水过滤器评论：简单安装和有希望的性能
body: I'm impressed with this water filter! It's super easy to install—just hang it on the faucet in minutes without tools. The sturdy ABS plastic feels durable, and its 8-stage filtration effectively removes chlorine and heavy metals for up to 2,500 gallons. While I haven't noticed a significant difference in bathwater quality yet, I look forward to softer, cleaner water in future baths. Its compact size makes it perfect for travel and hotel stays, offering great value. Overall, a convenient and promising water filter for everyday use.

title: Perfect for sensitive skin, hair
title_zh: 非常适合敏感的皮肤，头发
body: I highly recommend this water filter for anyone looking to improve their water quality. We've been using it for our little one, and it truly makes a difference. Recently, I installed a bath filter and noticed immediate improvements—softer, cleaner water that leaves my skin feeling hydrated and my hair smoother and less frizzy. The installation was simple, and the filter effectively removes chlorine and impurities. It's durable, easy to replace cartridges, and offers great value. This small investment has significantly enhanced our bathing experience, making water gentler and more enjoyable for the whole family.
body_zh: 我强烈建议任何希望提高水质的人。我们一直在为我们的小家伙使用它，这确实有所作为。最近，我安装了一个浴缸过滤器，并注意到了立即的改进 - 较干净的水使我的皮肤感到水分，头发更加顺畅，卷曲较少。该装置很简单，过滤器有效地消除了氯和杂质。它耐用，易于更换墨盒，并具有巨大的价值。这项小型投资大大增强了我们的沐浴体验，使整个家庭更温和，更有趣。

title: Perfect
body: We love our water filter! Since installing it in our bathtub, the water feels and looks softer, making bath time more enjoyable. It’s super easy to set up and portable, so we can move it between bathtubs effortlessly. Perfect for our baby's safety, it filters out chlorine and other impurities, eliminating unpleasant smells. We’ve subscribed to regular replacements to ensure continuous filtration. It’s been a few months, and we’ve noticed a significant improvement in water quality—no more chlorine smell, just pure, clean water for the whole family!

Its portability allows easy movement between bathtubs, and the water flow is excellent. After searching online for solutions to hard water and eczema, we found this trusted filter on Amazon. Within a month, we saw a significant difference—our daughter's eczema improved, and even our newborn benefits. The quality is impressive, and it offers great value for the money. This water filter is a wonderful step toward healthier skin and better water, until we can afford a full home filtration system.

body: Our family loves this water filter! It effectively removes harmful ingredients like chlorine, making bath time safer and more soothing. It also adds essential minerals and leaves our skin softer. I especially appreciate it for my baby, as it prevents drying out her delicate skin—giving us peace of mind. Although our faucet isn’t a perfect fit, we make it work easily. We plan to buy another one because it’s so worth it. This water filter truly enhances our bathing experience and skin health!

title: Gentle Water Filter for Kids and Babies
title_zh: 儿童和婴儿的温和水过滤器
body: This water filter is a game-changer for families! It effectively removes chlorine smell from bath water, making it clearer and more pleasant. Perfect for kids and babies, especially those with sensitive skin or eczema, as it's gentle and easy to use. The simple design allows you to attach it directly to the faucet, providing clean, filtered water every bath time. A must-have for parents seeking a safe, effective water filter to improve their child's bathing experience!
body_zh: 这种水过滤器是家庭的游戏改变者！它有效地消除了沐浴水中的氯气味，使其更清晰，更愉快。非常适合儿童和婴儿，尤其是那些具有敏感皮肤或湿疹的孩子，因为它易于使用。简单的设计使您可以将其直接固定在水龙头上，每次沐浴提供干净的过滤水。对于寻求安全有效的水过滤器来改善孩子的沐浴体验的父母来说，这是必不可少的！

title: I highly recommend it for a healthier, more refreshing bath experience!
title_zh: 我强烈建议您获得更健康，更令人耳目一新的沐浴体验！
body: I recently tried the Bath Ball Filter, and I’m thrilled with the results! From the very first use, I noticed a remarkable improvement in my bath water quality. The sleek, modern design seamlessly blends with my bathroom decor, thanks to its neutral color. The water feels softer, and all unpleasant odors are gone, creating a spa-like experience at home. It’s incredibly easy to install—just a few minutes and no tools needed. This water filter has enhanced my skin and hair while adding a touch of elegance to my bathroom. I highly recommend it for a healthier, more refreshing bath experience!

title: Effective Water Filter for Sensitive Skin and Family Peace of Mind
title_zh: 有效的水过滤器，可敏感皮肤和家庭安心
body: This water filter is a fantastic addition for households with sensitive skin, children, or pets. Perfect for baths and showers, it reduces iron, chlorine, and mineral deposits, making water gentler and healthier. Easy to install and low-cost, it maintains good water flow without backing up. Our family, including a baby with eczema, noticed fewer flare-ups and healthier hair after installation. It’s a reliable solution for hard water and skin-sensitive individuals, providing peace of mind and improved water quality. A highly recommended investment for a safer, cleaner home!

title: Gentle Water Filter for Baby Baths
title_zh: 婴儿浴的温和水过滤器
body: I’m thrilled with this water filter for the bathtub! It’s incredibly easy to install—just hang it on the faucet in minutes without any tools. Made from durable ABS plastic, it features an 8-stage filtration system that removes chlorine and heavy metals, ensuring softer, cleaner water. Perfect for my baby with eczema, it’s gentle on his skin and seems to make bath time much more soothing. Its compact size is great for travel, making it a fantastic value. Although it feels gentle on my baby's skin, I didn't notice significant improvements in water quality or skin hydration. Still, it's a positive step toward safer bathing for sensitive skin.

It effectively reduces water harshness, leaving my skin smoother and less irritated. It’s easy to install, compact, and fits right on the faucet. title: Worthless
body: Don’t be misled by the pictures or sleek design—it looks good, but that’s where the positives end. It claims to have an 8-stage filter, but when I checked inside, it was just a few metal pieces—nothing impressive. The water flow slows down noticeably, yet there’s no real difference in water quality before and after installing it. Worse, when I turn my bathtub tap on full, water leaks from the top of the filter. Maybe it can’t handle high pressure, but either way, it’s disappointing. Feels like a waste of money.
body_zh: 不要被图片或时尚设计误导 - 看起来不错，但这就是积极的结局。它声称有一个8阶段的过滤器，但是当我在里面检查时，它只是几块金属件，没有令人印象深刻的东西。水流明显减慢，但安装之前和之后的水质没有真正的差异。 更糟糕的是，当我打开浴缸时，漏水会从过滤器的顶部泄漏。也许它无法应付高压，但是无论哪种方式，都令人失望。感觉像是浪费金钱。

title: Revitalize Your Bath with a Water Filter
body: Our family loves the bath water filter! It effectively removes harmful ingredients like chlorine, leaving the water softer, odor-free, and more enjoyable. The sleek, modern design easily fits into our bathroom, and installation is quick and simple—no tools needed. We’ve noticed improved skin and hair health and a spa-like experience every time. Although our faucet isn’t a perfect fit, it still works well. We’re excited to repurchase and continue enjoying healthier, cleaner baths with this bath water filter—it's a game changer for our bathing routine!

title: Gentle Bathing with a Bathtub Water Filter
title_zh: 用浴缸滤水器温和沐浴
body: Discovering the benefits of a bathtub water filter has been a game-changer for our family's bathing routine. We purchased one to fill our 1-year-old's bathtub, and it noticeably made the water feel softer and gentler on her delicate skin—definitely worth trying! My son, who baths 3-4 times a week, experienced dry and irritated skin, but since using the bath filter, we've seen improvements, and I even enjoy using it myself. It offers peace of mind knowing the water is cleaner and healthier. I’ve also gifted a bathtub water filter to a friend—great for family and as a thoughtful gift!

title: Transform Your Bath with a Bathtub Water Filter
title_zh: 用浴缸滤水器转换浴缸
body: I recently upgraded my bathing routine with a bathtub water filter, and the difference is incredible! From the first use, I noticed cleaner, fresher water that smells great. It’s simple to install, even on my kid’s bath faucet with a fun whale-shaped cover, and it filters water efficiently without overflowing. Since using it, my skin feels smoother and less irritated—perfect for sensitive skin, including eczema. It’s compact, hassle-free, and enhances the entire bathing experience. I highly recommend this bathtub water filter to anyone looking to enjoy cleaner, healthier baths every time!
body_zh: 最近，我用浴缸滤水器升级了沐浴日程，而差异令人难以置信！从第一次使用开始，我注意到闻起来很香的清洁剂，更新鲜的水。即使在我孩子的浴水龙头上，它也很容易安装，并带有有趣的鲸鱼形盖，并且可以有效地过滤水而不会溢出。自从使用时，我的皮肤感觉更顺畅，刺激性较小 - 敏感皮肤（包括湿疹）的完美。它是紧凑的，无忧的，可以增强整个沐浴体验。我强烈建议您每次都可以享受更清洁，更健康的浴缸的任何人！

Even my hair feels stronger and less straw-like without extra conditioning. The only minor tweak I’d suggest is making the filter opening a bit larger to prevent water from spilling over, but adjusting water pressure easily solves this. I highly recommend this filter; it has improved our bathing experience, and I’ll definitely buy it again!

title: Transform Your Bath with a Top-Notch Bath Water Filter for Tub
title_zh: 用一流的浴缸滤水器转换浴缸
body: Experience the ultimate transformation with this exceptional bath water filter for your tub! Elevate your bathing routine with its cutting-edge filtration technology that eliminates impurities and transforms water into a silky, smooth sensation. Effortlessly compact and simple to set up, it seamlessly fits into any household. The durable filters not only save costs but also promote eco-friendliness. Revel in the delight of tastier water and lavish baths, bringing pure refreshment and spa-like luxury to your home. Don't miss out on this fantastic investment that guarantees pure hydration and indulgence. Embrace a new level of bathing excellence with this must-have addition to your home.

title: Transform Your Bath with a Bathtub Water Filter

body: I can't recommend this bathtub water filter enough! Perfect for city water that's hard and has strong odors, it’s incredibly easy to install directly onto your tub spout. Since using it, I've noticed cleaner water, no more chlorine smell, and improved skin and hair health—my eczema and rosacea have significantly decreased. The filters are durable, look nice, and last a long time, making them cost-effective. Knowing that I’m bathing in clean water gives me peace of mind. I’ve even bought extras to keep on hand. A simple, effective upgrade for a healthier, more refreshing bath experience!

title: Filtered Bathtub Water: Perfect for Soft Skin and Clean Tubs
title_zh: 过滤的浴缸水：非常适合柔软的皮肤和干净的浴缸
body: We got this bathtub water filter to ensure our newborn gets clean, softer water as we rely on a well. It's simple to use, and the filtered water is crystal clear. Our area struggles with hard water, and due to our home's age (1955), installing a water softener would mean redoing the entire plumbing system. This filter has been a cost-effective solution for our tub, keeping it clean without any build-up. The water quality has improved noticeably, leaving our skin feeling softer after baths. It's so great that it makes me want to indulge in baths every day! The adjustable and well-fitting design is a bonus. I even recommended this product to my sister!
body_zh: 我们得到了这个浴缸滤水器，以确保我们的新生儿在依靠井时变得清洁，更柔软。它易于使用，过滤后的水是清晰的。我们的地区与硬水斗争，由于我们家的年龄（1955年），安装水软水器将意味着重新填充整个管道系统。该过滤器一直是我们浴缸的经济高效解决方案，可以使其保持清洁，而无需任何堆积。水质明显提高，沐浴后使我们的皮肤更柔软。太棒了，它让我想每天沉迷于洗澡！可调且合适的设计是一个奖励。我什至向姐姐推荐了这个产品！

body: Being a second-time mom, I wish I had discovered this bath ball filter sooner! It's fantastic for ensuring cleaner water in the bathtub. body: I'm thrilled with my purchase of this innovative bathtub water filter. The high-quality design is evident right from the start. I immediately felt a positive change in my skin. Despite having well water that usually causes skin issues, I enjoy using Epsom salt in my baths to ease joint pain. After using it for a few weeks, we have seen a significant improvement. It's shocking to realize how many harmful substances lurk in our water, but this bath ball has truly made a difference. The easy installation, with adjustable cable lengths for different faucets, provides peace of mind knowing that our bath water is now clean and safe. I've been so impressed with the results that I've been recommending this bathtub water filter to all my friends!

title: Efficient Bathtub Water Filter: A Must-Have for Relaxing Baths
title_zh: 有效的浴缸水过滤器：放松浴的必备
body: I've been using this bathtub water filter for several months now, and it has exceeded all my expectations. I take frequent baths to unwind and help my muscles recover, and this filter has been a game-changer. Not only is it easy to install, but it also does an excellent job of filtering the water quickly and effectively. The high-quality materials used ensure its durability while providing great value for the price. Additionally, it has made a noticeable difference in tackling tub discoloration caused by iron in our well water and has even helped improve my toddler's skin. A must-have for anyone looking to enhance their bathing experience!
body_zh: 我已经使用了几个月的浴缸滤水器，它已经超出了我的所有期望。我经常洗澡以放松身心并帮助我的肌肉恢复，并且该过滤器改变了游戏规则。它不仅容易安装，而且在快速有效地过滤水的情况下也做得很好。使用的高质量材料可确保其耐用性，同时为价格提供巨大价值。此外，它在解决井水中铁引起的浴缸变色方面产生了明显的影响，甚至有助于改善我的孩子的皮肤。对于希望增强沐浴体验的任何人来说，这是必不可少的！

body: This bathtub water filter is a lifesaver for our baby's bath time in our old house with rusty pipes. It ensures clear water every time we use it, making bath time worry-free. Even without a tub stopper, this filter works perfectly. It came with a clever solution for keeping the water in place, which I found incredibly useful. I even used it during my own bath and was impressed by its effectiveness. I highly recommend this filter for anyone looking to improve their bath experience!

It hangs securely on the faucet, even with decorative covers, ensuring quick filtration without any overflow. It effectively removes heavy metals from tap water, making it gentler for children with skin conditions like eczema. body: I recently started using a bath ball filter, and the results have been amazing! Not only does it remove chlorine and other impurities, making the water softer and better for our skin, but it has also made a significant difference in my kids' skin health. The product has effectively tackled the extra garbage in our water supply, allowing us to enjoy longer and happier bath times, especially with the baby. It's truly a splash of joy that has transformed our bath time experience!

title: Refreshing Bath Experiences with This Bathtub Water Filter
title_zh: 此浴缸滤水器刷新的浴室体验
body: I couldn't be happier with my purchase of this bathtub water filter. Not only does the filtration system work great and provide a smooth water flow, but it has also made my skin feel much softer. My initial concern about the water causing itchiness for both me and my young daughter has been completely resolved. Now, we no longer suffer from dry, itchy skin after baths. The water even smells cleaner! While we have to regulate the faucet flow to prevent overflow, the filter's perfect fit on our jacuzzi tub faucet makes up for it. Such a great addition to our bath routine!
body_zh: 我对购买此浴缸水过滤器感到高兴。过滤系统不仅可以很好地工作并提供光滑的水流，而且还使我的皮肤感觉更柔软。我最初对我和我的小女儿都发痒的水的最初关注得到了完全解决。现在，沐浴后我们不再患有干燥，发痒的皮肤。水甚至闻起来很干净！虽然我们必须调节龙头流以防止溢出，但过滤器对按摩浴缸水龙头的完美贴合弥补了这一点。我们的浴室例程如此重要！

body: Living in the country, we needed a reliable filter for our hard water. This filter has been a game-changer, leaving us with less dry skin and hair breakage. The water used to irritate our skin, but this tub filter has resolved that issue for both me and my young daughter. Now, after baths, our skin feels soft and no longer itchy. The water even smells cleaner!

title: Revolutionize Bath Time with a Bathtub Filter
title_zh: 用浴缸过滤器彻底改变浴缸时间
body: I purchased this bathtub filter for my 6-month-old, and it has been a game-changer for combating dry skin concerns. The quality of this product is exceptional, especially if you have worries about your baby's skin. Even with a full house water softener system, the hard/well water used to cause body itching after baths. I never realized the impact a bathtub filter could have until I tried it. Now, my post-bath irritation and itchiness are things of the past.

body: The bath filter works great at filtering out harsh water, making bath time a breeze. Although the water faucet is larger than the filter hole, a simple adjustment is all it takes to ensure spillage is avoided. This easy fix allows for a relaxing and clean bath experience, especially when it's for your little one. Enjoy the benefits of filtered water without any hassle, and make bath time a soothing and enjoyable routine for you and your child.

body: I purchased this bath filter for my pregnancy baths due to hard water in my area, and now it's perfect for my baby's baths. The compact size fits snugly on the tub faucet and is easy to assemble. I've noticed a significant improvement in my skin after using this filter. title: Water test the same with use.
body: Great thoughtful idea. Unfortunately we tested the water with and without running slow making sure all the water made it through the filter, our test kit showed it didn't remove or filter anything like it mentioned. Also our faucet on out bathtub is too powerful on warm so no matter how we set up overflows and fails to filter all the water. I saw all the positive reviews and should have read further. I had high hopes. Something so small filtering out water so clean is a stretch.
body_zh: 很棒的深思熟虑的想法。不幸的是，我们测试了水流是否缓慢，以确保所有水都通过过滤器，我们的测试套件显示它没有去除或过滤任何像上面提到的东西。此外，我们的浴缸水龙头在热水时功率太大，因此无论我们如何设置溢流器，都无法过滤所有的水。我看到了所有积极的评论，应该进一步阅读。我寄予厚望。这么小的东西过滤出如此干净的水是一件很困难的事情。

title: Wonderful, but have HIGH pressure water
body: I love this, it's amazing especially because I have the hardest, most gross water and all of Arizona. My 1-year-old has eczema and I have slight psoriasis, so we kind of need to not be sitting in a whole bunch of calcium and chlorine, with a little bit of water added. People in my area are always complaining about how the water smells like chlorine, sometimes it stinks in other ways. When I used a distilling machine to distill the tap water, what is left over is truly nauseating to look at and smell. It's still be on shocking to recollect. The only downside to this product is that we have extremely high water pressure. I love having high water pressure, so I'm not going to turn it down. So, too much water tries to flow through this filter at once and it can't handle all of it. It does handle most of it. And I am happy on with that. It's definitely better than nothing. I show it in the video. (I need to redo the video with a Bluetooth microphone because it is hard to hear me over the running water. So keep that in mind when you're watching it. I'll update it with a new video as soon as I can.)
body_zh: 我喜欢这个，这太神奇了，尤其是因为我拥有整个亚利桑那州最硬、最恶心的水。我一岁的孩子有湿疹，我有轻微的牛皮癣，所以我们不需要坐在一大堆钙和氯中，再加一点水。 我所在地区的人们总是抱怨水闻起来像氯气，有时还散发着其他味道。 当我用蒸馏机蒸馏自来水时，剩下的水实在是看着、闻着都恶心。现在回想起来仍然令人震惊。 该产品的唯一缺点是水压极高。我喜欢高水压，所以我不会把水压调小。因此，太多的水试图同时流过该过滤器，但它无法处理所有的水。它确实处理了大部分事情。我对此很高兴。这绝对比什么都没有好。 我在视频中展示了它。 （我需要用蓝牙麦克风重做视频，因为在流水里很难听到我的声音。所以当你观看它时请记住这一点。我会尽快用新视频更新它。）

title: Amazing Difference in Water Quality!

title: Making My Humidifier’s Water Less Questionable
title_zh: 使我的加湿器的水减少
body: So I actually didn’t get this filter for my bathtub. I got it because I have a large 6L humidifier, and the idea of constantly filling it with unfiltered tap water just didn’t sit right with me. Depending on where you live, tap water can be loaded with chlorine, fluoride, and other stuff that probably isn’t the best to be breathing in all night. This SHLLKTTRY Bathtub Water Filter seemed like an easy solution, and honestly, it works better than I expected. The setup is simple, you just drop it in, let it do its thing, and the water comes out noticeably cleaner. It claims to remove contaminants, soften hard water, and improve overall water quality, and while I obviously can’t see all of that happening, I can say that my humidifier doesn’t get that weird mineral buildup as quickly anymore. The water also feels softer, if that makes sense, and doesn’t have that faint chlorine smell I’d sometimes notice before. If you’re using it for a bath, I imagine it’d be great for sensitive skin, but for me, it’s been perfect for making sure the water in my humidifier isn’t full of junk.
body_zh: 因此，我实际上没有为我的浴缸得到这个过滤器。我之所以明白，是因为我有一个大型的6L加湿器，并且不断用未过滤的自来水填充它的想法并不坐在我身上。根据您的居住地，自来水可以装有氯，氟化物和其他可能不是整夜呼吸的东西。这种Shllkttry浴缸的滤水器似乎是一种简单的解决方案，老实说，它比我预期的要好。设置很简单，您只需将其放入，让它做事，并且水会明显清洁。它声称要去除污染物，软化硬水并提高整体水质，虽然我显然看不到所有发生的事情，但我可以说我的加湿器再也不会很快就能得到那种怪异的矿物质积聚。如果有意义，水也会感觉较软，并且没有有时会注意到的那种微弱的氯气味。如果您将其用于洗澡，我想这对敏感的皮肤来说很棒，但是对我来说，它非常适合确保我的加湿器中的水不充满垃圾。

title: AVOID!!! TERRIBLE FOR MASTER BATHS!! DO NOT BUY.
title_zh: 避免！！！对于主浴室来说太糟糕了！不要购买。
body: DOESN'T WORK WITH BIG TUBS, THE WATER WILL OVERFLOW. I have a master bedroom and the area I live in has hard water hence I buy this hoping it'd filter the water out of my tub faucet. So, I used the rubber handle because my faucet doesn't have a top and my faucet is at an angle and it was hard for the water to fall into the ball, when I increased the water pressure, the ball would overflow and fall. TLDR; Very inconvenient cheap design, instructions weren't useful (had to look online), and the ball kept falling when it wouldn't filter fast enough and the water would overflow and cause the whole filter to fall. Horrible, horrible, horrible.
body_zh: 不适用于大浴缸，水会溢出。我有一间主卧室，我住的地方有硬水，因此我买了这个，希望它能过滤掉我浴缸水龙头中的水。所以，我使用了橡胶手柄，因为我的水龙头没有顶部，而且我的水龙头是倾斜的，水很难落入球中，当我增加水压时，球会溢出并落下。 太长了；非常不方便的廉价设计，说明没有用（必须在网上查看），并且当过滤速度不够快时，球会不断掉落，水会溢出并导致整个过滤器掉落。可怕，可怕，可怕。

You popped the little handle on the top of it put it underneath the spout of your tub and turn your bathtub on and I guarantee you it will filter all the ick out of your water, then I tend to put in a bath bomb and soak my little body away. I definitely recommend it. It will pull a lot of the ick out of your water and then allow you to use bath salts Epson salt bath bombs to soak away your hurt. The amount of water pressure didn’t seem to matter. It definitely flowed without a problem. I definitely think this is a fairly quality item. It functions very easily and anybody can use it if you live in a city and your water isn’t softened this will help.

title: Horrible water pressure

body: Pros: - Filters up to 2,500 gallons of water. - 8-stage filtration removes contaminants, chlorine, fluoride, and softens hard water. - BPA-free for safer use. - Suitable for tubs with overflow systems. Cons: - May reduce water flow rate slightly. - Requires regular replacement to maintain effectiveness. - May not fit all bathtub overflow designs perfectly. - Some users may find the installation process challenging.

title: bath filter is great
body: This bath filter is designed to make your bath water gentler and cleaner by removing up to about 99 % of chlorine and other common contaminants with its 8-stage filtration system, which can help reduce skin irritation and dryness and support softer hair and smoother skin. Installation is very easy — you just clip it onto the tub faucet with no tools required — and the compact design works right out of the box. Many users report noticeable improvements in how the water feels, especially for sensitive skin, and the filter lasts up to around 2,500 gallons before needing replacement. While performance can depend on water flow and pressure, this filter is a simple, affordable way to boost your bath water quality and make bathing more pleasant for the whole family.
body_zh: 这款沐浴过滤器的 8 级过滤系统可去除高达约 99% 的氯和其他常见污染物，从而使您的沐浴水更加温和、清洁，有助于减少皮肤刺激和干燥，使头发更柔软、皮肤更光滑。安装非常简单 - 您只需将其夹在浴缸水龙头上，无需任何工具 - 而且紧凑的设计开箱即可使用。许多用户表示，水感明显改善，尤其是对于敏感皮肤而言，并且过滤器在需要更换之前可持续使用约 2,500 加仑。虽然性能取决于水流​​和压力，但这款过滤器是一种简单、经济实惠的方法，可以提高沐浴水质，让全家人的沐浴更加愉快。

title: Works but molds quickly
body: The idea sounded useful, especially for my kitchen faucet at work where I rely on clean water all day. Unfortunately, after just a few days, the filter developed a weird smell. I hoped it would clear up, but it lingered and made the water taste off. Worse, I noticed some mold starting to form within the first week, which was really disappointing. I tried to keep it clean, but after a couple of months, I had no choice but to throw it away. For the price, I expected better quality and durability. It just didn’t meet my needs. I won’t be using it again during my shifts.
body_zh: 这个想法听起来很有用，特别是对于我工作时的厨房水龙头来说，我整天都依赖干净的水。不幸的是，仅仅几天后，过滤器就发出了奇怪的气味。我希望水会消散，但它却一直挥之不去，让水变味了。更糟糕的是，我注意到第一周内就开始形成一些霉菌，这真的令人失望。我试图保持它干净，但几个月后，我别无选择，只能把它扔掉。对于价格，我期望更好的质量和耐用性。它只是不能满足我的需求。我在轮班期间不会再使用它。

title: Filter does not work as expected and is disappointing
title_zh: 过滤器没有按预期工作，令人失望
body: Water filtration was the main reason I bought this product, hoping it would clear up the persistent black sediment coming from old pipes in my apartment. Unfortunately, it didn’t make a noticeable difference. Even after using the filter during my kids' bath time, large black particles still appeared, and a simple water hardness test showed no improvement. I needed something that would soften the water and provide cleaner baths, but this didn’t deliver. I usually use filters at home during daily routines, so this was quite disappointing given the price. It feels like I wasted money on a product that doesn’t address the real issues. I wanted an easy fix for hard water and sediment, but this didn’t help.

title: Not effective for tubs as expected
title_zh: 如预期的那样对浴缸无效
body: Purchased this water filter hoping for softer skin after baths, but it didn’t really make a difference. The water still felt harsh, and my skin got dry and itchy. Installation was tricky too—leaked a bit and instructions weren’t clear. Plus, the filter seemed to lose effectiveness after just a few uses. Tried it mainly for my evening baths, but honestly, not happy with the results.
body_zh: 购买这个滤水器是希望沐浴后皮肤变得更柔软，但效果并没有真正改变。水还是很刺鼻，我的皮肤又干又痒。安装也很棘手——有点泄漏，而且说明也不清楚。另外，过滤器在使用几次后似乎就失去了有效性。主要是为了晚上洗澡而尝试的，但说实话，我对结果不满意。

title: Filter quality could be improved
body: The design of this filter caught my attention initially because it looked modern and seemed convenient for everyday use. I tried using it at work during long hours, hoping it would keep my water clean and fresh. However, I noticed that the filtration did not remove impurities as well as I expected. The water still had a slight taste and some particles, which was disappointing. While the appearance and ease of handling are definitely good, the main function of the product did not meet my needs. It’s handy to carry around, but I cannot rely on it for truly clean water. For those who prioritize looks over performance, it might be okay. For me, I need something that works better when I’m at my desk or on the go. Not what I hoped for, unfortunately.
body_zh: 这款过滤器的设计最初引起了我的注意，因为它看起来很现代，而且似乎适合日常使用。我尝试在长时间工作时使用它，希望它能让我的水保持干净和新鲜。然而，我注意到过滤并没有像我预期的那样去除杂质。水仍然有轻微的味道和一些颗粒，这令人失望。虽然外观和操控性确实不错，但产品的主要功能并没有满足我的需求。它携带方便，但我不能依靠它来获得真正干净的水。对于那些优先考虑外观而不是性能的人来说，这可能没问题。对我来说，我需要一些在我坐在办公桌前或在旅途中时效果更好的东西。不幸的是，这不是我所希望的。

title: Not happy with the product, wish it worked better😕
title_zh: 对产品不满意，希望效果更好😕
body: Every time i tried using this filter in my bathroom sink, the water just ended up splashing everywhere. Even with the splash guard on, it's like it can't handle normal water pressure from my faucet. Also, the water flows out slower than it should, making washing up a hassle during busy mornings. The worst part is that it didn’t actually filter the water; i still saw rust bits and stuff, which is annoying because i bought it to improve my tap water quality. took it with me when i was camping, hoping it'd help, but nope, it barely worked there either. honestly, kinda regret getting it since it doesn't do what it's supposed to. 😞
body_zh: 每次我尝试在浴室水槽中使用这个过滤器时，水都会溅得到处都是。即使打开了防溅罩，它也无法承受我的水龙头的正常水压。此外，水流出的速度比应有的速度慢，这使得在忙碌的早晨清洗变得很麻烦。最糟糕的是它并没有真正过滤水；它只是过滤水。我仍然看到锈迹之类的东西，这很烦人，因为我买它是为了改善自来水质量。我露营时带着它，希望它能有所帮助，但不，它在那里也几乎不起作用。老实说，有点后悔得到它，因为它没有起到应有的作用。 😞

I would suggest listening to the instructions though a bit tedious and actually disassembling the parts daily or weekly to prevent hard water stains or buildup on the tubo device. However this filter helps especially with the Georgia hard water. I don’t feel as dry as I would if I didn’t use it. The water is so much better than if I were to not use the filter and it’s easy to replace by unscrewing the old and popping in the new one and securing the entire mechanism and you are done!

title: Excellent for sensitive skin
body: After using the Tubo Bath Filter 2.0 for several weeks, I can confidently say it's made a significant difference in my family's bathing experience. The 8-stage filtration system effectively removes up to 99% of chlorine, heavy metals, and other contaminants, resulting in noticeably softer water. This has led to improvements in our skin and hair health, reducing dryness and irritation. Pros: Effective Filtration: The advanced 8-stage system purifies bathwater, making it gentler on the skin. Easy Installation: Attaches to most standard tub faucets without the need for tools. Durable and Long-Lasting: Each filter lasts up to 2,500 gallons, ensuring months of clean baths. Portable Design: Compact and travel-friendly, making it easy to maintain water quality on the go. Cons: Flow Rate Consideration: Some users have noted that high water flow can reduce filtration effectiveness. Not a Replacement for Whole-House Systems: While effective for baths, it doesn't replace comprehensive water filtration systems. Final Thoughts: The Tubo Bath Filter 2.0 is an excellent investment for those seeking to improve their bathwater quality, especially individuals with sensitive skin or concerns about water contaminants. Its ease of use, effective filtration, and portability make it a standout product in its category.
body_zh: 使用 Tubo Bath Filter 2.0 几周后，我可以自信地说，它对我家人的沐浴体验产生了重大影响。 8 级过滤系统可有效去除高达 99% 的氯、重金属和其他污染物，使水质明显更软。这改善了我们的皮肤和头发健康，减少干燥和刺激。 优点： 有效过滤：先进的 8 级系统净化洗澡水，使其对皮肤更加温和。 易于安装：无需工具即可连接到大多数标准浴缸水龙头。 耐用且持久：每个过滤器的容量可达 2,500 加仑，确保数月的浴室清洁。 便携式设计：紧凑且适合旅行，可以轻松地在旅途中保持水质。 缺点： 流量考虑因素：一些用户注意到高水流量会降低过滤效率。 不能替代全屋系统：虽然对浴室有效，但它不能替代全面的水过滤系统。 最后的想法： 对于那些寻求改善洗澡水质量的人来说，Tubo 沐浴过滤器 2.0 是一项绝佳的投资，尤其是皮肤敏感或担心水污染物的人。其易用性、有效过滤和便携性使其成为同类产品中的佼佼者。

I tried another that just overflowed and didn't stay put. not only is this stay put, but as long as I don't put the hot/cold handle right in the middle, full force, it doesn't over flow. so I just start with full hot water so I can put in my salts and such to the bath and finish with some cool water to bring down the temp to a comfortable level.
body_zh: 是的，它有效！我尝试了另一个，但它刚刚溢出并且没有停留在原地。这不仅保持不动，而且只要我不将热/冷手柄放在中间，用尽全力，它就不会溢出。所以我只是从全套热水开始，这样我就可以在浴缸中加入盐等，最后用一些冷水将温度降低到舒适的水平。

title: 4 likes, 4 not so much….
title_zh: 4 个喜欢，4 个不太喜欢……
body: Our water needs all the filtration it can get! We have well water that without a water softener (and a lot of salt!) would not be usable. Our softener does clear our water but after bathing my skin feels tight and dried out. This water filter did help by: my skin felt softer and not dried out, the water was crystal clear, no smell of any kind and there was no ring or residue left behind in the tub. With that said I feel the instructions weren’t great, the filter did not seem to fit my bath faucet all that well but I was able to make it work and lastly, there is some maintenance with the product. In conclusion, I do like the product and it seamed to work well for me.
body_zh: 我们的水需要尽可能的过滤！我们有井水，如果没有软水器（和大量的盐！）就无法使用。我们的软化剂确实可以净化水，但沐浴后我的皮肤感觉紧绷且干燥。这个滤水器确实有帮助：我的皮肤感觉更柔软，不干燥，水清澈见底，没有任何气味，浴缸里没有留下任何环或残留物。话虽如此，我觉得说明不太好，过滤器似乎不太适合我的浴缸水龙头，但我能够让它工作，最后，该产品需要一些维护。总之，我确实喜欢这个产品，而且它对我来说效果很好。

title: Works well after taking the little sponge out
title_zh: 取出小海绵后效果很好
body: Works well, after some modification. It comes with two different types of attachment handles, depending on what type of faucet you have. I was able to use the short/firm handle. It was a little hard to push the handle ends into to filter top, but with some force, they finally went in. I tried using the filter as is, but the it couldn’t handle the amount of water and started overflowing (which totally defeats the purpose!) I removed a sponge piece from the top of the filter and after that, it was able to properly filter without any overflowing. Normally (without any filter) when I fill the tub, I can smell a faint chlorine type of smell; when I fill it using the tubo filter, I don’t smell anything. We do have hard water, so I think this is helping, my kids skin does seem softer and less dried out, but it’s hard to tell for sure after just a few uses. It is a bit bulky and it’s supposed to be taken apart to air dry after every use, so that’s kind of high maintenance and takes up a bit of space for a frequently used item. Overall, I’m happy with it.
body_zh: 经过一些修改后，效果很好。它配有两种不同类型的连接手柄，具体取决于您拥有的水龙头类型。我能够使用短/坚固的手柄。将手柄末端推入过滤器顶部有点困难，但用了一些力，它们终于进去了。我尝试按原样使用过滤器，但它无法处理大量的水并开始溢出（这完全违背了目的！）我从过滤器顶部取下了一块海绵，之后，它能够正常过滤而没有任何溢出。通常（没有任何过滤器）当我给浴缸注水时，我可以闻到淡淡的氯味；当我使用管道过滤器填充它时，我没有闻到任何气味。我们确实有硬水，所以我认为这很有帮助，我孩子的皮肤确实看起来更柔软，不那么干燥，但在几次使用后很难确定。它有点笨重，每次使用后都应该拆开风干，因此维护成本很高，并且为经常使用的物品占用了一些空间。总的来说，我对此很满意。

title: Unsure On Water Quality
body: I like the design of this filter. It has two handles, it's easy to use and is easy to clean and dry. However, I have no sense of smell and the only way I was able to tell if there was a difference in water quality when using it was to use some test strips I have on hand that are used for hot tubs, etc. I tested unfiltered water versus water that ran through this filter. There was no difference in the chlorine content, but to be fair, the chlorine content was measuring on the lowest on the strip even before the filter. The only thing that did change was the PH. The water that went through the filter became very alkaline. The unfiltered water was a more balanced PH.
body_zh: 我喜欢这个过滤器的设计。它有两个手柄，易于使用，易于清洁和干燥。然而，我没有嗅觉，在使用它时，我能够判断水质是否有差异的唯一方法是使用我手头的一些用于热水浴缸等的测试条。我测试了未经过滤的水与经过该过滤器的水。氯含量没有差异，但公平地说，即使在过滤器之前，在试纸条上测量的氯含量也是最低的。唯一改变的是PH。通过过滤器的水变得非常碱性。未经过滤的水的 PH 值更平衡。

title: Need improvement
body: Super basic filter, not very pretty and the strap is not adjustable. It functions, but wonder how useful it really is. Probably need to do a side by side water test.

title: Great idea but needs some design tweaks.
title_zh: 好主意，但需要一些设计调整。
body: I love the idea of this little gadget. It's the simplest thing to use and I'm being sincere when I say, you can tell the water has been filtered. Last night I used the filter and allowed my feet to soak in the water. I couldn't believe how soft my feet were after finished soaking them. Here's the issue I have, the faucet or shower head has to be a certain size or shape for this to work. Furthermore, if you have, as we do, the shower that has the nozzle, this won't work for you. I also wish there was a way to adjust the water flow on the device itself, and there isn't one. Bottom line, this works if you have the correct faucet. It's not conducive for the larger, rain showerheads that so many people are opting for today. If this fits what you have in your house, I say go for it. It really works.
body_zh: 我喜欢这个小玩意的想法。这是最简单的使用方法，当我说“你可以看出水已经被过滤”时，我是很真诚的。昨晚我使用了过滤器，让我的脚泡在水里。我简直不敢相信我的脚泡完后有多软。这是我遇到的问题，水龙头或淋浴喷头必须具有一定的尺寸或形状才能发挥作用。此外，如果您像我们一样拥有带喷嘴的淋浴器，那么这对您不起作用。我还希望有一种方法可以调节设备本身的水流量，但目前还没有。最重要的是，如果您有正确的水龙头，这将有效。这对于如今许多人选择的更大的雨淋式喷头来说并不有利。如果这适合你家里的东西，我建议你就买吧。它确实有效。

title: Improved "Original 8-Stage Bathtub Filter"—higher quality than some others but effectiveness unclear
title_zh: 改进的“原装八级浴缸过滤器”——质量比其他过滤器更高，但效果尚不清楚
body: I ordered this to compare it to a similar tub filter from a different manufacturer. I first used this type of filter in the 1990's. I never knew, and still don't, what these filters really accomplish. I would need a way of testing the concentrations of dissolved substances in the water. However, without being able to directly compare the difference in water quality after filtration with this and the similar device I recently ordered, I can still say this one is of higher quality. It claims to be the original brand, and if that's true then others might be lower quality "knock off" albeit less expensive, versions. One thing making this one better is that the filter is replaceable. Unfortunately, the filters aren't currently available on Amazon; you have to get them from the company website. One replacement filter is $35 at present, which is more than half the current price of the whole device. Still, that's an improvement over having to dispose of the entire device when the filter is used up. A second plus is that they have improved the shape to prevent water overflow. With most of these, you have to limit how fast you fill the tub to avoid having a significant portion of the water miss passing through the filter. The Tubo "2.0" has a flanged top that can hold more water entering the filter from the faucet. I took off one star because I wish they would provide data on how the Tubo bath filter improves water quality. I'm not certain that it is worth the $65 it was selling for at the time I ordered it, especially without proof of effectiveness. With citations showing effectiveness evidence, my tolerance for the price would definitely increase. The product info claims that it has undergone" clinically testing" but I didn't find anything about the results of such testing.
body_zh: 我订购此过滤器是为了将其与不同制造商的类似桶式过滤器进行比较。我第一次使用这种类型的过滤器是在 20 世纪 90 年代。我从来不知道，现在仍然不知道这些过滤器到底能做什么。我需要一种测试水中溶解物质浓度的方法。不过，虽然无法直接比较这款设备和我最近订购的同类设备过滤后的水质差异，但我仍然可以说这款设备的水质更高。它声称自己是原创品牌，如果这是真的，那么其他品牌可能会是质量较低、价格较低的“山寨”版本。 使这款产品变得更好的一件事是过滤器是可更换的。不幸的是，这些过滤器目前在亚马逊上不可用；您必须从公司网站获取它们。目前更换一个过滤器的价格为 35 美元，是整个设备当前价格的一半以上。尽管如此，与过滤器用完后必须处理整个设备相比，这还是一个进步。 第二个优点是它们改进了形状以防止水溢出。对于其中大多数，您必须限制填充浴缸的速度，以避免大部分水漏过过滤器。 Tubo“2.0”有一个法兰顶部，可以容纳更多从水龙头进入过滤器的水。 我摘掉一颗星是因为我希望他们能提供有关 Tubo 浴缸过滤器如何改善水质的数据。我不确定它是否值我订购时的 65 美元售价，尤其是在没有有效性证明的情况下。有了显示有效性证据的引用，我对价格的容忍度肯定会增加。产品信息声称它已经过“临床测试”，但我没有找到任何有关此类测试结果的信息。

The tape included isn’t very strong, likely because it’s constantly exposed to water, but with some adjustments, it holds up fine. title: Not sure about this product
body: You have a choice of two straps in order to hang this from your bath faucet, but the hard plastic one is really difficult to attach to the unit. In fact, one handle that attaches to the base, split as I tried to attach it. Then the velcro strip that is included that attaches to the faucet when you don't have a diverter failed, so the device ended up at the bottom of my bathtub. I will say this: the company is very responsive if you send them an email about their product. An odd thing I discovered: I used my TDS meter (a handheld device to determine water purity) and the water coming directly from my faucet had a lower reading (i.e., was more pure) than the water which ran through the Tubo tub filter...
body_zh: 您可以选择两条带子，以便将其挂在浴缸水龙头上，但硬塑料带确实很难连接到设备上。事实上，一个连接到底座的手柄在我试图连接它时裂开了。然后，当您没有分流器时，附在水龙头上的尼龙搭扣带就会失效，因此该设备最终出现在我的浴缸底部。 我要说的是：如果您向他们发送有关其产品的电子邮件，该公司会非常积极地回应。 我发现了一件奇怪的事情：我使用我的 TDS 计（一种用于确定水纯度的手持设备），直接来自我的水龙头的水的读数比通过 Tubo 浴缸过滤器的水更低（即更纯净）......

title: Water pressure will affect flow (see clip)
title_zh: 水压会影响流量（见剪辑）
body: Interesting little water filter that at least helps me to feel better when bathing my little ones. There are a bunch of balls inside the encased plastic filter. The balls are NOT accessible as the plastic filter is entirely sealed. I have an issue with my water pressure where the pressure is higher the warmer I crank the water. On the warmest crank up, some of the water overflows, as one can see in the vid. (-1) The water will not overflow but the pressure had to be less, which results in a lukewarm bath. Included are three ways to keep the bell-shaped filter in place and set-up is easy. I have no way to find out if the water that comes out has 99% less Chlorine and Contaminants but the kids seem to like it.

title: Easy to use
body: Picked this up mostly for peace of mind. I liked the idea of filtering out the unwanted stuff from bath water. I don’t have the lab setup to test if it actually removes 99% of whatever, but I can say the install was super simple, and it fits right on the tub without any hassle. You can actually see the water flow through it and it looks like it’s doing something. Doesn’t mess with the water pressure and there hasn't been any leaks or anything. Build quality seems solid too. If nothing else, it’s one of those products that just gives you a little peace of mind. Worth it in my book.
body_zh: 之所以选择这个，主要是为了内心的平静。我喜欢从洗澡水中过滤掉不需要的东西的想法。我没有实验室设置来测试它是否真的能去除 99% 的东西，但我可以说安装非常简单，而且它正好适合浴缸，没有任何麻烦。 您实际上可以看到水流过它，看起来它正在做某事。不会影响水压，也没有任何泄漏或任何东西。构建质量似乎也很可靠。 如果不出意外的话，它就是让您安心的产品之一。在我的书中值得。

title: Meh
body: Been using this filter for a little while now and I am on the fence with it. To me, it doesn't seem to make much of a difference in our water but my husband says he can tell it's been filtered. Not sure the change is drastic enough to warrant the price tag.

title: I wish I could use it
body: I do not have a stopper on my faucet, and there is no way to keep this thing from sliding, so therefore it does not fit. It came with some velcro and some pieces that look like that's supposed to somehow keep it from sliding? It def does not. It's a real disappointment too because everything else about this purifier looks great.

title: Great Design, Easy to Use, and Toddler-Friendly!
title_zh: 出色的设计、易于使用且适合幼儿！
body: I really love the design of this bath water filter, it's sleek, thoughtful, and fits nicely into our bath setup. It comes with two different handle types, which is a nice bonus. I chose the non hard plastic option, and it works perfectly with our bath socket, especially with the added safety cushion for my toddler. That peace of mind is priceless. While I can’t scientifically confirm how well it filters the water, I do feel better knowing there’s an extra layer of protection for my little one’s sensitive skin. The peace of mind alone makes it worth it. The only downside was the instructions as they were pretty vague, and I had a tough time figuring out where to insert the straps. I almost broke a piece trying to get it set up. But once I got it in place, it’s been super easy to use ever since. Overall, I’m happy with the purchase and would recommend it, especially for parents looking for a gentle bath solution for their kids!
body_zh: 我真的很喜欢这款浴缸滤水器的设计，它时尚、贴心，非常适合我们的浴室设置。它有两种不同的手柄类型，这是一个很好的好处。我选择了非硬塑料选项，它与我们的浴室插座完美配合，尤其是为我的孩子添加了安全垫。这种内心的平静是无价的。 虽然我无法科学地证实它过滤水的效果如何，但我确实感觉好多了，因为我知道它为我孩子的敏感皮肤提供了一层额外的保护。光是内心的平静就值得了。 唯一的缺点是说明非常模糊，我很难弄清楚在哪里插入带子。我试图把它安装好时差点弄坏了一块。但一旦我把它安装到位，它就变得非常容易使用。 总的来说，我对购买感到满意，并会推荐它，特别是对于为孩子寻找温和沐浴液的父母！

body: This is quite easy to use. For my spigot, I can just hang it. The kit comes with several different ways to attach it to different types of spigots. Simple assembly. The only downside for me is that if I leave it hanging, the filter gets used up even with showers. I just set it aside but that could be inconvenient for some. The water that comes out is nice - no residue and my skin feels soft.

title: Make sure your bath spout has a knob!
title_zh: 确保您的浴缸出水口有旋钮！
body: Since I don't have a whole house water filtration system, I thought I'd give this a try on my tub. Unfortunately, the older faucet system I have does not have a diverter knob, so even with the velcro strip, the unit does not stay on the bath spout. For the time that it did hold, the water delivery running through the filter was adequate and appeared to be working. Can't say I really noticed a difference, but I like the idea of cleaner water when I am giving my grandkids a bath. The unit is fairly heavy and it has already dropped several times in the tub, so I hope it will hold up and not crack.
body_zh: 由于我没有整个房子的水过滤系统，我想我应该在我的浴缸上尝试一下。不幸的是，我使用的旧水龙头系统没有分流旋钮，因此即使使用尼龙搭扣带，该装置也不会留在浴缸喷嘴上。在它确实存在的时间内，通过过滤器的供水量充足并且似乎正在工作。不能说我真的注意到了差异，但我喜欢在给我的孙子们洗澡时使用更清洁的水。该装置相当重，并且已经在浴缸中掉落了好几次，所以我希望它能够支撑住并且不会破裂。

title: Easy to use added filtration for baths
title_zh: 易于使用的浴缸附加过滤装置
body: This bath filter seems to work well, our water pressure was almost too high for it to process it but it did end up working. We have a well with a complex filtration system but end up with some yucky looking water on occasion which is never fun to bathe in. I’m hoping this will help those situations. It adds a sense of comfort that my children’s bath water is getting additional filtration. We did have an issue on first use with discolored water but aren’t sure if that’s to be expected (maybe it needs to be flushed initially)? It’s also hard to say without testing the water the quality of filtration. Installation was easy, time will tell if it’s effective.
body_zh: 这个浴缸过滤器似乎工作得很好，我们的水压几乎太高，无法处理它，但它最终还是工作了。我们有一口井，有一个复杂的过滤系统，但有时会得到一些看起来很恶心的水，洗澡从来都不是一件有趣的事。我希望这会对这些情况有所帮助。我孩子们的洗澡水得到了额外的过滤，这增加了一种舒适感。 我们在第一次使用变色水时确实遇到了问题，但不确定这是否是预期的（也许最初需要冲洗）？如果不测试水的过滤质量也很难说。安装很简单，时间会证明它是否有效。

title: I have some faith that it does some good
title_zh: 我有信心它会带来一些好处
body: The Tubo Bath Filter 2.0 is an original 8-stage bath water filter designed for tub faucets. It claims to eliminate 99% of chlorine and other contaminants, and it's BPA-free, promoting healthier skin and hair. Installation is straightforward; you simply attach it to your tub faucet. While it’s supposed to effectively filter out chlorine and impurities, I can't verify its performance since I lack testing equipment. The filter is quite sizable, which gives me confidence that it incorporates all eight filtration methods. I plan to continue using it, as I believe having a filter is better than not having one at all. My kids find it fascinating during bath time and often ask questions about it. It's got a modern design which I like. The weight, look and size of it give me comfort that it probably does do some good at least when it comes to functionality. I hope my review proves helpful to you!
body_zh: Tubo 浴缸过滤器 2.0 是一款专为浴缸水龙头设计的原创 8 级浴缸水过滤器。它声称可以消除 99% 的氯和其他污染物，并且不含 BPA，可促进皮肤和头发更健康。安装简单；您只需将其连接到浴缸水龙头即可。虽然它应该可以有效过滤掉氯和杂质，但由于缺乏测试设备，我无法验证其性能。过滤器相当大，这让我相信它包含了所有八种过滤方法。我打算继续使用它，因为我相信有过滤器比没有过滤器要好。我的孩子们在洗澡时发现它很有趣，并且经常问有关它的问题。它有我喜欢的现代设计。它的重量、外观和尺寸让我感到安慰，至少在功能方面它可能确实有一些好处。 我希望我的评论对您有所帮助！

I believe it is the same style of filtration that is used on most name brand drinking water filters as well.

title: Simple design and works..........maybe
title_zh: 简单的设计和工作......也许
body: All these bathtub filters are quite the rage right now. I came across this one and decided to give it a try and see what they are all about. First these are a simple pass through water filter. It claims an eight stage filter but not sure how it accomplishes that as the filter is a round disk with some sort of stuff inside it. You can see the stuff through the screen. It comes with 2 types of handles for hanging it on your downspout. It also has a Velcro patch to help hold it in place if you do not have a water diverter. It does filter your water to how much degree, Im not sure. I would say the logic behind these makes since and I could see the benefits from using one if it did filter your water and you didn't have a whole house water filtration system like i do. You can have your water running at a pretty good rate of flow without this filter backing up. Which is a good and a bad thing as any good water filter I know that is not pressurized takes time to really filter the water so that lends me to believe this might not filter out as much as folks expect. It would be nice to know what they are claiming to be filtering out of the water. For those reasons I give this 3 stars.
body_zh: 所有这些浴缸过滤器现在都很流行。我偶然发现了这个，并决定尝试一下，看看它们到底是什么。首先，这些是简单的直通式水过滤器。它声称有一个八级过滤器，但不确定它是如何实现的，因为过滤器是一个圆盘，里面有某种东西。你可以通过屏幕看到这些东西。它配有 2 种类型的手柄，可将其挂在落水管上。如果您没有分水器，它还有一个尼龙搭扣贴片可以帮助将其固定到位。它确实可以过滤你的水到什么程度，我不确定。我想说的是，这些背后的逻辑是这样的，如果它确实过滤了你的水，而你没有像我一样有一个完整的房子水过滤系统，我可以看到使用它的好处。您可以让水以相当好的流速运行，而无需此过滤器备份。这是一件好事，也是一件坏事，因为我知道任何好的水过滤器如果没有加压，都需要时间来真正过滤水，所以这让我相信这可能不会像人们期望的那样过滤掉那么多水。很高兴知道他们声称从水中过滤了什么。出于这些原因，我给这家酒店 3 星。

title: For sparkling clean kids
body: When parents already struggle with getting their kids to take their bath enough as it is, it is nice to know that one less worry for them at least will be the harsh chemicals that are available in tap water, such as chlorine, fluorine and hard water minerals that cannot be great for childrens' sensitive skin. I disagree with some reviews here that this may not be for every bathtub. While the photos show the basket suspends easiest over the faucets that use the diverter knob at the top to keep it from slipping off, this is why they also include a more extended length cable as well as velcro fasteners for extra anchoring. Mine doesn't have the diverter knob, but with the extra cables, it holds just fine. It is a tiny bit of an additional hassle. You may need to supervise kids and tell them not to use this item in their bathtime toys. I have yet to see the long-term effects of how this thing functions, but so far the kids are not rashy or itchy, which makes them reluctant toward bathtime. Also, their hair is not nearly as tangly. Seems promising.
body_zh: 当父母已经很难让孩子充分洗澡时，很高兴知道至少让他们少担心自来水中含有的刺激性化学物质，如氯、氟和硬水矿物质，这些化学物质对儿童敏感的皮肤不利。我不同意这里的一些评论，认为这可能并不适合每个浴缸。虽然照片显示篮子最容易悬挂在水龙头上方，水龙头使用顶部的转向旋钮以防止其滑落，但这就是为什么它们还包括更长的电缆以及用于额外锚定的魔术贴紧固件。我的没有转向旋钮，但有了额外的电缆，它就可以很好地固定。这是一个额外的麻烦。您可能需要监督孩子并告诉他们不要在洗澡玩具中使用此物品。我还没有看到这个东西如何发挥作用的长期影响，但到目前为止，孩子们并没有出现皮疹或发痒，这让他们不愿意洗澡。而且，他们的头发也没有那么打结。看起来很有希望。

title: Works but does not improve water quality
body: Gave this bath filter a shot hoping it would improve my water quality at home, but it fell short. When I opened the replacement filter, I was surprised and disappointed to find grime stuck under the plastic wrapping. After cleaning it thoroughly, some dark sticky spots still remained, which was really unappealing. To make matters worse, rinsing it in the bathroom sink left greasy stains behind, creating more mess instead of cleaning things up. I also ran a water test to check if it was effective at filtering out impurities, but the readings didn’t budge at all — the PPM stayed the same before and after using the filter. Compared to my reverse osmosis system at work, which lowers PPM drastically, this felt like a waste of time. I wanted something handy and helpful during my daily showers, but this just didn’t meet the expectations. It might be okay for some people, but if you need real improvement in water purity, you might want to look elsewhere.
body_zh: 我试了这个浴缸过滤器，希望能改善家里的水质，但效果不佳。当我打开替换滤网时，惊讶又失望地发现塑料膜下还粘着污垢。彻底清理后，仍有一些深色粘稠的斑点，非常不舒服。更糟的是，在浴室水槽冲洗后留下了油渍，反而制造了更多混乱，而不是清理干净。我还做了水质测试，看看它是否有效过滤杂质，但读数一点也没变——使用滤器前后PPM保持不变。相比我工作时用的反渗透系统，它能大幅降低PPM，这感觉像是在浪费时间。我想要在日常洗澡时有个方便又实用的东西，但这根本达不到我的期望。这对某些人来说可能没问题，但如果你真的需要水质的提升，可能要考虑别的地方。

title: Great filter for bath can you close the window?
title_zh: 浴缸过滤器很棒，你能关上窗户吗？
body: I didn’t realize how much my bath water was affecting my skin until I started using this filter. The difference was noticeable right away. The water feels softer, there’s no strong chlorine smell, and my skin doesn’t feel tight or itchy after soaking anymore. I have sensitive skin, and this has been a game changer—especially for long baths. My skin feels smoother and more hydrated, and even my hair feels less dry when I rinse off. Installation was quick and easy, no tools needed, and it fit my tub faucet perfectly. If you take baths regularly or have dry or sensitive skin, this is 100% worth it. It feels like a small upgrade that makes a big difference in comfort and skin health. I’ll definitely keep repurchasing.
body_zh: 直到我开始使用这个过滤器，我才意识到洗澡水对我的皮肤有多大影响。差异立刻就显而易见了。水感觉更柔和，没有浓烈的氯味，浸泡后皮肤不再感到紧绷或发痒。 我的皮肤很敏感，这改变了游戏规则——尤其是长时间洗澡时。我的皮肤感觉更光滑、更水润，甚至当我冲洗时，我的头发也感觉不那么干燥了。安装快速简单，无需任何工具，而且非常适合我的浴缸水龙头。 如果你经常洗澡或者皮肤干燥或敏感，这是100%值得的。感觉就像一次小小的升级，但在舒适度和皮肤健康方面却产生了很大的不同。我一定会一直回购的。

title: Inefficient Water Filter System with High Flow Issues
title_zh: 水过滤系统效率低下，存在高流量问题
body: The single faucet system's design flaw leads to excessive water flow that overwhelms the filter's capacity. Despite efforts to adjust the handle or use a splash guard, a significant amount of water spills over the sides, rendering the filtration process ineffective. It seems that the positive reviews may be from users with alternative hot/cold tap setups or different faucet mechanisms. In light of this issue, I have decided to return this product and opt for vitamin C dechlorination tablets to address our primary concern of chlorine removal.
body_zh: 单水龙头系统的设计缺陷导致水流过多，超出了过滤器的容量。尽管努力调整手柄或使用防溅罩，但仍有大量水溢出侧面，导致过滤过程无效。看来正面评价可能来自具有替代热/冷水龙头设置或不同水龙头机制的用户。鉴于这个问题，我决定退回该产品并选择维生素C除氯片来解决我们最关心的除氯问题。

title: Easy setup and works fast
body: I always felt itchy or dry after showering, no matter what body wash I tried. I started to suspect the issue was our hard water, so I decided to install this bathtub filter. It feels sturdy and durable, and even if it falls, it doesn’t break easily. Installing it took just a few minutes, and I didn’t need any tools since it fit directly on our existing faucet. I was happy it worked perfectly with our old bathtub model, saving me from having to replace the fixture. The pink design adds a soft touch of color that looks nice in the bathroom. The filter combines vitamin C, minerals, and magnetic beads, and from the first use, I could tell the water felt smoother and cleaner. It didn’t leave that fake slippery feeling but instead made my skin feel soft and hydrated. The chlorine smell disappeared completely, and even the air in the bathroom feels fresher now. Bath time has become a relaxing experience, almost like being at a spa.
body_zh: 无论我尝试什么沐浴露，淋浴后我总是感到发痒或干燥。我开始怀疑问题出在我们的硬水上，所以我决定安装这个浴缸过滤器。感觉坚固耐用，即使摔倒也不会轻易破裂。安装只需几分钟，而且我不需要任何工具，因为它直接安装在我们现有的水龙头上。我很高兴它与我们的旧浴缸模型完美配合，使我不必更换固定装置。粉红色的设计增添了柔和的色彩，在浴室里看起来很漂亮。该过滤器结合了维生素 C、矿物质和磁珠，从第一次使用开始，我就感觉水变得更光滑、更干净。它没有留下那种假滑的感觉，而是让我的皮肤感觉柔软和水润。氯气的味道完全消失了，连浴室里的空气都感觉清新了。沐浴时间已成为一种轻松的体验，几乎就像在水疗中心一样。

title: Easy to Install and Makes Bath Water Feel Softer
title_zh: 易于安装，让洗澡水感觉更柔和
body: This bath filter feels durable. The ABS material is strong, and it doesn’t leak or loosen after multiple uses. It fits well on my bathtub faucet and doesn’t restrict water flow. The water comes out clear and odor free. I also like that it’s filled with different mineral and vitamin C balls it makes the water feel smoother on the skin. It’s a nice, affordable upgrade that makes bath time more pleasant.
body_zh: 这款浴缸过滤器感觉很耐用。 ABS材质坚固，多次使用后不会泄漏或松动。它非常适合我的浴缸水龙头，不会限制水流。出来的水清澈无味。我还喜欢它富含不同的矿物质和维生素 C 球，让水在皮肤上感觉更光滑。这是一个不错的、经济实惠的升级，让沐浴时间更加愉快。

title: Easy to Install
body: The Water Filter for Tub and Faucet is a useful tool for bath water to be cleaner and softer. The size fits in well with most bathroom and easy to use . It connects to the faucet easily, with no tools or complicated steps needed. The fit is snug and there are no leaks. You can tell that the water is different. It makes the water smell and feel less harsh, it feel smoother and gentler on the skin. After rinsing, hair feels softer, and after soaking in the tub, it feels less dry. This makes it easy to use, The outer casing feels strong, and it should be able to handle a lot of use without breaking .
body_zh: 浴缸和水龙头滤水器是让洗澡水更干净、更柔和的有用工具。尺寸适合大多数浴室且易于使用。它可以轻松连接到水龙头，无需任何工具或复杂的步骤。贴合紧密且无泄漏。你可以看出水是不同的。它使水的气味和感觉不那么刺鼻，皮肤感​​觉更光滑、更温和。冲洗后，头发感觉更柔软，浸泡在浴缸中后，感觉不那么干燥。这使得它易于使用，外壳感觉很坚固，应该能够承受大量使用而不会破裂。

title: Cute and Effective Bath Faucet Filter
title_zh: 可爱又有效的浴缸水龙头过滤器
body: This pink bath water filter is both functional and adorable. It attaches securely to the tub faucet using the soft silicone straps, and installation took less than a minute. The multi-layer filter beads visibly clean the water — it feels smoother and has no chlorine smell. I’ve been using it for baths all week, and my skin feels noticeably softer. It doesn’t affect water flow either, which I love. Simple, stylish, and really useful for daily baths.
body_zh: 这款粉色沐浴水过滤器既实用又可爱。它使用柔软的硅胶带牢固地固定在浴缸水龙头上，安装过程不到一分钟。多层滤珠明显净化了水——感觉更光滑，而且没有氯味。我整个星期都用它洗澡，我的皮肤感觉明显柔软了。它也不会影响水流，这是我喜欢的。简单、时尚，非常适合日常沐浴。

title: Easy setup, makes water feel a bit different
title_zh: 设置简单，让水感觉有点不同
body: Packaging was okay, and the item came in one piece. It's made of plastic, but doesn’t feel too flimsy. I followed the small instruction card and got it installed without using tools. Just had to pull the straps tight. The water flow seems normal after attaching it. I can’t say for sure how much it’s filtering, but the water looks clear and might feel a touch softer. Didn’t see anything unusual or leaking after a few uses. It’s a simple thing that could be helpful depending on your water. Some may notice a change, some may not. I got it mostly to try something new. So far no issues with it staying on the faucet.
body_zh: 包装很好，东西是一件的。它由塑料制成，但感觉不太脆弱。我按照小说明卡安装了它，没有使用任何工具。只得把带子拉紧。 安装后水流正常。我不能确定它的过滤程度，但水看起来很清澈，而且可能感觉更柔和。使用几次后没有发现任何异常或泄漏。 这是一件简单的事情，根据您的水的不同，它可能会有帮助。有些人可能会注意到变化，有些人可能不会。我得到它主要是为了尝试新的东西。到目前为止，它留在水龙头上没有任何问题。

title: Gentle water makes all the difference
title_zh: 温和的水让一切变得不同
body: As a dad to a 6-month-old with sensitive skin, bath time has always been a bit stressful. I came across this bathtub water filter and decided to give it a shot, it’s been such a relief. From the very first use, the water felt noticeably softer, my daughter’s skin didn’t dry out or turn red afterward. The little patches on her arms started to fade, even her scalp looked less flaky after a few days. It’s easy to attach to the faucet, I like that it’s BPA-free and built to last a while with its 8000-gallon capacity. We live in an area where tap water tends to have a strong chemical smell, this filter really took that away. Now bath time feels gentler and safer, I can see the difference every time I dry her off.
body_zh: 作为一个皮肤敏感的 6 个月大孩子的父亲，洗澡时间总是有点压力。我偶然发现了这个浴缸滤水器，并决定尝试一下，这真是一种解脱。从第一次使用开始，水感觉明显更柔软，之后我女儿的皮肤没有变干或变红。几天后，她手臂上的小斑点开始褪色，就连头皮也看起来不再那么剥落。 它很容易连接到水龙头上，我喜欢它不含 BPA，并且具有 8000 加仑的容量，可以持续一段时间。我们生活的地区自来水往往有强烈的化学气味，这个过滤器确实消除了这种气味。现在洗澡感觉更温和、更安全，每次擦干她时我都能看到不同。

title: Easy to attach, water feels cleaner than usual
title_zh: 易于安装，水感觉比平常更干净
body: Got this to use on a basic tub faucet, and the install was pretty straighforward. It came with the elastic band to help hold it in place, and once secured, it stayed on during normal use. The material feels light but didn’t seem too flimsy either. Can’t say for sure what all it filters out, but the water does seem a bit softer and doesn’t have the same tap smell it used to. Might just be me, but the difference is noticable enough. Haven’t seen any leaking or weird issues so far. Probably not for super high pressure setups, but for everyday bath usage, it seems to be doing its job.
body_zh: 把它用在基本的浴缸水龙头上，安装非常简单。它配有松紧带，可帮助将其固定到位，固定后，它在正常使用过程中会保持在原位。这种材料摸起来很轻，但也不会显得太脆弱。 不能肯定地说它过滤掉了什么，但水看起来确实有点软，而且没有以前那样的水龙头气味。可能只是我，但差异已经足够明显了。到目前为止还没有发现任何泄漏或奇怪的问题。 可能不适合超高压设置，但对于日常沐浴使用，它似乎正在发挥作用。

title: Impressive Water Clarity and Feel
title_zh: 令人印象深刻的水透明度和感觉
body: I installed this bathtub filter directly on the sink faucet using the included adapter. It fits tight and doesn’t leak. After two baths, the water looked clearer and didn’t have that faint chlorine smell anymore. The combination of KDF55, activated carbon, zeolite, and tourmaline seems to really purify the water. My hands feel softer and even the soap lathers better. The filter housing is made of ABS plastic that feels sturdy — no heat deformation when using hot water. It claims 8000 gallons lifespan, and I believe it might last that long with regular cleaning. I took it apart once just to check the filter balls, and they still looked fine. Very satisfied so far, especially for something so easy to install and maintain.
body_zh: 我使用随附的适配器将浴缸过滤器直接安装在水槽水龙头上。它贴合紧密且不会泄漏。洗了两次澡，水看起来更清澈了，不再有那种淡淡的氯味了。 KDF55、活性炭、沸石和电气石的组合似乎确实可以净化水。我的手感觉更柔软，甚至肥皂的泡沫也更好了。过滤器外壳由 ABS 塑料制成，手感坚固，使用热水时不会受热变形。它声称有 8000 加仑的使用寿命，我相信如果定期清洁的话，它可能会持续那么久。我把它拆开一次只是为了检查过滤球，它们看起来仍然很好。到目前为止非常满意，特别是对于如此易于安装和维护的东西。

title: cute and easy to install bath filter
title_zh: 可爱且易于安装的浴缸过滤器
body: I got this pink bath water filter mainly for my bathtub faucet, and setting it up was super simple. It came with everything I needed, and it screwed right on without any tools. The connection felt tight and secure, no leaks at all. I like that it’s not bulky, it looks neat and actually matches my bathroom pretty well. The pink color gives it a softer look compared to the usual plain white ones. I use it for both baths and when washing my face, and it works smoothly with steady water flow. The outer casing feels solid, and the filter inside looks well made. It fits nicely on my sink faucet too, so I sometimes move it between the tub and sink depending on what I need. I’ve been using it daily for a few weeks, and so far it’s holding up great. The instructions were clear about how to replace the cartridge when it’s time, which seems straightforward. If I had to mention a small thing, it’s a bit larger , but that’s minor. Overall, it’s a cute, practical filter that’s easy to use and feels well built.
body_zh: 我买了这个粉红色的洗澡水过滤器，主要用于我的浴缸水龙头，设置非常简单。它配备了我需要的一切，并且无需任何工具即可拧紧。连接感觉紧密且牢固，根本没有泄漏。我喜欢它不笨重，看起来很整洁，而且实际上很适合我的浴室。与通常的纯白色相比，粉红色使其看起来更柔和。我洗澡和洗脸时都用它，它工作顺利，水流稳定。外壳摸起来很扎实，里面的过滤器看起来做工也很精良。它也非常适合我的水槽水龙头，所以我有时会根据需要在浴缸和水槽之间移动它。我已经每天使用它几个星期了，到目前为止它的效果很好。说明很清楚如何在需要时更换墨盒，这看起来很简单。如果非要提一件小事的话，那就是有点大了，但那是小事。总体而言，它是一款可爱实用的过滤器，易于使用且做工精良。

title: Feel Cleaner and Softer
body: I got this filter mainly to reduce chlorine and make bath water gentler on my skin. It was easy to attach and the difference in water quality is noticeable right away. My skin feels less itchy and dry and my hair isn’t as frizzy after showers. The water comes out clear and feels smooth and I don’t notice that chemical smell anymore. The design is cute and it doesn’t leak or splash.
body_zh: 我买这个过滤器主要是为了减少氯并使洗澡水对我的皮肤更温和。它很容易安装，水质的差异立即显而易见。淋浴后我的皮肤感觉不再那么痒和干燥，头发也不再那么卷曲。出来的水清澈透明，感觉光滑，我不再注意到化学气味了。设计很可爱，不会泄漏或飞溅。
