title: Works fine and easy to hook up
body: Took just a minute to get this set up, no tools needed. The small band holds it steady and the hose stayed in place even with water on full. I wasn’t sure how it would go with my faucet, but it fit better than expected. The water came out softer than usual and had no odd smell which I appreciate. I’ve been using it about a week and the flow hasn’t dropped or anything. Looks kinda cute too, and doesn't feel bulky. Package was simple and arrived without delay. If you’re looking for something to use with baths or for washing your face this is a nice little add-on.
body_zh: 只需一分钟即可完成此设置，无需任何工具。小带子使其保持稳定，即使水满了，软管也能保持在原位。我不确定它与我的水龙头搭配如何，但它比预期的更合适。出来的水比平常更柔和，没有奇怪的气味，这一点我很欣赏。我已经使用了大约一周了，流量没有下降什么的。看起来也很可爱，而且不会觉得笨重。包裹很简单，很快就到达了。如果您正在寻找洗澡或洗脸的东西，这是一个不错的小附加组件。

title: Simple way to make bath time feel nicer
title_zh: 让沐浴时间感觉更美好的简单方法
body: It’s a soft silicone filter that fits fine on my bathroom faucet and doesn’t need any tools to set up, just loop the straps and adjust a bit. Wasn’t sure how well it’d stay in place but after a few uses it hasn’t moved or leaked. The water flows down with no problem and the filter part is built in, not something I need to change all the time. I use it mostly for bath soaking and the water does feel a little gentler than usual, not sure if that’s just me or not. It’s a small thing but adds a nice touch, and it’s kinda cute looking too. Arrived about a week after ordering and everything was in good shape.
body_zh: 它是一种柔软的硅胶过滤器，非常适合我的浴室水龙头，不需要任何工具即可安装，只需将带子绕成一圈并稍作调整即可。不确定它的固定效果如何，但经过几次使用后，它没有移动或泄漏。水流下来没有问题，过滤器部分是内置的，不需要我一直更换。我主要用它来泡澡，感觉水确实比平时温和一点，不知道是不是只有我这样。这是一个小东西，但却增添了一种不错的触感，而且看起来也很可爱。订购后大约一周到达，一切状况良好。
persona_evidence: {"泡澡护理/放松型用户": ["Simple way to make bath time feel nicer", "I use it mostly for bath soaking and the water does feel a little g"]}

title: Decent little filter, easy to clip on and use
title_zh: 不错的小过滤器，易于夹住和使用
body: Got this mainly to try for softer water when rinsing off and it clips on fine to my tub faucet. The straps are stretchy enough to fit and it hasn’t slipped off during use. Water comes out normally, not too slow or blocked. It’s a bit larger than I thought but doesn’t really get in the way. Haven’t opened the filter part but there are layers inside like shown in the pics. Been using it for a few showers now and noticed it feels a bit smoother on skin and no odd smell. Package was sealed and came in maybe 6 days or so. I’ll prob get another one later if it keeps holding up.
body_zh: 买这个主要是为了在冲洗时尝试使用更软的水，它可以很好地夹在我的浴缸水龙头上。肩带有足够的弹性，可以贴合，并且在使用过程中不会滑落。出水正常，不会太慢或堵塞。它比我想象的要大一点，但并不妨碍。没有打开过滤器部分，但里面有层，如图所示。现在已经用它洗过几次澡了，发现皮肤感觉更光滑，而且没有异味。包裹是密封的，大约 6 天左右就到了。如果它继续坚持的话，我稍后可能会再买一个。

title: Safe and Soothing for Baby’s Bath
title_zh: 给宝宝洗澡，安全又舒缓
body: I got this bath water filter to use when giving my baby a bath, and it gives me a lot of peace of mind. The water feels softer and cleaner, and I know it’s removing chlorine and other contaminants that could irritate my baby’s sensitive skin. Installation was very easy, and it fits perfectly on our bathtub faucet. I can already see a difference—my baby’s skin feels smoother after bath time and there’s less dryness or irritation. I also like that it contains vitamin C and minerals, which makes the bath feel gentle and refreshing. The filter seems durable and well-made, and it’s reassuring to know it can filter thousands of gallons of water. It’s a simple way to make bath time safer and more comfortable for my little one, and I feel confident using it every time.
body_zh: 我给宝宝洗澡时使用了这个洗澡水过滤器，它让我安心很多。水感觉更柔软、更干净，我知道它可以去除氯和其他可能刺激宝宝敏感皮肤的污染物。安装非常简单，非常适合我们的浴缸水龙头。我已经看到了不同之处——沐浴后我宝宝的皮肤感觉更光滑，干燥或刺激也减少了。我还喜欢它含有维生素C和矿物质，让沐浴感觉温和、清爽。该过滤器看起来耐用且制作精良，并且令人放心的是它可以过滤数千加仑的水。这是一种让我的小宝贝洗澡更安全、更舒适的简单方法，我每次使用它都充满信心。

title: Gentle Enough for Sensitive Skin
title_zh: 足够温和，适合敏感肌肤
body: I installed this water filter after noticing that my skin felt tight and itchy after baths recently, and it’s made a noticeable difference. The water feels softer, and I haven’t had the usual dryness and flare ups around my elbows and knees. The filter was easy to attach and hasn’t come loose, even with daily use. I like knowing that it’s filtering out chlorine and other hard minerals in my tap water without needing extra complicated steps and wiring. It's such a simple setup compared to what some of my neighbor had to install to get a water softening system. This simple filter works well for me. My skin doesn't feel as dry as before thanks to this water filter.

title: Turns my bath into mini spa
title_zh: 把我的浴室变成迷你水疗中心
body: The first thing that stood out was how easy this filter was to install, it clicked neatly into place, and the soft pink finish looks elegant against my chrome faucet. The housing feels smooth and sturdy with a gentle satin texture that doesn’t scratch or stain easily. The real surprise came after the first bath. The water felt noticeably softer, almost silky on my skin. The usual faint chemical smell I’d get from the tap was gone, replaced by a fresh, neutral scent that made soaking feel like a spa session. Even my bath salts seemed to dissolve better. It’s one of those little upgrades that changes your whole routine, quiet, simple, and effective. Every time I run a bath now, it feels cleaner and calmer.
body_zh: 首先引人注目的是这个过滤器的安装是多么容易，它整齐地卡入到位，柔和的粉红色饰面在我的镀铬水龙头的映衬下看起来很优雅。外壳摸起来光滑而坚固，具有柔和的缎面质感，不易刮伤或弄脏。 真正的惊喜来自第一次洗澡后。水感觉明显更柔软，在我的皮肤上几乎如丝般柔滑。通常从水龙头中闻到的微弱化学气味消失了，取而代之的是清新、中性的气味，让浸泡感觉就像在做水疗。甚至我的浴盐似乎也溶解得更好。 这是改变您整个日常生活的小升级之一，安静、简单且有效。现在每次洗澡都感觉干净、平静。

title: Works Well
body: My wife likes this bath filter. It was easy to set up and place in our bathtub. It does a good job of helping our water feel nice and less stressful on her skin. The filter has a good flow through rate that can handle a decent water stream from our faucet. The filter looks and feels like it is well made and feels quite durable. My wife likes the bath filter for its ease of use and solid performance. It is a nice option for a bath filter.

title: Clean, Clear, and Chemical-Free Baths

body: This bath filter exceeded my expectations! The water feels cleaner, smells better, and leaves no residue on my tub or skin. I used to get mild itchiness after soaking in the bath, but that completely disappeared after I started using this filter. You can actually feel the difference — the water feels softer and purer. The design is sleek, and it connects securely to the faucet. If you’re trying to remove chlorine and other contaminants without complicated plumbing, this is the perfect solution.

title: Product works but installation is difficult and results vary
title_zh: 产品有效，但安装困难且结果各不相同
body: Zero satisfaction with this water filter. I bought it hoping to clear out the black sediment coming from the old pipes at my apartment, especially since the management refuses to fix them. Unfortunately, even after installing it in my kitchen sink, I still see large chunks of sediment in the water. Installation was another headache; it didn’t fit well on my faucet, causing water to overflow instead of filtering through properly. I also tested the water hardness after use with strips for my kids' baths, expecting some improvement—there was none. At this price, I expected a handy solution, but it just didn’t deliver. It might work for someone with perfectly compatible faucets, but it was a disappointing experience for me at home.
body_zh: 对该滤水器的满意度为零。我买它是希望清除我公寓旧管道中的黑色沉积物，特别是因为管理层拒绝修复它们。不幸的是，即使将其安装在厨房水槽中，我仍然看到水中有大块的沉积物。安装是另一个令人头疼的问题。它不太适合我的水龙头，导致水溢出而不是正确过滤。我还测试了孩子洗澡时使用的水条后的水硬度，希望能有所改善，但结果却没有。以这个价格，我期待一个方便的解决方案，但它只是没有提供。它可能适合那些拥有完美兼容水龙头的人，但对于我在家来说，这是一次令人失望的经历。

title: Simple, Effective Filter for Better Bath Water
title_zh: 简单、有效的过滤器可提供更好的沐浴水
body: This bath filter works well and was easy to set up. I just placed it under the tub faucet and let the water run through it, no tools or complicated steps needed. The water feels noticeably softer, and it’s been gentle on the skin and hair, especially for my kids.I also like that it’s lightweight but solid, and the handle makes it easy to hang or remove after each bath. After using it for a while, I can honestly feel the difference in the bath water quality.
body_zh: 该浴缸过滤器工作良好且易于安装。我只是将它放在浴缸水龙头下，让水流过它，不需要任何工具或复杂的步骤。水感觉明显更柔软，对皮肤和头发很温和，尤其是对我的孩子来说。我还喜欢它的重量轻但坚固，并且每次沐浴后都有手柄可以轻松悬挂或取下。使用一段时间后，我确实能感受到洗澡水质的差异。

title: Perfect for sensitive skin—noticeable improvement in my skin and hair after use
title_zh: 非常适合敏感肌肤——使用后我的皮肤和头发有明显改善
body: I need to invest in a high-quality shower filter to ensure our family’s health and safety, especially since my children share the same bathtub. The installation was simple. The adjustable Velcro strap provided a perfect fit for my tub faucet, requiring no tools at all. It is lightweight and secure, and I was able to set it up in less than a minute. I also love that it is portable, allowing me to take it with me when I travel. After using the filter a few weeks, I noticed a significant improvement in my skin and hair. The water feels softer and cleaner, and my skin no longer dry, itchy and tight after baths. My hair is noticeably smoother and less frizzy. It is incredibly how much better bath water can feel once chlorine, fluoride, and other impurities are filtered out. Overall, this product works perfectly for my sensitive skin, and I feel comfortable using it on my kids and pets as well. The water feels cleaner, my skin is softer, and my baths now truly feel like a spa experience. I am delighted with this upgrade to my bathing routine!
body_zh: 我需要投资购买高品质的淋浴过滤器，以确保我们家人的健康和安全，特别是因为我的孩子们共用同一个浴缸。安装很简单。可调节的尼龙搭扣带非常适合我的浴缸水龙头，根本不需要任何工具。它轻便且安全，我可以在不到一分钟的时间内完成设置。我还喜欢它的便携性，让我可以在旅行时随身携带。 使用过滤器几周后，我注意到我的皮肤和头发有了显着改善。水感觉更柔软、更干净，洗完澡后皮肤不再干燥、发痒、紧绷。我的头发明显更光滑，不再毛躁。令人难以置信的是，一旦氯、氟化物和其他杂质被过滤掉，洗澡水的感觉就会好得多。 总的来说，这款产品非常适合我敏感的皮肤，我也觉得在我的孩子和宠物身上使用它很舒服。水感觉更干净，我的皮肤更柔软，我的沐浴现在真正感觉就像一次水疗体验。我很高兴我的沐浴习惯得到了升级！

title: Total Relief for Sensitive Skin
body: My young daughter has really sensitive skin, and the chlorine in our city water always seemed to make her eczema flare up after bathtime. I got this Bath Water Filter hoping to see a difference, and I definitely have. The enhanced bath water purification really seems to be working; the water just feels softer, and I've noticed a reduction in her post-bath redness. This is a huge win for mothers and infants, or anyone with easily irritated skin.The easy installation was fantastic. It uses a simple adjustable Velcro strap that I just wrapped around our standard tub spout—it took less than two minutes, with no tools needed. We've been using it for about two weeks, giving her a bath every night, and the water flow is fine when I keep the pressure moderate, as the instructions suggest. For families who value health and need a simpler solution to get a cleaner, gentler bath, this filter provides a noticeable comfort upgrade.
body_zh: 我小女儿的皮肤非常敏感，而城市水中的氯似乎总是让她的湿疹在洗澡后突然发作。我买了这个沐浴水过滤器，希望能看到不同之处，我确实做到了。增强的洗澡水净化似乎确实有效；水感觉更柔和了，我注意到她洗完澡后的红肿现象减少了。对于母亲和婴儿或任何皮肤容易受刺激的人来说，这都是一个巨大的胜利。安装简单，非常棒。它使用了一个简单的可调节尼龙搭扣带，我只是将其缠绕在我们的标准浴缸喷嘴上 - 花费了不到两分钟的时间，并且不需要任何工具。我们已经使用它大约两周了，每晚给她洗澡，当我按照说明保持适度的压力时，水流很好。对于重视健康并需要更简单的解决方案来获得更清洁、更温和的浴缸的家庭来说，这款过滤器可显着提升舒适度。

title: Softer water and smoother skin
title_zh: 水质更柔软，皮肤更光滑
body: After showers, I sometimes had dry skin, so I decided to give this bathtub filter a try after doing some research. The filter housing is made of hard plastic that feels sturdy, and according to the manual, it can purify up to 2500 gallons of water, which makes it quite cost-effective for daily use. Installation was simple and didn’t require any tools. It attaches easily to the bathtub faucet with an adjustable Velcro strap, which only took a minute to set up. My faucet has a unique shape, but the strap is flexible enough to fit tightly without scratching it. During use, the water flow stays steady, and there are no leaks. The water no longer smells like disinfectant, and it feels softer on the skin. After bathing, my skin feels smooth instead of tight. It’s a small change that made my showers more comfortable.
body_zh: 淋浴后，我有时皮肤干燥，所以在做了一些研究后我决定尝试一下这个浴缸过滤器。过滤器外壳采用硬塑料制成，摸起来很坚固，根据说明书，它最多可以净化2500加仑的水，对于日常使用来说相当划算。安装很简单，不需要任何工具。它可以通过可调节的魔术贴带轻松连接到浴缸水龙头上，只需一分钟即可安装完毕。我的水龙头形状独特，但带子足够灵活，可以紧密贴合而不会刮伤。使用过程中，水流稳定，无漏水现象。水不再有消毒水的味道，皮肤感觉更柔软。沐浴后，我的皮肤感觉光滑而不是紧绷。这是一个小小的改变，让我的淋浴变得更加舒适。

title: Great for Sensitive Skin in Hard Water Areas
title_zh: 非常适合硬水地区的敏感肌肤
body: I live in an area of Arizona that has notoriously hard, chlorinated tap water, and taking a bath always left my sensitive skin itchy and dry afterwards. I was looking for a simple, non-permanent solution for the bathtub.The installation of this filter was very straightforward—it just attaches right onto the tub faucet with a flexible strap, no tools or plumbing required, which is great for renters. The water quality is definitely better; it doesn't have that harsh chemical smell anymore. I’ve been using it for a few days now, and my skin feels noticeably less irritated and dry after a soak. The 10-stage purification and pH balancing seem to be doing the trick. This filter is a solid choice for anyone with sensitive skin who needs to easily reduce irritants in their bath water at home.
body_zh: 我住在亚利桑那州的一个地区，那里的自来水是出了名的硬、氯化，洗澡后总是让我敏感的皮肤发痒和干燥。我一直在为浴缸寻找一种简单的、非永久性的解决方案。这个过滤器的安装非常简单——它只需用灵活的带子直接连接到浴缸水龙头上，不需要任何工具或管道，这对租房者来说非常有用。水质肯定更好；它不再有那种刺鼻的化学气味了。我已经使用它几天了，浸泡后我的皮肤感觉明显不那么刺激和干燥。 10 级纯化和 pH 平衡似乎起到了作用。对于皮肤敏感、需要轻松减少家里洗澡水中的刺激物的人来说，这款过滤器是一个不错的选择。

title: Perfect for Sensitive Skin & Easy to Use Anywhere
title_zh: 非常适合敏感肌肤且易于在任何地方使用
body: As someone with dry, sensitive skin that always feels tight after baths, I’ve tried a few water filters before, but this one stands out for how well it works and how simple it is to use. The installation was a breeze—no tools needed, just wrap the Velcro strap around my tub faucet and adjust it to fit. It stayed secure even when I switched between hot and cold water, which I love because I often take warm baths to relax. After using it for three weeks, I noticed a big difference: my skin feels softer, less itchy, and I don’t have that dry, flaky feeling on my arms and legs anymore. My hair also seems smoother, not as frizzy as it used to be after washing. What I appreciate most is the 10-stage filtration. I know tap water has chlorine and other impurities, and this filter does a great job of removing them without changing the water pressure. I even used it when I stayed at a rental cabin last week—packing it was easy because it’s compact, and installing it on the cabin’s faucet took less than a minute. It worked just as well there as it does at home. The filter is made of sturdy plastic, so it feels durable, and I like that it’s BPA-free, which is important for my family’s safety. I haven’t had any issues with overflow, even when I turn the water flow up a bit. I just rinsed it before the first use like the instructions said, and it’s been smooth sailing ever since. This is a great product for anyone who cares about their skin and hair, or for families with kids and pets who need clean, gentle water for baths.
body_zh: 作为一个皮肤干燥、敏感、沐浴后总是感觉紧绷的人，我之前尝试过几种滤水器，但这款滤水器因其效果良好且使用简单而脱颖而出。安装过程轻而易举，无需任何工具，只需将尼龙搭扣带缠绕在我的浴缸水龙头上，然后进行调整即可。即使我在热水和冷水之间切换，它也能保持安全，我喜欢这样做，因为我经常洗热水澡来放松。使用三周后，我注意到了一个很大的变化：我的皮肤感觉更柔软，不再发痒，手臂和腿上不再有那种干燥、剥落的感觉。洗完后我的头发也看起来更光滑，不再像以前那么卷曲。 我最欣赏的是10级过滤。我知道自来水含有氯和其他杂质，而这个过滤器可以在不改变水压的情况下很好地去除它们。我什至上周住在出租小屋时也使用过它，因为它结构紧凑，所以打包起来很容易，而且将其安装在小屋的水龙头上只需要不到一分钟的时间。它在那里和在家里一样有效。该过滤器由坚固的塑料制成，因此感觉很耐用，而且我喜欢它不含 BPA，这对我家人的安全很重要。即使我把水流调大一点，我也没有遇到任何溢出问题。我只是按照说明在第一次使用前冲洗了它，从那以后一切顺利。对于任何关心皮肤和头发的人，或者对于有孩子和宠物且需要清洁、温和的沐浴水的家庭来说，这是一款很棒的产品。

body: Installation was easy, the filter fits snugly on my faucet and can easily be removed or reattached if I need to clean or move it. It’s also compact enough that it doesn’t get in the way while filling the tub. Before using this filter, my tap water sometimes had a faint chlorine smell, and now the water feels much softer and cleaner, and there’s no chemical odor at all. The filter feels sturdy, made from BPA-free plastic, and the filter capacity is large enough, it will last a long time before needing replacement. I also like that it works with both hot and cold water, making it versatile for year-round use.

title: Easy Upgrade for Softer Bath Water
title_zh: 轻松升级，沐浴水更柔和
body: I got this mainly because the tap water in my area is pretty hard, and I was tired of how it left my skin dry and tight after every bath. Attaching it was straightforward. The strap held up well, and there was no leaking or weird pressure issues. After a few uses, I noticed my skin didn’t feel as stripped, and even my nails and hair seemed to handle bath time better. The filter’s been working steadily without any fuss. I like that it’s not bulky or obvious, but it’s clearly doing something. My usual post bath lotion routine takes less effort now, and I don’t get that lingering chlorine smell anymore. I’ve also used it with warm and hot water without any issues. It’s one of those small changes that made a big difference in how a bath feels. Especially after long days when you just want to soak and relax.
body_zh: 我得到这个主要是因为我所在地区的自来水非常硬，而且我厌倦了每次洗澡后它让我的皮肤干燥和紧绷。连接起来很简单。表带支撑良好，没有泄漏或奇怪的压力问题。使用几次后，我发现我的皮肤不再感觉脱皮，甚至我的指甲和头发似乎也能更好地适应洗澡时间。 过滤器一直稳定工作，没有出现任何问题。我喜欢它既不笨重也不明显，但它显然在做一些事情。现在，我平常使用沐浴后乳液的程序变得更加省力，而且我也不再闻到那种挥之不去的氯味了。我也用过温水和热水，没有任何问题。这是那些对洗澡感觉产生巨大影响的小改变之一。尤其是在漫长的一天之后，当您只想浸泡和放松时。

title: For a quick spa-like boost, it’s well worth it.
title_zh: 如果想要像水疗一样快速提神，这是非常值得的。
body: This tub faucet bath filter turned out to be a nice little upgrade for everyday baths. Installation was as simple as wrapping the Velcro strap around the faucet, and it fit snugly on mine without slipping. It’s compact enough to use at home or even take along when traveling, which makes it more versatile than bulky shower filters. The water feels noticeably softer after running through it, and I’ve had less dryness on my skin compared to before. The idea of 10-stage filtration with vitamin C and mineral balls might sound gimmicky, but it does make the water feel fresher and more gentle. My hair feels less brittle too, which was a pleasant surprise. At this price, it’s a budget-friendly way to improve bath water quality without a complicated setup.

body: The filtering effect is excellent. This is a very convenient water filtration device. Just hang it at the water outlet of the faucet and there is no need for a complicated installation process. I placed it on the bathtub faucet, just hung it up easily. It can quickly filter a large amount of water and filter out most of the harmful impurities. My skin is less dryness and my hair is more smoother , also lowers the risk of hair loss . It makes me enjoy taking a bath.

title: Sized for Generic Cartridge Replacement Ease
title_zh: 尺寸适合通用墨盒更换
body: Bath Filter for Tub Faucet Review: The holder unscrews in the middle to allow you to change out the filter. Or to take out the filter and flip it around backwards as suggested in the instructions as a way to prolong the life of the filter. It unscrews and rescrews quite easily. It looks good as well. It has a strap to hang it if your tub spout lacks a switch that pulls up. The media inside shakes around a bit. The amount varies, in my experience with these types of filters. Our water is very hard and they have always made an improvement. I wanted to know about reordering a filter when it came time, so I asked the little answer guy on the item page and here is what it said for items that you can purchase on Amazon to replace your filter...it had links but when I copied it over, the links were removed. (I should point out that I have had these little question asking spaces give me extremely wrong information before, lol, however I think that this is good. I looked at them, they look the same size and I think possibly the one that I saw for Berkey's Amazon page might also fit in here.): "To order replacement filters for your Syvahome Bath Filter, you have several options. Your filter model is GLQ 07 and has an 18-month filter life with a 2,500-gallon capacity. Here are compatible replacement filter options: Curety Bath Filter Cartridge for Tub, Bath Water Filter for Eczema, 8 Stage Bath Filter to Remove Contaminants,Chlorine and Fluoride, Hard Water Softener to Improves Skin and Hair Vxcellent Bath Water Filter Cartridge.Bathtub Filter Replacement, Filter For Bathtub Bath Faucet Replacement Cartridge Bathtub Filter Universal Replacement Cartridge,9 Stage Bath Faucet Water Filter Cartridge HardWater Softener Tub to Remove Lead,Chlorine and Fluoride,BPA Free Showerhead Filter Purify Bathwater Replacement Cartridge Bath Water Filter with Replaceable Filter Element for Soft Water - 1 Pack These universal cartridges are designed to fit most standard bath filters like yours. They typically last 2-6 months and provide similar filtration benefits. You can also check with Syvahome directly for original replacement parts, though these compatible options offer good value and performance." I did this because when I just looked for Syvahome filter cartridge replacements I couldn't find anything. I will post pics.
body_zh: 浴缸水龙头浴缸过滤器评论： 松开中间的支架，即可更换过滤器。或者按照说明中的建议取出过滤器并将其向后翻转，以延长过滤器的使用寿命。它很容易拧松和重新拧紧。 看起来也不错。 如果您的浴缸出水口没有可拉起的开关，它有一条带子可以悬挂它。 里面的介质微微晃动。根据我对这些类型过滤器的经验，数量各不相同。我们的水很硬，他们一直在改进。 我想知道如何在需要时重新订购过滤器，所以我问了商品页面上的小回答者，以下是您可以在亚马逊上购买以更换过滤器的商品的说明……它有链接，但当我复制它时，链接被删除了。 （我应该指出，这些小问题提问空间之前给了我极其错误的信息，哈哈，但是我认为这很好。我看了它们，它们看起来大小相同，我想我在 Berkey 的亚马逊页面上看到的那个也可能适合这里。）： “要为您的 Syvahome 沐浴过滤器订购替换过滤器，您有多种选择。您的过滤器型号为 GLQ 07，过滤器寿命为 18 个月，容量为 2,500 加仑。 以下是兼容的替换过滤器选项： 用于浴缸的 Curety 沐浴过滤器滤芯、用于湿疹的沐浴水过滤器、用于去除污染物、氯和氟化物的 8 级沐浴过滤器、用于改善皮肤和头发的硬水软化剂 Vxcellent 浴缸水过滤器滤芯。浴缸过滤器替换件，浴缸浴缸龙头过滤器替换滤芯 浴缸过滤器通用替换滤芯，9 级浴缸水龙头水过滤器滤芯硬水软化器浴缸可去除铅、氯和氟化物，不含 BPA 淋浴喷头过滤器净化沐浴水 替换滤芯沐浴水过滤器，带可替换软水滤芯 - 1 件装 这些通用滤芯设计用于适合像您这样的大多数标准浴缸过滤器。它们通常可持续 2-6 个月，并提供类似的过滤优势。您还可以直接向 Syvahome 查询原始替换零件，尽管这些兼容选项提供了良好的价值和性能。” 我这样做是因为当我寻找 Syvahome 滤芯替换件时，我找不到任何东西。 我会发布照片。

title: Great filter, some potential issues with installation depending
title_zh: 很棒的过滤器，安装时可能会出现一些潜在问题，具体取决于
body: So far so good!! The flow rate is excellent and the water does feel softer! I wish I had a way to test how well it’s working, I will look into that. I mostly take baths and there is a ln excessive amount of calcium in the water, so this is a life saver, especially for my hair! I’m actually very impressed that the water flows through so well. I did take one star off because if your bath faucet doesn’t have a shower knob, they do not provide something that would actually work to keep this in place. I had to rig it with another thing, a mobile shower head holder and use the shower attachement to hold it in place. Otherwise it just falls into the tub and doesn’t stay under the faucet. The other thing is the handle was pretty difficult to get into the holes. So I would say if you have the shower knob this is easy peasy, other wise it’s kind of a hassle and you’ll have to figure some creative solution. All in all I am thrilled to have this, I received it today and am already using it! I am pleased with the quality of the water and I will update my review with regards to filter longevity of there are any issues. It does say to back wash it after use, so making sure to do that will certainly help. I received this product for free through the Amazon Vine program in exchange for my honest review.
body_zh: 到目前为止，一切都很好！！流速非常好，水感觉更柔和！我希望我有一种方法来测试它的工作效果如何，我会对此进行研究。 我主要洗澡，水中的钙含量超标，所以这是我的救星，尤其是对我的头发！事实上，水流得这么好，给我留下了深刻的印象。 我确实扣掉了一颗星，因为如果你的浴缸水龙头没有淋浴旋钮，他们就不会提供真正能将其固定到位的东西。我必须用另一个东西来安装它，一个移动淋浴喷头支架，并使用淋浴附件将其固定到位。否则它只会掉进浴缸里而不会留在水龙头下。另一件事是手柄很难进入孔中。所以我想说，如果你有淋浴旋钮，这很容易，否则有点麻烦，你必须想出一些创造性的解决方案。 总而言之，我很高兴拥有这个，我今天收到它并且已经在使用它了！我对水的质量感到满意，如果有任何问题，我将更新有关过滤器寿命的评论。它确实说使用后要反洗，所以确保这样做肯定会有帮助。 我通过 Amazon Vine 计划免费收到了该产品，以换取我诚实的评论。

title: Efficient bath filter without overflow!
title_zh: 高效浴缸过滤器，无溢流！
body: Works well! The ball filter works well at reducing the chlorine smell that's present in our city water and does appear to make the water softer, as noted by how fizzy the bath bomb I used was and how soft my skin felt after I got out of the water. The filter DOES REQUIRE a spigot with a diverter on top in order for the bath filter to not slide off the spigot. I tried multiple times on a friends' tub that lacked a diverter on top and it slid off every time. Unlike other bath filters, this one actually drains quickly while seemingly delivering a decent filtration level. Several other replacement filters I've purchased recently overflow at the top due to the volume of water coming out of the spigot, which is out of my control. This one doesn't overflow! The housing appears to be made of out generic plastic, but does not feel or look like it will degrade quickly or contribute to micoplastic pollution thru deterioration. Just make sure not to drop it too much or from too tall of a height, otherwise it may crack.
body_zh: 效果很好！球过滤器可以很好地减少城市水中存在的氯气味，并且似乎确实可以使水变得更软，正如我使用的沐浴炸弹的泡沫程度以及从水里出来后我的皮肤感觉有多柔软所指出的那样。该过滤器确实需要一个顶部带有分流器的龙头，以便浴缸过滤器不会从龙头上滑落。我在朋友的浴缸上尝试了多次，该浴缸顶部没有分流器，每次都会滑落。 与其他浴缸过滤器不同的是，这款过滤器实际上排水速度很快，同时看似提供了不错的过滤水平。我最近购买的其他几个替换过滤器由于从龙头流出的水量而在顶部溢出，这是我无法控制的。这个不溢出啊！ 该外壳似乎是由普通塑料制成的，但感觉或看起来不会很快降解，也不会因恶化而导致微塑料污染。只是确保不要将其掉落太多或从太高的高度掉落，否则它可能会破裂。

title: Review for bath filter for tub.
body: I loved the idea of this. I was excited to try it. I got ready to soak in the tub and wrestled with this for about 30 minutes. Unfortunately, I do not have a stopper.. I did manage to get it on for a minute but it only fit REALLY close to the spout that more water was pouring out of it than going through the filter, which kind of defeated the purpose. I tried several different ways and variations (including just tying the piece in a knot,) but it always slipped off. The functionality did not work for my specific spout. I will have to replace my current spout in order to really test it. The quality of the piece is pretty good.. the thing did slip off and fall into the empty tub about 23 times and was still intact! Overall, if I had a different spout I’m sure my review would be diffident. I rarely do negative reviews, but this is advertised to work even on spouts without a drain piece, but it did not work for mine.
body_zh: 我喜欢这个主意。我很高兴尝试一下。我准备泡在浴缸里，并为此苦苦挣扎了大约30分钟。不幸的是，我没有塞子。我确实设法把它戴上了一分钟，但它只适合真正靠近喷嘴，从它流出的水比通过过滤器的水多，这违背了目的。我尝试了几种不同的方法和变化（包括将这块打结），但它总是滑落。 该功能不适用于我的特定喷嘴。我将不得不更换我当前的喷嘴才能真正测试它。这件作品的质量非常好。这件东西确实滑落并掉入空浴缸中大约 23 次，但仍然完好无损！ 总的来说，如果我有一个不同的喷嘴，我确信我的评论会很缺乏信心。我很少做负面评论，但广告上说这甚至可以在没有排水管的喷嘴上使用，但它对我的不起作用。

title: Great quality, does just what it claims to do.
title_zh: 品质优良，正如其声称的那样。
body: Packaging & Presentation This arrived perfectly with no breaks or cracks and was very well protected. Everything was intact on arrival. My first impression when opening it was how solid and well constructed it felt. The materials are high quality and it does not feel flimsy at all. Why I Ordered / Expectations I ordered this to use on my kitchen sink rather than a bathtub, since I only have a shower. My main goal was to reduce the over-chlorinated smell and taste of our water, and I was hoping it would make a noticeable difference. Installation & Fit Using it was very easy. We simply hung it on the kitchen faucet and it worked just fine. There isn’t a way to fully secure it since it is designed to hang, but it hangs nicely and works well as long as you’re careful not to bump it. Performance This filter has definitely helped reduce the chlorine smell and taste in our water. I also used it to wash my hair three times and noticed improved shine and less frizz. The water feels gentler overall compared to unfiltered tap water. Build Quality & Design The design is sturdy and well made. The size and shape are large enough that it would work very well for a bathtub, and it feels like it would provide safer, gentler bath water for a baby or young child. What I Liked • Solid, high-quality construction • Easy to use • Noticeable reduction in chlorine smell and taste • Improved hair shine and reduced frizz • Versatile enough to use outside of a bathtub • Feels safe for baby or sensitive skin use What I Didn’t Like I didn’t find anything to dislike. Bottom Line This is a well-made, effective water filter that does exactly what it’s supposed to do. It improved the smell and feel of our water and even made a noticeable difference in my hair. ⭐ Star Rating: 5 out of 5 I’m giving this five stars for quality construction, ease of use, noticeable results, and overall value for the money.
body_zh: 包装与展示 货品完好无损，没有任何破损或裂缝，并且得到了很好的保护。抵达时一切都完好无损。打开它时我的第一印象是它的坚固性和结构良好。材料质量很高，一点也不脆弱。 为什么我订购/期望 我订购它是为了在厨房水槽上使用，而不是在浴缸上，因为我只有淋浴。我的主要目标是减少水的过度氯化气味和味道，我希望它能产生明显的变化。 安装与装配 使用它非常简单。我们只是将它挂在厨房水龙头上，效果就很好。由于它被设计为悬挂式，因此没有办法完全固定它，但只要您小心不要碰撞它，它就可以很好地悬挂并且工作良好。 表现 该过滤器确实有助于减少水中的氯气味和味道。我还用它洗了三次头发，发现头发光泽有所改善，毛躁也减少了。与未经过滤的自来水相比，水的整体感觉更加温和。 建造质量和设计 设计坚固且制作精良。尺寸和形状足够大，非常适合用作浴缸，而且感觉它可以为婴儿或幼儿提供更安全、更温和的沐浴水。 我喜欢什么 • 坚固、高品质的结构 • 便于使用 • 氯气味和味道显着减少 • 改善头发光泽并减少毛躁 • 用途广泛，可在浴缸外使用 • 婴儿或敏感皮肤使用感觉安全 我不喜欢什么 我没有发现任何不喜欢的地方。 底线 这是一款制作精良、有效的滤水器，完全能够发挥其应有的作用。它改善了水的气味和感觉，甚至对我的头发产生了明显的影响。 ⭐ 星级：5 分（满分 5 分） 我给这款产品五颗星是因为其优质的结构、易用性、显着的效果和整体的物有所值。

title: Perfect portable filter
body: I purchased this bathtub water filter mainly to help soften my water, and overall I’ve been pretty impressed with it so far. It features an eight-carbon filter and hangs directly from the faucet rather than screwing in, which is actually a huge plus. Because it isn’t a permanent attachment, it’s very portable and easy to take with you while traveling, something I don’t see often with water filters. After just one use, I could already tell that my skin felt noticeably softer, which really surprised me in a good way. I originally hoped to use this more for washing my face, but unfortunately it doesn’t attach easily to sink spouts. That was a bit disappointing, though I still plan to use it regularly regardless. I also think it would hang better in a bathtub versus my rounded spout. Although I do think a different hanging mechanism would benefit them something that you can tighten up around the spout. If you have one of those drain stoppers on your spout, you have nothing to worry about that will hold it in place. The filter itself has a nice, solid weight and feels durable. It comes with a hard plastic handle for hanging, as well as an additional rubber handle. I haven’t quite figured out how to use the rubber one yet, but I suspect once I do, it will help grip the spout more securely. Before my first use, I let the water run through the filter for a few minutes to flush out anything loose, as recommended. One thing I did notice was when I tried a small sip of the filtered water, there was a slight taste that wasn’t very pleasant—almost perfume-like. I’m not sure if that’s just something that happens initially or if it will continue over time, so that remains to be seen. Overall, I think this is a very good and affordable option if you’re looking to soften your water. If my skin already feels softer after just one use, I’m excited to see how it improves after a month of consistent use. The item arrived exactly as described and looks just like the pictures. The easy portability is a major bonus, and despite a couple of minor drawbacks, I’m happy with this purchase and will continue using it.
body_zh: 我购买这个浴缸滤水器主要是为了帮助软化我的水，总的来说，到目前为止我对它印象深刻。它具有八碳过滤器，直接悬挂在水龙头上，而不是拧入，这实际上是一个巨大的优势。因为它不是永久性附件，所以它非常便携，并且在旅行时很容易随身携带，这是我在滤水器中很少看到的。 仅使用一次后，我就已经感觉到我的皮肤明显变得更柔软，这确实让我感到惊讶。我本来希望更多地用它来洗脸，但不幸的是它不容易附着在水槽喷嘴上。这有点令人失望，尽管我仍然计划定期使用它。我还认为它比我的圆形喷嘴更适合挂在浴缸里。尽管我确实认为不同的悬挂机制会对他们有利，但你可以在喷嘴周围收紧。如果您的喷嘴上有一个排水塞，则无需担心它会将其固定到位。 过滤器本身重量适中，感觉很耐用。它配有一个用于悬挂的硬塑料手柄，以及一个额外的橡胶手柄。我还不太清楚如何使用橡胶的，但我怀疑一旦我知道了，它将有助于更牢固地抓住喷嘴。在第一次使用之前，我按照建议让水流过过滤器几分钟，以冲洗掉任何松动的东西。 我注意到的一件事是，当我尝试喝一小口过滤水时，有一种不太令人愉快的轻微味道——几乎像香水一样。我不确定这是否只是最初发生的事情，还是会随着时间的推移而持续下去，所以这还有待观察。 总的来说，如果您想软化水，我认为这是一个非常好的且经济实惠的选择。如果我的皮肤在使用一次后就已经感觉更柔软，我很高兴看到持续使用一个月后它会如何改善。该物品到达时与描述完全一致，看起来就像图片一样。易于携带是一个主要优点，尽管有一些小缺点，但我对这次购买感到满意，并将继续使用它。

body: I received this item as a promo product based on a price of $49, but a weak earlier I'd purchased a seemingly identical product for $10. Within days of ordering the promo, the price dropped to $29. So I would say definitely shop around and make sure you are getting a decent price. The only difference I could tell between this and the $10 product was the brand name printed on the plastic. Otherwise, everything seemed to be exactly the same. Is the filtering media any different? Hard to say. It's a very small filter cartridge, so I wonder different it could really be. Truth be told, I just couldn't pay $49 for this.

title: Easy to Use, Gentle Upgrade for Bath Time
title_zh: 易于使用，温和升级沐浴时间
body: I added this bath filter to our tub mainly to help with hard water, and it’s been a really nice, low-effort improvement. Setup couldn’t be easier — it just hangs in the bath while the water runs, no tools or complicated installation required. The water feels noticeably softer, especially compared to straight tap water. There’s also less of that strong chemical smell, which makes bath time feel more comfortable and relaxing, especially for kids. I like that it’s designed specifically for tubs rather than trying to adapt a shower filter. The build quality feels solid, and it stays in place without floating around or getting in the way. It’s also easy to remove and rinse after use. Overall, it feels like a thoughtful, well-designed product that does exactly what it’s meant to do. For the price, this is a simple and worthwhile upgrade if you’re dealing with hard water or just want a gentler bath experience.
body_zh: 我在浴缸中添加了这个浴缸过滤器，主要是为了帮助处理硬水，这是一个非常好的、省力的改进。安装再简单不过了——它只需在水流时挂在浴缸里，不需要任何工具或复杂的安装。 水感觉明显更软，尤其是与直接自来水相比。强烈的化学气味也减少了，这让沐浴时间感觉更加舒适和放松，尤其是对孩子来说。我喜欢它是专门为浴缸设计的，而不是试图适应淋浴过滤器。 构建质量感觉坚固，并且保持在原位，不会漂浮或妨碍。使用后也很容易去除和冲洗。总的来说，它给人的感觉是一款经过深思熟虑、设计精良的产品，完全达到了它的预期目的。 就价格而言，如果您正在处理硬水或只是想要更温和的沐浴体验，这是一次简单且值得的升级。

title: TDS monitor showed no change in quality
title_zh: TDS 监测显示质量没有变化
body: I got this hoping it would reduce some of the contaminates in my tap water for baths. I was hoping it would be better for my skin and hair. Unfortunately, I have to give this only one star. I used my TDS monitor to see if it was truly filtering out dissolved solids that caused hard water and my TDS monitor showed that there was no change in water quality. I made sure to flush the filter with hot water for several minutes as suggested and tried testing it several times but each time the TDS monitor showed the water quality was the same before and after the filter. For $30 I'd expect some changes but this is a waste of money in my opinion.
body_zh: 我收到这个希望它能减少洗澡自来水中的一些污染物。我希望它对我的皮肤和头发更好。不幸的是，我只能给这个一颗星。我使用 TDS 监测仪查看它是否真正过滤掉了导致硬水的溶解固体，并且我的 TDS 监测仪显示水质没有变化。我确保按照建议用热水冲洗过滤器几分钟，并尝试测试几次，但每次 TDS 监测仪都显示过滤器前后的水质相同。对于 30 美元，我希望有一些改变，但在我看来这是浪费钱。

title: Very Solid Product, Easy To Use For Multiple Facet Types. No More Yellow Ring Around The Tub!
title_zh: 非常坚固的产品，易于用于多种刻面类型。浴缸周围不再有黄环！
body: My water is not hard, but it does leave a yellow residue in my tub (& on my paper towels when I clean) which bothers me. I use a gravity system for drinking, ice & food prep. I know there are filters for your shower head. But I like to take a bath every night before bed, which means I'm marinating in this water. This Ball Filter System seemed like the right solution. It comes fully assembled, and feels really solid, like there is quality material in there. It includes a plastic handle you attach to hang the filter over the spout of the bathtub. There is another piece of silicone "rope" to use as a handle for other styles of facet. Unfortunately neither of these handle options will work on my free standing tub. The facet is very tall with about a foot long curve at the top so these are not long enough, and even if they were, I think it would swing and not stay put once the water was running. However, the two other bathtubs in the house have standard type facets. So while I don't use those bathtubs, I have other family members that will when they visit. I would recommend using the silicone handle to keep it from slipping, but otherwise it's very easy to use. It stayed put when the water was running, and there was good flow through the filter. It's only been a short time, so I can't speak to how long it lasts, but it definitely works. There was no yellow ring around that tub in the morning so mission accomplished!! And I will keep trying to fit this on my tub. I don't want to search & try other brands when I know this one works and this is just a logistical thing. I can't speak for a "hard water" issue, but the filter is definitely working!
body_zh: 我的水并不硬，但它确实在我的浴缸中留下黄色残留物（以及清洁时在我的纸巾上），这让我很烦恼。我使用重力系统来准备饮料、冰块和食物。我知道你的淋浴喷头有过滤器。但我喜欢每天晚上睡觉前洗澡，这意味着我浸泡在这种水里。该球过滤系统似乎是正确的解决方案。它完全组装好，感觉非常坚固，就像里面有优质材料一样。它包括一个塑料手柄，您可以将过滤器挂在浴缸的喷嘴上。还有另一根硅胶“绳”可用作其他类型刻面的手柄。不幸的是，这些手柄选项都不适用于我的独立式浴缸。刻面非常高，顶部有大约一英尺长的曲线，所以它们不够长，即使它们足够长，我认为一旦水流过，它也会摆动而不是保持原状。然而，房子里的另外两个浴缸有标准类型的刻面。因此，虽然我不使用这些浴缸，但我的其他家庭成员来访时会使用这些浴缸。我建议使用硅胶手柄以防止其打滑，但除此之外它非常易于使用。当水流动时，它保持原状，并且通过过滤器的水流良好。这只是很短的时间，所以我不能说它能持续多久，但它确实有效。早上浴缸周围没有黄色环，所以任务完成了！我会继续尝试将它安装在我的浴缸上。当我知道这个品牌有效时，我不想搜索和尝试其他品牌，这只是后勤方面的事情。我不能说“硬水”问题，但过滤器确实有效！

title: Gentle, Skin-Soothing Bath Time Upgrade
title_zh: 温和、舒缓肌肤的沐浴时间升级
body: This bathtub water filter has made a noticeable difference for our skin, especially for kids and anyone with sensitivity. After installing it, bath water feels noticeably softer and more soothing, and there’s no strong chlorine smell anymore. The 8-stage carbon filtration really seems to do its job removing harsh chemicals and contaminants. It installs easily on the tub faucet and works great as a hard water softener. Skin feels calmer and less dry after baths, and hair feels softer too. It’s especially comforting knowing the water is gentler for babies and children. If you’re dealing with hard water or sensitive skin, this bath filter is a simple, affordable upgrade that makes bath time more relaxing and skin-friendly. Highly recommended for families.
body_zh: 这款浴缸滤水器对我们的皮肤产生了显着的影响，尤其是对于儿童和任何敏感的人。安装后，洗澡水感觉明显更柔和、舒缓，而且不再有浓烈的氯味。 8 级碳过滤似乎确实能够去除刺激性化学物质和污染物。 它可以轻松安装在浴缸水龙头上，并且可以作为硬水软化器使用。沐浴后，皮肤感觉更加平静，不再那么干燥，头发也感觉更加柔软。尤其令人欣慰的是，这里的水对婴儿和儿童来说更加温和。 如果您正在处理硬水或敏感皮肤，这款浴缸过滤器是一种简单、实惠的升级，让沐浴时间更加轻松且对皮肤友好。强烈推荐给家庭。

title: Easy to use, good design
body: This is a logical product to add to our bath since we also have a shower filter for our hard water. This bathtub water filter is a simple design with a screw top to change the filter which is recommended every 6-8 months but depends on usage and water quality. It comes with flexible handles to secure it over the spigot while the water is running through it and easy to follow instructions which include how to back flush the filter which is recommended to extend it's life.
body_zh: 这是添加到我们的浴缸中的合理产品，因为我们还有一个用于硬水的淋浴过滤器。这款浴缸滤水器设计简单，带有螺旋盖，建议每 6-8 个月更换一次过滤器，但具体取决于使用情况和水质。 它配有灵活的手柄，可在水流过时将其固定在龙头上，并且易于遵循说明，其中包括如何反冲洗过滤器，建议延长其使用寿命。

title: Well made. Effortless to install.
title_zh: 制作精良。安装毫不费力。
body: This filter is very cool. When you pick it up you can hear and see the filtration materials encapsulated inside, shifting in the filter. The materials look natural, and there are 8 layers of them, which I appreciate. The filter is well made and seems durable. And you dont need ANY plumbing experience to install this, which is wonderful. Simply place the splash guard in the top, and hang the filter on the faucet/tub spout. It's so simple. It's also removable for cleaning or for taking with you and using it on another faucet while traveling. All in all, I'm very happy with this item and am looking forward to seeing how it improves the water quality over time.
body_zh: 这个滤镜非常酷。当您拿起它时，您可以听到并看到封装在内部的过滤材料在过滤器中移动。材料看起来很自然，有8层，我很欣赏。 过滤器做工精良，看起来很耐用。 而且您不需要任何管道经验来安装它，这真是太棒了。只需将防溅罩放在顶部，然后将过滤器挂在水龙头/浴缸喷嘴上即可。就是这么简单。它也可以拆卸以进行清洁或随身携带并在旅行时在另一个水龙头上使用。 总而言之，我对这个产品非常满意，并期待看到它如何随着时间的推移改善水质。

title: Bath ball with bath & shower media to remove contaminants such as chlorine and some heavy metals
title_zh: 带有浴缸和淋浴介质的沐浴球，可去除氯和一些重金属等污染物
body: To give readers some possibly helpful information- I only order items to review that I plan on using and sharing an honest review of my experience so that others can make an informed decision when purchasing. I grew up with my parents using one of the “well-known” periodicals that makes their money from subscribers and there is another periodical like it for pet parents. Using those for purchases such as used vehicles, large appliances, dog food, supplements / accessories, training, pet insurance etc, has helped my furry friends overcome abusive starts in life, deal with physical ailments and live longer healthier and happier lives so I feel a duty to help others use their funds with the most honest information possible. My first review may seem like a high rating as I base it on receiving what was described but I will alter a review up or down depending on experience. Just thought I’d share. This is a nice bath filter that listed a number of beneficial filter media including KDF 55 and other typical media used in bath and shower filters to remove contaminants. The reason I gave it four stars was because for almost $50 I expected a more comprehensive and certified filter for the bathtub (although it does have significant discounts sometimes).As I mentioned before I actually add a shower filter that removes chloramine from the bath water. The information did say its filter consists of a majority of contaminant removing g media with a small percentage remaining to help soothe the skin. Time will tell as we have quite hard water and perhaps this bath ball will do the trick
body_zh: 为了给读者一些可能有用的信息——我只订购我计划使用的物品进行评论，并分享我的经验的诚实评论，以便其他人在购买时可以做出明智的决定。我和父母一起长大，使用一本“知名”期刊，通过订阅者赚钱，还有另一本类似的针对宠物父母的期刊。使用这些购买二手车、大型电器、狗粮、补充剂/配件、培训、宠物保险等，有帮助 我毛茸茸的朋友们克服了生活中的虐待，处理了身体疾病，活得更长久，更健康，更快乐，所以我觉得有责任以最诚实的信息帮助其他人使用他们的资金。 我的第一次评论可能看起来像是一个很高的评价，因为我的评价是基于收到所描述的内容，但我会根据经验向上或向下更改评论。只是想我会分享。 这是一款不错的浴缸过滤器，列出了许多有益的过滤介质，包括 KDF 55 以及浴缸和淋浴过滤器中用于去除污染物的其他典型介质。我给它四颗星的原因是因为我希望花费近 50 美元为浴缸配备一个更全面且经过认证的过滤器（尽管有时它确实有很大的折扣）。正如我之前提到的，我实际上添加了一个淋浴过滤器，可以去除洗澡水中的氯胺。该信息确实表明其过滤器由大部分污染物去除介质组成，剩下一小部分有助于舒缓皮肤。时间会证明一切，因为我们的水很硬，也许这个沐浴球就能解决问题

title: Decent choice for bath filtration, 8 elements in a unique cartridge design.
title_zh: 浴缸过滤的不错选择，独特滤芯设计中的 8 个滤芯。
body: Filter elements use: •KDF: to help reduce chlorine and heavy metal •Tourmaline balls: Deionize water for hydration and detoxification •VC balls: vitamin c ceramic balls. Removes impurities like chlorine and rust •Magnetic energy balls: help create activated water an alkaline pH. •Zoelite balls: trap contaminants •Activated carbon balls: absorb odor chlorine and other contaminants •Mineralization balls: add calcium and magnesium and help with pH •Calcium sulfate: remove chlorine. Design: All of the filter balls are larger then bathtub filters I've had in the past. They are also on the outside of the filter cartridge, while the inside middle portion that looks like gold flakes is the KDF. The housing is light plastic. Set up: This is far from my first bathtub water filter, it seems similar to the ones I've had in the past in terms of setup. •For the cartridge, you simply run it through hot water for a few minutes to activate. This one says that it should be good for 6 to 8 months which is a significantly long time but if you have harder water it might be best to replace it more frequently. •The only bit of installation you need to do is attaching the rubber handle and hanging it on your fauset. Different options are provided depending on what kind of bathtub faucet you have. Notes: 1. I noticed when looking at the cartridge of this filter vs. my other ones, that the larger pieces are all on the outside and the balls are larger then what I usually see. 2. Both myself and my daughter both have mild eczema so we always use a bathtub filter we've only had one bath with this one so far so it's too early to say if it helps, however I can say that the water does feel softer. 3. To make the cartridge last longer, the included pantile recommend running water in the opposite direction, but it doesn't say how often, so at your own discretion. To do this, simply unscrew the filter housing and turn the cartridge around and screw it back together. 4. For our bathtub the regular handle did not work as it normally does, as it was too short. so we had to use the one where it wraps around the faucet.
body_zh: 过滤元件用途： •KDF：帮助减少氯和重金属 •电气石球：去离子水以补充水分和排毒 •VC球：维生素C陶瓷球。去除氯和铁锈等杂质 •磁力能量球：帮助产生碱性pH值的活性水。 •Zoelite 球：捕获污染物 •活性炭球：吸收异味氯气及其他污染物 •矿化球：添加钙和镁并帮助调节 pH 值 •硫酸钙：去除氯。 设计： 所有的过滤球都比我过去用过的浴缸过滤器大。它们也在滤芯的外侧，而内部中间看起来像金片的部分就是KDF。外壳是轻质塑料。 设置： 这与我的第一个浴缸滤水器相去甚远，它在设置方面似乎与我过去使用过的类似。 •对于墨盒，您只需将其在热水中运行几分钟即可激活。 有人说它应该可以使用 6 到 8 个月，这是一个相当长的时间，但如果你的水较硬，最好更频繁地更换。 •您唯一需要做的安装就是安装橡胶手柄并将其挂在水龙头上。 根据您拥有的浴缸龙头类型，提供不同的选项。 笔记： 1. 我注意到，当比较这个过滤器的滤芯与其他滤芯时，较大的部件都在外面，而且球比我通常看到的要大。 2. 我和我女儿都有轻度湿疹，所以我们总是使用浴缸过滤器，到目前为止我们只用过一次浴缸过滤器，所以现在说它是否有帮助还为时过早，但我可以说水确实感觉更柔和。 3.为了让滤芯的使用寿命更长，附带的水瓦建议反方向流水，但没有说明多久一次，所以请自行判断。为此，只需拧下过滤器外壳并转动滤芯并将其重新拧紧即可。 4. 我们的浴缸的常规手柄无法正常工作，因为它太短了。所以我们不得不使用它包裹在水龙头上的那个。

title: Good Concept, but Not Universally Compatible
title_zh: 这是个好概念，但并非普遍兼容
body: This filter is a thoughtful idea, especially for those looking to reduce exposure to chlorine and other irritants during bath time. The materials feel safe and well-made, and installation is simple in theory. However, it’s not truly universal. It didn’t fit over my shower pull, as the opening doesn’t extend far enough back to accommodate that setup. Because of that, I’m not able to use it as intended. Pros: * Gentle filtration concept * Soft silicone and simple design * Easy install (if compatible) Cons: * Not one-size-fits-all * Limited compatibility/functionality with some fixtures * Must replace filter every 3 months - more often than most filters Overall Value: This filter is a thoughtful idea, especially for those looking to reduce exposure to chlorine and other irritants during bath time. The materials feel safe and well-made, and installation is simple in theory. However, it’s not truly universal. It didn’t fit over my shower pull, as the opening doesn’t extend far enough back to accommodate that setup. Because of that, I wasn’t able to use it and ended up gifting it to someone else.
body_zh: 这个过滤器是个很有心思的选择，尤其适合希望减少洗澡时接触氯和其他刺激物的人。材料感觉安全且制作精良，安装理论上也很简单。 然而，这并非真正的普遍现象。它没能盖过我的淋浴拉手，因为开口不够向后延伸，无法容纳那个装置。因此，我无法按预期使用它。 优点： * 温和过滤理念 * 软硅胶和简洁设计 * 安装简便（如果兼容） 缺点： * 非一刀切* 部分 灯具兼容性/功能有限 * 滤网每3个月更换一次——比大多数滤网更频繁 总体 价值：这款滤网是个贴心的选择，尤其适合想减少洗澡时氯和其他刺激物暴露的用户。材料感觉安全且制作精良，安装理论上也很简单。 然而，这并非真正的普遍现象。它没能盖过我的淋浴拉手，因为开口不够向后延伸，无法容纳那个装置。因此我没能用它，最后把它送给了别人。

title: Easy install but only testing will tell the results
title_zh: 安装简单，但只有测试才能看出结果
body: This is such a great idea for better healthier bathing for those of us that don’t have full house filtration systems installed. It is easy to install and fit both our tubs nicely plus doesn’t pose any damage to your faucet. I did find that if I turned the water on fully it would send water thru the small overflow slit in the front and right into the tub-which defeats the whole purpose of have the filter. It took way too long to fill the tub insuring the water was to my desired temp so I would say there needs to be some tweeking. I have used this for a month and found it to be well constructed and easy to rinse off. I personally am going to have my tub water tested to see any difference this makes. As far as price goes, I feel this is at the highest end without providing a test strip or some means of showing the benifits of using this filter. Price is tops of reasonably priced.
body_zh: 对于我们这些没有安装全屋过滤系统的人来说，这对更健康的洗澡来说是个非常好的主意。 安装和安装我们的两个浴缸都很简单，而且不会损坏你的水龙头。 我发现如果水开到最大，水会从前面的小溢流缝里直接流入浴缸——这完全违背了过滤器的初衷。 为了确保水温达到我想要的温度，注满浴缸花了太长时间，所以我觉得需要做些调整。我用了一个月，觉得做工扎实，冲洗也方便。 我个人打算去检测浴缸水质，看看这会有没有变化。 就价格而言，我觉得这算是高端，没有提供试纸或展示使用该滤网的好处。 价格非常合理。

title: Price point is a bit high
body: I tested this filter on my bathtub and it worked well overall. Assembly was pretty simple and straightforward, and I had it set up without much trouble. It seems like a nice quality filter and feels well made, which I appreciate when it comes to baby products. The concept is great and it did what it’s supposed to do. The only downside for me is the price point—it feels a little high, especially since it only comes with one filter and you’ll need to replace them over time. Overall though, it’s a solid product and a good idea if you’re looking for extra filtration for your baby’s bath water.
body_zh: 我在浴缸上测试过这个过滤器，整体效果不错。组装过程相当简单直接，我也顺利完成了设置。它看起来是个质量不错的滤网，做工也很精良，这点我很欣赏婴儿用品。 这个概念很棒，也达到了它应该做的事情。对我来说唯一的缺点是价格——感觉有点高，尤其是它只带一个滤网，而且你得慢慢换。 总体来说，这是个不错的产品，如果你想为宝宝的洗澡水增加过滤效果，这是个不错的选择。

title: Noticeably Gentler Water
body: I got this to see if it would make bath time a bit gentler, and installation was surprisingly quick. It just attached without much effort and didn’t require any tools or adjustments, which made it easy to start using right away. The color is subtle and blends in well so it doesn’t look bulky or out of place. The biggest difference I noticed was in the water quality. The water feels softer and there’s less of that chlorine type smell during baths, which is especially noticeable in a small space. It just feels a bit more comfortable overall, especially for sensitive skin. Water pressure stayed pretty consistent, which I was worried about going in, so that was a nice surprise. For the price, it feels like a solid upgrade if you’re trying to improve bath water without overcomplicating things.
body_zh: 我买这个是想看看洗澡时间会不会更温和一些，安装出乎意料地快。它很容易就装上去，不需要任何工具或调整，这让它很容易马上开始使用。颜色很低调，融合得很好，不会显得笨重或突兀。 我注意到最大的不同是水质。水感觉更软，洗澡时那种氯味也少了，这在狭小空间里尤其明显。整体感觉更舒服一些，尤其是对敏感肌来说。 水压保持得相当稳定，这让我一开始很担心，所以这让我很惊喜。以这个价格来说，如果你想改善洗澡水，但又不想让事情变得复杂，这感觉是个不错的升级。

title: Works well, but slows down tub filling
title_zh: 效果不错，但会拖慢浴缸注水速度
body: This bath tub filter is pretty straightforward to use once everything is set up. I like that it includes multiple adapter options so it can fit different faucet sizes, which makes it more versatile than many similar products. One small frustration during setup was the number of stickers and labels on the unit — it took longer than expected to peel everything off before installing it. The main downside is that it noticeably slows down how quickly the tub fills. If you’re used to filling a bath quickly, you’ll definitely notice the difference. Another thing to keep in mind is the ongoing cost if the filters need to be replaced frequently. There’s also a small stripe on the side that changes color. I couldn’t find a clear explanation of it in the instruction booklet. From reading other reviews, it appears to be related to the temperature indicator. If that explanation is in the instructions somewhere, it could definitely be made more obvious. The included essential oil pads are a nice bonus and add a little extra to bath time. Overall, it works as intended- water I think felt softer. That said, for what it is, the price feels a bit higher than I would expect, especially considering the slower water flow and the potential cost of replacement filters.
body_zh: 这个浴缸过滤器一旦全部设置好，使用起来相当简单。我喜欢它有多种适配器选项，可以适应不同尺寸的水龙头，这让它比许多类似产品更灵活。 安装过程中有个小小的烦恼是设备上的贴纸和标签太多——拆下来比预期花了更长时间才能安装。 主要缺点是它明显减慢了浴缸注水的速度。如果你习惯快速注水，肯定会感觉到差别。另一个需要注意的是，如果滤网需要频繁更换，费用会持续增加。侧面 还有一条会变色的小条纹。我在说明书里找不到明确的解释。看其他评测，似乎和温度指示器有关。如果说明书里有这个解释，肯定可以更明显。 附带的精油护垫是个不错的额外奖励，能让洗澡时间更长一些。 总体来说，效果符合预期——我觉得水感觉更软。不过，就它本身而言，价格感觉比我预期的要高一些，尤其是考虑到水流较慢和更换过滤器的潜在费用。

title: Good but can’t handle much flow
title_zh: 不错，但无法承受大量流量
body: Wanted to love this but it does not work for a standard tub that just turns water on and controls temp— as in no control over flow.
body_zh: 本来想喜欢这个，但它不适用于普通浴缸，那种浴缸只开水和控制温度——也就是说，完全无法控制流量。

title: Pretty cool and close to perfect
body: Overall great but doesn’t work 100% correctly with my tub. You cannot adjust the water pressure for my tub setting so a lot of it comes out the front and bottom through the filter. It does help overall with my cloudy water so that is great. It was very easy to install as well. Looks really nice and is safe tor my toddler so he won’t bump his head on the spout. Overall pretty great and close ti perfect.
body_zh: 总体来说很棒，但和我的浴缸配合不完全正常。你无法调节我的浴缸水压，所以很多水是从过滤器的前部和底部流出来的。总体来说，这对我浑浊的水质有帮助，这点很棒。安装也非常简单。看起来很漂亮，对我家小孩来说很安全，不会让他撞到出水口。总体来说相当不错，接近完美。

title: Not quick enough for standard bath flow

body: The concept behind this filter is great and I love the idea of reducing chlorine and irritants for baby bath time. Unfortunately the water flow is quite slow and doesn’t filter quickly enough for a typical bath faucet. Shipping was also delayed which added to the frustration.

body: I only wish this came with the aroma kit, but it's a great addition to our littles' bathtime. Fits my tub well and is easy to use.
body_zh: 我只希望它能与香气套件一起提供，但它对我们小孩子的洗澡时间来说是一个很好的补充。非常适合我的浴缸并且易于使用。

title: Worth it!
body: My son had very dry “crispy” skin. Very bumpy, scaly and scabby. I noticed the flare ups more after baths. He prescribed medicated eczema ointment. While it did help, the red dry patches were still visible and present. I went on a limb and bought this filter. His problem is completely GONE! He has not had flare up or dry skin since! And we no longer use the ointment. When I tell you night and day, it really was night and day. 100% would recommend!
body_zh: 我儿子的皮肤非常干燥，“脆”。非常凹凸不平，鳞片覆盖且结痂。我注意到洗澡后发作更频繁。他开了药用湿疹软膏。虽然有帮助，但红色干燥斑块依然清晰可见。我冒险买了这个过滤器。他的问题完全消失了！从那以后他就再也没有复发或皮肤干燥！而且我们不再使用软膏。我告诉你，真是天天霹雳。百分之百推荐！

title: Zero complaints
body: As a parent, bath time is one of those moments where you just want everything to be safe and gentle for your baby. I decided to try this tub filter because my baby has pretty sensitive skin, and I wanted to see if it would make a difference. After using it for a week, I honestly feel like the water is a lot gentler. My baby’s skin seems less dry after baths, and I don’t notice as much redness. Installation was surprisingly easy. I expected it to be complicated, but it literally took just a few seconds to attach to the faucet. Once it’s on, it stays secure and doesn’t move around. I also really like the built-in spout cover. Babies move around a lot in the tub, so having that soft silicone cover gives me extra peace of mind in case they bump into it. It’s a small feature, but it makes bath time feel safer. The temperature indicator is another helpful detail. It also looks really nice in the bathroom. The design is simple and clean, so it doesn’t feel bulky or out of place on the faucet. Overall, this feels like one of those small upgrades that makes everyday routines a little easier. If you have a baby with sensitive skin or just want extra peace of mind during bath time, this filter is definitely worth considering.
body_zh: 作为父母，洗澡时是您只想让宝宝一切都安全、温柔的时刻之一。我决定尝试这个浴缸过滤器，因为我的宝宝皮肤非常敏感，我想看看它是否会有所作为。使用一周后，说实话感觉水温和了很多。洗完澡后，我宝宝的皮肤似乎不那么干燥了，我也没有注意到那么多发红。安装非常简单。我原以为它会很复杂，但实际上只需要几秒钟就可以连接到水龙头上。一旦开启，它就会保持安全并且不会移动。我也非常喜欢内置的喷嘴盖。婴儿在浴缸里经常走动，因此柔软的硅胶套让我在他们撞到浴缸时更加安心。这是一个小功能，但它让洗澡时间感觉更安全。温度指示器是另一个有用的细节。它放在浴室里看起来也很漂亮。设计简单、干净，因此不会感觉笨重或放在水龙头上不合适。总的来说，这感觉就像是那些让日常生活变得更容易的小升级之一。如果您的宝宝皮肤敏感，或者只是想在洗澡时更加安心，那么这款过滤器绝对值得考虑。

title: Save your money. You will forfeit $10 for this crap. Buy yourself a nice chocolate bar instead.
title_zh: 省钱。你将因为这个垃圾而被罚 10 美元。相反，给自己买一块美味的巧克力吧。
body: Should be ZERO stars. People do not waste your energy or your money. The “heat indicator” thing is bs. After literally DIGGING around for information on what temperature water ti use with this crap filter, I found: a) directions that recommend using warm/LUKEWARM water otherwise incurring damage on the filter particles or potentially releasing other particulates into the water… b) the heat indicator turns pink almost instantly with warm water and takes a bit to adjust even when you turn water back to cold c) does NOT fit flush the faucets…I have a normal freaking faucet as pictured and did not sit flush at all d) water fills at an infuriatingly slow pace least you just got full tilt and say okay half the water won’t be filtered because it’s pouring out of the overflow spout e) You pay shipping! Here is direct from the website “ Once we’ve received and inspected your return, we’ll alert you to your refund status. If approved, you’ll be automatically refunded the purchase price of the returned device, less a $10 handling fee (which includes the cost of return shipping),” Yet if you return within 60 days, verbiage mentions free shipping! So…if $10 includes shipping then what is gist of handling? Incredibly disappointed in myself for trying this thing out which didn’t change a lick of my water…only left me annoyed with trying to relax in a lukewarm bath that didn’t leave my skin any “softer” or freaking less agitated. Worthless…
body_zh: 应该是零星。人们不会浪费你的精力或金钱。 “热量指示器”的东西是废话。在仔细研究了这个垃圾过滤器使用的水温信息后，我发现： a) 建议使用温水/温水的说明，否则会对过滤颗粒造成损坏或可能将其他颗粒释放到水中…… b) 加热指示器在遇到温水时几乎立即变成粉红色，即使将水调回冷水也需要一些调整 c）不适合冲洗水龙头……我有一个如图所示的普通水龙头，根本没有冲洗 d) 水以极其缓慢的速度注满，至少你刚刚完全倾斜并说好吧，一半的水不会被过滤，因为它从溢流嘴中倒出 e) 您支付运费！以下是直接来自该网站的信息：“一旦我们收到并检查了您的退货，我们将提醒您退款状态。如果获得批准，您将自动获得退回设备的购买价格的退款，减去 10 美元的手续费（包括退货运费），”然而，如果您在 60 天内退货，则措辞提到免费送货！那么……如果 10 美元包括运费，那么处理要点是什么？ 我对自己尝试的这个东西感到非常失望，它并没有改变我的水的一点点……只是让我对试图在温水浴中放松感到恼火，而这并没有让我的皮肤变得“更柔软”或不那么激动。一文不值……

title: Easy to install, gentle on sensitive skin, and safer around the spout
title_zh: 易于安装，对敏感皮肤温和，喷嘴周围更安全
body: We got the Canopy baby tub filter to make bath time gentler for sensitive skin, and it’s been a great addition. Installation was super quick and truly tool-free—it took just a couple of minutes and fit securely on our tub spout with no leaks. The best surprise was that water pressure stayed the same, which I was worried about before installing it. After a few baths, we noticed less dryness/irritation and the water felt softer, plus the strong chlorine smell was noticeably reduced. I also love that it’s made with soft BPA-free silicone and doubles as a spout cover, which instantly made bath time feel safer (no more hard spout bumps). The design looks clean and blends in nicely, and the temperature indicator is a nice idea for peace of mind (though depending on your lighting it can be a little subtle). The only thing to keep in mind is the ongoing cost of replacement cartridges, since you’ll need to swap the filter on a schedule. Overall, it’s a thoughtful, well-made product that makes bath time more comfortable and safer, especially for babies/kids with sensitive skin. Highly recommend!
body_zh: 我们购买了 Canopy 婴儿浴缸过滤器，让敏感肌肤的沐浴时间变得更加温和，这是一个很棒的补充。安装速度非常快，而且真正无需工具，只需几分钟，就可以牢固地安装在我们的浴缸出水口上，没有泄漏。最大的惊喜是水压保持不变，这是我在安装之前担心的。 洗了几次澡后，我们注意到干燥/刺激减少了，水感觉更柔和，而且强烈的氯味也明显减少。我还喜欢它采用柔软的不含 BPA 的硅胶制成，并兼作喷嘴盖，这立即让沐浴时间感觉更安全（不再有坚硬的喷嘴碰撞）。 该设计看起来干净且融合得很好，温度指示器是一个让您安心的好主意（尽管根据您的照明情况，它可能会有点微妙）。唯一需要记住的是更换滤芯的持续成本，因为您需要按计划更换过滤器。 总的来说，这是一款贴心、制作精良的产品，让沐浴时间更加舒适和安全，特别是对于皮肤敏感的婴儿/儿童。强烈推荐！

title: Excellent Filter
body: My son loves to take relaxing baths, but has eczema and sensitive skin. This filter has been great to allow him to take baths while having the peace of mind that all the harmful irritants and contaminants are filtered out. I would absolutely repurchase and recommend this product. Exceptional design, easy install, durable, simple directions/use, and immediate results. We've experienced no leakage. Overall excellent value for the peace of mind it provides.
body_zh: 我的儿子喜欢放松沐浴，但有湿疹和敏感皮肤。这个过滤器非常好用，可以让他安心洗澡，因为所有有害刺激物和污染物都被过滤掉了。我绝对会回购并推荐这个产品。卓越的设计、易于安装、耐用、简单的说明/使用以及立竿见影的效果。我们没有遇到任何泄漏。总体而言，它提供了令人安心的卓越价值。

title: Hard to Read Temperature Indicator
title_zh: 难以辨认的温度指示器
body: This water filter is truly new to me. I have never seen anything like it and I had to try it. It wasn't too hard to get it onto our tub and it would do nicely as a bit padding, should it be needed. The water seems to flow unimpeded thru it and none comes out anywhere other than the spout. The water feels like it has been aerated and the cartridge being as short as it is, it must pass thru pretty quick. The filter seems to have a few different "things" in it, based on the different colored beads I see in it. I do not smell any kind of potpourri smell or water softening salts, but that may just be me. The whole housing is like a big soft bit of padding on the spout, and the diverter can be reached, but the temperature indicator is hard to read and it doesn't seem to respond quick enough to changing temperatures. That is a big part of why I though this would be a good value. But, since it isn't easy to see the water temp change, say when a toilet gets flushed or the sprinklers come on, I am not feeling good about this. That not working as well as I had hoped and it being a big selling point, I now feel that this item may not work as well as I had hope. And, without that feature, I feel this is overpriced and not a good deal. The filter may work well, but it isn't worth the price. The padding factor can also be had for less money, I imagine.
body_zh: 这个水过滤器对我来说真的很新。 我从未见过类似的体验，必须尝试一下。 把它装到浴缸里其实不难，如果需要的话，它也能当作一点缓冲。 水似乎顺畅地流过它，除了喷嘴，其他地方都没有流出。 水感觉像是被充气过，而且墨盒很短，水必须很快通过。 根据我看到的各种颜色珠子，滤网里似乎有几个不同的“东西”。 我闻不到香盆香或软水盐的味道，但这可能只有我个人感觉。 整个外壳就像出水口上的一块大软垫，分流器可以够到，但温度指示器很难看清，而且对温度变化的响应不够快。 这也是我觉得这笔钱性价比很高的原因之一。 但是，由于水温变化不容易察觉，比如马桶冲水或喷头启动时，我对此感觉不太好。这 并没有我预期的效果，而且这也是我最大的卖点，现在我觉得这个产品可能没有我预期的那么好用。 没有这个功能，我觉得价格过高，也不划算。 过滤器可能效果不错，但价格不值得。 我想这种填充因素也能用更少的钱买到。

title: Filter does not work well
title_zh: 过滤器不能很好地工作
body: My expectations were not met with this water filter. I bought it hoping to reduce the strong chlorine smell from my tap water, especially since I use filtered water daily at work. Unfortunately, it barely made a difference. The water still had that noticeable chemical odor. Additionally, the build quality was disappointing. After just a few uses, the filter started to break down, and it seemed like it was just a sponge inside, not a real filtering mechanism. I had to stop using it because it felt like I was drinking untreated water. It's frustrating to spend money on something that doesn't do its basic job. I was hoping for a simple way to improve my water during my long shifts, but this product failed to deliver on both quality and performance.
body_zh: 这个滤水器没有满足我的期望。我买它是希望减少自来水中强烈的氯味，特别是因为我每天工作时都使用过滤水。不幸的是，这几乎没有产生任何影响。水仍然有明显的化学气味。此外，构建质量令人失望。经过几次使用后，过滤器开始损坏，看起来就像里面只是一块海绵，而不是真正的过滤机制。我不得不停止使用它，因为感觉就像我在喝未经处理的水。把钱花在不能完成其基本工作的东西上是令人沮丧的。我希望有一种简单的方法来改善长时间轮班期间的水质，但该产品未能提供质量和性能。

title: Easy to install and noticeably gentler water for baby baths
title_zh: 安装简单，婴儿洗澡的水质明显更温和
body: We started using this bath tub filter specifically to help reduce chlorine and make bath time gentler for our baby’s sensitive skin. Installation was very straightforward and took only a couple of minutes—no tools required. It fit securely on our tub spout and didn’t interfere with water pressure, which was a big plus. After a few uses, the water felt noticeably softer, and we saw less dryness on our baby’s skin after baths. It also helped reduce the strong chlorine smell that we normally notice, which made bath time more comfortable overall. The compact design looks clean and unobtrusive, and it doesn’t leak or shift once installed. That said, the filter cartridge will need regular replacement, which is something to factor into the ongoing cost. It also slightly extends the length of the tub spout, so in smaller tubs you may need to adjust how you position your baby during baths. Overall, this filter does exactly what it’s meant to do—provide gentler, cleaner water for baby baths. It’s a solid choice for parents concerned about water quality, especially for babies with sensitive skin, as long as you’re aware of the filter replacement schedule.
body_zh: 我们开始使用这款浴缸过滤器，专门是为了帮助减少氯，让宝宝敏感皮肤的洗澡时间更温和。安装过程非常简单，只需几分钟——不需要任何工具。它能牢固地安装在浴缸出水口上，也没有影响水压，这点非常值得肯定。 用了几次后，水明显变软了，宝宝洗澡后皮肤干燥感也减少了。它还帮助减少了我们通常会闻到的浓重氯气味，使洗澡时更加舒适。紧凑的设计看起来干净且不显眼，安装后不会漏水或移动。 不过滤芯需要定期更换，这也算在持续的费用中。它还会稍微延长浴缸出水口的长度，所以在较小的浴缸中，你可能需要调整宝宝洗澡时的姿势。 总体来说，这款过滤器完全达到了它的使命——为婴儿洗澡提供更温和、更清洁的水质。对于关心水质的家长来说，尤其是皮肤敏感的宝宝，只要你了解滤网更换时间表，这是一个稳妥的选择。

title: One happy camper mama!
body: I really like this tub water filter. I cannot really speak on the quality of the water since I do not have any water testing kits, but it was super easy to install. The water pressure is exactly the same as before I installed it, which was a pleasant surprise as that was something I was initially concerned about. I also noticed that my daughter hasn’t been exiting the baths with random rashes since we’ve been using it which is a huge win. Upon opening the package, I could instantly tell that it was designed with parents in mind. It’s made of a soft silicone material, which actually also made bath time immediately safer because it prevents my daughter from banging her head off the spout (which unfortunately has happened more times than I care to admit). In addition, it comes with a temperature indicator that changes color as the water warms. I love the all white design because it’s sleek and matches our bathroom well. All around I’m happy I made the purchase and definitely recommend to other parents of children who have sensitive skin!
body_zh: 我真的很喜欢这个浴缸滤水器。我无法真正谈论水的质量，因为我没有任何水质测试套件，但安装起来非常容易。水压与安装前完全相同，这是一个惊喜，因为这是我最初担心的事情。我还注意到，自从我们使用它以来，我的女儿在离开浴室时没有出现随机皮疹，这是一个巨大的胜利。打开包装，我立刻就看出它是为父母设计的。它由柔软的硅胶材料制成，实际上也使洗澡时间立即变得更安全，因为它可以防止我女儿的头从喷嘴上撞下来（不幸的是，这种情况发生的次数比我愿意承认的要多）。此外，它还配有一个温度指示器，当水变暖时会改变颜色。我喜欢全白色的设计，因为它很时尚并且很适合我们的浴室。总而言之，我很高兴我购买了这款产品，并且绝对推荐给其他皮肤敏感的孩子的父母！

title: Very good
body: The Canopy Baby Bath Tub Filter is an excellent product for parents who care about gentle, skin-safe bath time. The activated carbon filtration noticeably reduces chlorine and other irritants, making the water feel softer and more comfortable for my baby’s delicate skin. I love the BPA-free silicone spout cover, which adds an extra layer of safety by preventing bumps and slips during bath time. Installation was incredibly easy with the tool-free design, and it fits securely without leaking. The filter works quietly and doesn’t affect water pressure. Overall, this bath tub filter provides peace of mind, comfort, and protection in one simple product. It’s well-designed, effective, and thoughtfully made—definitely a five-star must-have for baby bath essentials!
body_zh: 对于注重温和、对皮肤安全的沐浴时间的父母来说，Canopy 婴儿浴缸过滤器是一款出色的产品。活性炭过滤显着减少了氯和其他刺激物，使水感觉更柔软，更适合我宝宝娇嫩的皮肤。我喜欢不含 BPA 的硅胶喷嘴盖，它可以防止洗澡时碰撞和滑倒，从而增加了额外的安全性。采用免工具设计，安装非常简单，并且安装牢固，不会泄漏。过滤器工作安静，不影响水压。总体而言，这款浴缸过滤器通过一款简单的产品提供安心、舒适和保护。它设计精良、效果好、制作用心——绝对是五星级婴儿沐浴必需品！

title: Great Size for Travel, Too.
body: The metal body of this water filter is amazing, high quality steel. The chain is thick and sturdy. We got a whole house filter and water softener several years ago, and noticed an improvement in my and my daughter’s eczema. I plan to use this to filter water during travel and while at family’s houses, so that my kids can have filtered water baths and not have the frustration or worry of unfiltered water exacerbating skin issues. I love that it’s easy to install and use and small enough to pack. I’m also impressed by how affordable filter replacements are. It makes it a doable option for every day use, too.

title: Very solid and heavy and well-built
title_zh: 非常结实、沉重且做工扎实
body: This Uiuaquas all metal bathtub water filter, looks very nice and is heavy and feels solidly built, but the problem is that it won't attach and work on my bathtub faucet. I have a faucet that is rounded/curved both along the shaft and at the spout and it has a diverter but it is recessed back and is not at the end by the spout. So when I hang on the diverter it ends up being too far back and isn't under the water spout. They include a metal hook sticker to attach to your faucet, but it's flat and my faucet is curved and rounded so it's not possibly to use, as it only has a very thin line as a point of contact and the rest of it is not touching and in the air. So unfortunately it won't work for me and I was unable to install it. I tried to wrap the chain around and jerry rig it, but couldn't. It's also pretty heavy so it's harder to try and manipulate the placement because the weight pulls it down. It would be good if they had included another length chain or there was an easy way to adjust the length. The other thing I'm wondering is what metal it is composed of. It looks like stainless steel, but if it were I'm sure they would advertise and say that, but everywhere they just say it's made of "lead-free metal" which could be anything. It would be nice if they noted what the metal is and were more transparent. I'm disappointed that this filter won't work for my faucet, but it's a very nice filter housing. It's compact and nicely designed, and looks much more durable than the plastic ones, but it's heavy.
body_zh: 这款Uiuaquas全金属浴缸水过滤器外观很漂亮，重量也很重，感觉结实，但问题是它无法安装，无法在我的浴缸水龙头上工作。 我有一个水龙头，沿着阀杆和出水口都是圆弧形的，它有一个分流器，但它是往后缩的，出水口的末端没有。 所以当我挂在分流器上时，它会被放得太远，不在水管下面。 他们附带一个金属钩贴纸可以贴在水龙头上，但那个贴纸是平的，我的水龙头是弯曲且圆的，根本无法使用，因为它只有一条非常细的接触点，其他部分没有接触，悬浮在空中。 所以很遗憾，它对我来说无法使用，我也没能安装。 我试着把链条缠绕起来，临时拼装，但没成功。而且它挺重的，所以更难调整位置，因为重量会把它拉下去。如果能加一条链条长度或者有简单的调节长度的方法就更好了。 我还想知道它由什么金属组成。 看起来像不锈钢，但如果是的话，我相信他们会宣传并这么说，但到处都说它是“无铅金属”，这可能是任何东西。 如果能标明金属是什么，并且更透明一些就好了。我很失望这个过滤器不适合我的水龙头，但它是一个非常不错的过滤器壳。 它紧凑且设计精良，看起来比塑料款耐用得多，但很重。

title: Silky Smooth Water
body: Both of my children have eczema so a bath water filter is a must. I have purchased several and this is the best we have used so far. The metal keeps from mildew and looks nice as well. I have not tested the water quality but you can see and feel the difference. The water is so soft on the skin and is very clear. Even though this filter is on the pricier side, I think its worth it as the quality is there.

title: Great quality
body: I’m extremely happy with this all-metal bathtub water filter—it’s made a noticeable difference, especially for sensitive skin. The build quality is excellent; the all-metal design feels durable and much more reliable than plastic options. Installation was quick and straightforward, and it fit perfectly onto my tub faucet. Once installed, I immediately noticed the water felt softer and less harsh, which has been great for both my skin and my child’s. The multi-stage filtration system is a huge plus. Knowing it helps reduce chlorine, heavy metals, and other contaminants gives me peace of mind, especially during bath time. It’s been especially helpful for calming dryness and irritation—perfect for babies or anyone with sensitive skin. Another thing I appreciate is that it doesn’t affect water pressure much, so baths are still quick and easy to fill. Overall, this is a well-made, effective, and family-friendly water filter that improves water quality and makes bath time more comfortable. Definitely worth it if you’re dealing with hard water or skin sensitivity!
body_zh: 我对这款全金属浴缸水过滤器非常满意——它确实带来了明显的改善，尤其是对敏感肌肤。做工非常出色;全金属设计感觉耐用且比塑料款更可靠。 安装迅速且简单，水龙头完美地安装在我的浴缸水龙头上。安装后，我立刻感觉水质更软、不那么刺激，这对我和孩子的皮肤都非常有益。 多级过滤系统是一大优势。知道酒精能减少氯、重金属和其他污染物，让我安心不少，尤其是在洗澡的时候。它对缓解干燥和刺激特别有帮助——非常适合婴儿或皮肤敏感的人。 我还很欣赏它对水压影响不大，所以洗澡依然快速且容易注水。 总体来说，这是一款制作精良、高效且适合家庭使用的水过滤器，能改善水质，让洗澡时更加舒适。如果你对硬水或皮肤敏感，绝对值得！

title: Great idea!
body: This filter is a great idea and a necessity for enjoying a quality bath with clean water. The filter is very sturdy and the clip that is provided for faucets that do not have another way to hang the filter works great for securing the chain of the filter. I do wonder if there is room for improvement for the overall design. Since our clawfoot tub has the faucet on the side of the tub and not in the front of the tub it is a little bit obtrusive. However, it is worth the inconvenience of it to have clean filtered water for bath time.
body_zh: 这个过滤器是个好主意，也是享受优质清洁水浴的必备品。 过滤器非常结实，给没有其他挂法的水龙头提供的夹子非常适合固定过滤器链条。 我确实想知道整体设计是否有改进空间。 因为我们的爪足浴缸水龙头在浴缸侧面而不是前面，所以有点碍眼。 不过，洗澡时有干净的过滤水，虽然不方便，但还是值得的。

title: his filter excels in build quality and ease of installation
title_zh: 他的过滤器在做工和安装简便性方面表现出色
body: My first impression of the Bathtub Water Filter is defined by its substantial weight and robust, all-metal construction. The chrome finish looks premium and feels significantly more durable than the common plastic alternatives. It gives an immediate sense that this is a product built to last, which is a major positive. The tool-free installation, as described, is indeed straightforward and works as advertised for most standard faucets. Upon examining the filtration mechanism, I have some reservations. The filter cartridge appears to be filled with what look like numerous small, white, spherical beads. While the product description claims "Advanced Multi-Stage Filtration" that removes 99% of chlorine, heavy metals, and contaminants, the visual presentation of the media doesn't immediately convey a sense of cutting-edge or multi-layered technology. It's hard to gauge the true sophistication or the specific filtration stages (like KDF, activated carbon, etc.) from the outside. This makes me somewhat uncertain about the actual filtration performance and its efficacy against the specific contaminants in my water, such as heavy metals or hard water minerals. The claims are strong, but the physical filter media looks relatively simple.
body_zh: 我对浴缸水过滤器的第一印象是它沉重的重量和坚固的全金属结构。镀铬表面看起来很高级，而且比常见的塑料材质更耐用。这让人立刻感受到这是一个耐用的产品，这是一个重大的优点。如前所述，无需工具的安装确实很简单，大多数标准水龙头都能正常使用。 检查过滤机制后，我有些保留。滤芯中似乎装满了许多小巧的白色球形珠子。虽然产品描述声称“先进多级过滤”，能去除99%的氯、重金属和污染物，但介质的视觉呈现并不能立刻传达出尖端或多层次技术的感觉。从外部很难判断其真正的复杂程度或具体过滤阶段（如KDF、活性炭等）。这让我对实际过滤性能及其对水中特定污染物（如重金属或硬水矿物质）的有效性有些不确定。这些说法很有说服力，但物理滤材看起来相对简单。

title: Simple Upgrade for Better Baths
title_zh: 简单升级，提升浴缸效果
body: This all-metal bathtub water filter is a solid choice if you want cleaner, gentler bath water without any hassle. The construction feels sturdy and durable, not flimsy like some plastic options, which gives confidence that it will last a long time. Installation is very easy—you can attach it to most bathtub spouts in just a few minutes, no tools or special skills needed. The multi-stage filtration does a good job reducing chlorine and other common contaminants. After using it, the water feels softer, and there’s less of that strong chemical smell. This can be especially helpful for babies or anyone with sensitive skin, as it may make baths more comfortable and less irritating. Overall, it’s a simple but effective upgrade for your bathroom. It doesn’t take much effort to set up, and the improvement in water quality is noticeable. If you want an easy way to make bath time feel cleaner and more gentle, this filter is worth considering.
body_zh: 这款全金属浴缸水过滤器是想要更清洁、更温和且无麻烦的洗澡水的稳妥选择。结构坚固耐用，不像某些塑料配件那样脆弱，让人相信它能用得很久。安装非常简单——你可以在几分钟内安装到大多数浴缸出水口上，无需任何工具或特殊技能。 多级过滤在减少氯和其他常见污染物方面表现良好。用完后，水感觉更软，浓烈的化学味也少了。这对婴儿或敏感皮肤的人尤其有帮助，因为能让洗澡更舒适、刺激更少。 总体来说，这是一次简单但有效的浴室升级。安装起来并不费力，水质的改善也非常明显。如果你想让洗澡时间更干净、更温和，这款过滤器值得考虑。
